Ingredients: 1 Egg, 1/2 c. melted Shortening, 1/2 c. Sugar, 1/2 c. Molasses, 1/2 c. Water, 1/2 tsp. Salt, 1/2 tsp. Ginger, 1 tsp. Cinnamon, 1 tsp. Baking Soda, 2 c. rounded Flour
ReferenceRecipe: Beat Egg; add Sugar, Shortening, Molasses and Water. Sift dry ingredients and add to mixture. Mix well and chill. Drop by teaspoon and bake at 375 for 10 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: cream shortening and sugar. add egg, molasses and water. sift together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger and ginger. add to creamed mixture.

Ingredients: 1 jar Ragu spaghetti sauce with mushroom and onions, 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, 1/4 tsp. black pepper, 1/2 tsp. oregano, 1/2 tsp. sugar, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 onion, chopped, 1 pkg. noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground beef and onions. Drain grease. Add to other ingredients. Cook 10 minutes. Pour over noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onions; drain. add ragu sauce, sugar, salt, pepper, garlic salt, oregano and spaghetti sauce. simmer for 20 minutes. cook noodles according to package directions. drain.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, beaten, 5 c. milk, 2 c. flour, salt, 2 Tbsp. butter, cinnamon and sugar mixture to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Combine eggs and 1 cup of milk in a bowl; mix well. Add sifted flour and salt; mix well. Stir in just enough milk until stiff dough forms; knead well. Roll into a thin rectangle on a lightly floured surface; dust with additional flour and cut into thin strips.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in pan. mix sugar and flour in pan. add milk, beaten eggs and salt. bring to a boil. add milk and mix in flour and butter. bake in a moderate oven until thick, about 25 to 30 minutes. add raisins if you prefer.

Ingredients: 1 head lettuce, chopped, 1 c. celery, chopped, 10 oz. frozen peas, 1/2 c. bell pepper, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. shredded carrot, 2 c. mayonnaise, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 8 oz. Mozzarella cheese, shredded, bacon bits (if desired)
ReferenceRecipe: Place a layer of lettuce. Add each vegetable in layers. Top off vegetables with more lettuce. Spread over lettuce 2 cups mayonnaise. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons sugar over mayonnaise. Add the Mozzarella cheese. Let set for 24 hours. Sprinkle bacon bits before serving, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: layer lettuce, celery, bell pepper, onion, sugar and peas in a casserole dish. spread mayonnaise over peas. sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. cover and refrigerate overnight. toss before serving. makes a lot of salad.

Ingredients: 2 gal. cut up green tomatoes, 1/2 gal. cut up onions, 1 pt. cut up bell peppers (some red), 1/2 pt. cut up hot peppers, 3 qt. vinegar, 8 c. sugar, 1/2 c. canning salt
ReferenceRecipe: Place sugar, salt, vinegar and peppers in pan; let come to a boil. Put in onions and let come to a boil again. Now put in tomatoes; allow to heat. Do not let the tomatoes boil. Place in jars and seal. Makes 20 pints.
GeneratedRecipe: mix tomatoes, onions, bell peppers and salt. let stand overnight. drain well. add sugar, vinegar and canning salt. bring to a boil. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 c. water, 3 1/2 Tbsp. flour, 3 egg yolks, 1/4 stick butter, 2 Tbsp. cocoa
ReferenceRecipe: Cook all ingredients in medium saucepan over medium heat. When ready it will be very thick. May need to use a wire whisk to smooth. Pour in baked pie shell.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, flour and cocoa. add egg yolks and water. cook until thick. add butter and vanilla. pour into baked pie shell.

Ingredients: 3 oz. liquid smoke, 5 to 6 lb. beef brisket, bottled barbecue sauce, celery salt, garlic salt, onion salt and meat tenderizer, salt and pepper, Worcestershire sauce, flour
ReferenceRecipe: Pour liquid smoke over meat and rub on all sides. Sprinkle with celery salt, garlic salt, onion salt and meat tenderizer. Cover with foil and leave in the refrigerator overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: put brisket in large roaster. sprinkle tenderizer with salt, salt, pepper, celery salt and onion. add a little liquid from brisket. sprinkle with flour and place on top of meat. do n't stir. pour in liquid smoke; place in oven to broil.

Ingredients: 1 gal. jar whole sour pickles, 5 lb. sugar, 1 small can pickling spice, wrapped in clean cloth and tied
ReferenceRecipe: Cut and drain pickles very good. Put, in a large container, 1 layer of pickles and then sugar, until finished. Place bag of spice in between. Stir twice a day for 3 days. Put into jars.
GeneratedRecipe: drain juice from pickles. add sugar, pickling spice and pickling spice. let stand overnight in refrigerator. next day, drain and rinse well. add sour cream and spice. stir until sugar is dissolved. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 3 cups rice, 3 cups hot water, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 6 chicken breasts, 1 pkg. onion soup mix
ReferenceRecipe: Place rice, hot water and mushroom soup in a 9x13 pan, stir. Layer chicken breast on top of mixture. Sprinkle onion soup mix over chicken. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 1 1/2 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: mix rice and hot water. place in 9 x 13 x 2-inch baking dish. top with chicken. sprinkle onion soup and onion soup mix. bake at 350 degrees 45 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 lb. Jimmy Dean sausage, 5 eggs, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 6 slices white bread, 1 1/2 c. Longhorn Cheddar cheese, 2 c. half and half
ReferenceRecipe: Crumble sausage in skillet. Cook until brown, stirring occasionally. Drain. Grease a 13 x 9-inch Pyrex dish. Line bottom with bread that has been cubed. Top with cooked sausage and grated cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: butter a 9 x 13-inch pan ( pam ). line the bottom with bread and break it over it. layer in pan the sausage and cheddar cheese. spread eggs over sausage. sprinkle mustard, dry mustard and salt over this.

Ingredients: 8 oz. flank steak, trimmed, 1 clove garlic, finely chopped, 1 Tbsp. grated fresh ginger, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 lb. broccoli, 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1 medium-size onion, sliced, 1/4 c. beef broth
ReferenceRecipe: Slice steak diagonally into 1/4-inch thick strips. Place in bowl with garlic, ginger and soy sauce. Refrigerate, covered, 20 minutes. Cut broccoli flowerets. Peel stem and slice 1/4-inch thick. Heat 1 1/2 teaspoons of oil in large saucepan. Add beef and marinade. Stir-fry until brown 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from pan and set aside. Swirl remaining oil around pan. Add beef broth and onion. Stir-fry for 6 to 8 minutes. Add beef broth as needed to prevent sticking. Stir in meat; heat through. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: cut steak across grain into very thin strips. combine soy sauce, garlic, onion, ginger and ginger in a large skillet and heat 1 inch of oil over high heat. add broccoli and stir-fry for 2 minutes or until tender-crisp. add meat and toss to coat all vegetables. stir-fry 2 minutes or until meat is no longer pink. remove and vegetables to bowl. stir in broth and beef bouillon. heat to boiling. pour over meat. serves 4.

Ingredients: 3 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1/2 c. powdered sugar, sifted, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, pinch of salt, 1/2 pt. whipping cream, whipped, 1 graham cracker or vanilla wafer crust, 1 can cherry pie filling
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together the cream cheese, sugar, vanilla and salt. Fold whipped cream into mixture. Pour into pie shell. Cover with pie filling and chill. Makes 1 pie.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together cream cheese, vanilla, powdered sugar, salt and vanilla. fold in whipped cream. pour into graham cracker crust. top with cherry pie filling. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) can sauerkraut, 1/2 c. cucumber (sliced thin), 1/2 c. celery, chopped, 1/2 c. carrot, shredded, 1/4 c. onion, chopped, 1 Tbsp. vinegar, 1/4 c. sugar, salt and pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Drain sauerkraut and cut into short pieces. Add remaining ingredients and mix well. Cover and chill for 8 hours or overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: drain kraut. combine kraut, celery, carrot, onion and cucumber. mix sugar and vinegar. combine with sauerkraut mixture and chill.

Ingredients: 7 c. sliced cucumbers, 1 c. sliced onion, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. celery seed, 2 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. mustard seed
ReferenceRecipe: Let cucumbers, onion and salt stand for 2 hours, then drain well. Combine remaining ingredients; bring to a boil for 1 minute, then let it cool. Add to cucumbers and onion. Let set in refrigerator for 2 to 3 days. Put into containers and freeze. Can also be kept in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cucumbers, onion and salt. let stand 1 hour. drain well. combine sugar, vinegar, celery seed and mustard seed. bring to a boil. pour over cucumbers and onions. put in containers and freeze.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. margarine, softened, 2 c. flour, 1 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. white sugar, 1 c. buttermilk, 1 tsp. soda, 1 egg, 1 tsp. vanilla, 5 Heath bars, crumbled or 1 pkg. Heath chips, 1/4 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Mix margarine, flour and sugar until crumbly. Take out 1/2 cup of mixture. Add Heath bars and pecans to 1/2 cup mixture and set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: cream margarine and brown sugar. add egg and beat well. sift flour, soda and soda together. add to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with chips. add heath bars and nuts.

Ingredients: 5 (3 oz.) pkg. jello (regular or sugar-free), 1 1/4 c. boiling water (for each pkg. jello), sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Mix 1 1/4 cups water with one package jello. Pour 3/4 cup jello mixture in 9 x 13-inch pan. Let set. Add 3 tablespoons sour cream in remainder. Spread over the set jello. Continue with remainder of 4 flavors.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water. add sour cream and mix well. pour into 9 x 13-inch pan. chill until firm.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 3/4 c. margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 3/4 c. peanut butter, 4 Tbsp. cocoa, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 3 1/2 c. oatmeal
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar, margarine and milk and boil for 1 minute exactly, stirring constantly, then take off stove. Add remaining ingredients. When mixed together, spoon onto cookie sheet and place in refrigerator until hard.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cocoa, milk and margarine in saucepan. bring to a boil. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat. add peanut butter, vanilla and oatmeal. mix well. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ingredients: 1 c. black-eyed peas, 3 1/2 c. water, 1/4 lb. bacon, sliced, 1 onion, sliced, 1/4 tsp. crushed hot pepper, 1/2 c. uncooked rice, 1 c. stewed tomatoes, 1/2 large green pepper, coarsely chopped, 1 tsp. salt, black pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Heat peas and water to boiling in a medium saucepan. Cover and remove from heat. Let stand for 1 hour. Fry bacon; drain. Add with onion and hot pepper to peas. Cover and simmer until peas are tender, 1 to 1 1/2 hours; stir in rice, salt, black pepper, tomatoes and green pepper. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally until rice is tender, about 25 minutes. Add additional water, if necessary.
GeneratedRecipe: cook peas, black-eyed peas and hot water for about 3 minutes. fry bacon and remove from heat. add onion and green pepper to bacon drippings; saute until limp. stir in rice, salt, pepper and tomatoes. return peas to pan. add 1 cup water and bring to boil. cover and simmer for 35 to 40 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 lb. steak, sliced, 1 small onion, 1 c. ketchup, 1 c. sour cream, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 4 dashes of Worcestershire sauce, 3 Tbsp. butter, egg noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onions in butter. Add meat; brown. Add other ingredients. Simmer covered 20 minutes. Cook noodles. Drain. Serve beef over noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: brown steak in butter. add onion and cook until tender. add soup, ketchup, worcestershire sauce and worcestershire sauce. simmer for 30 minutes. add sour cream and heat through. serve over noodles.

Ingredients: 2 (3 oz.) pkg. instant vanilla pudding, 3 c. milk, 1 (8 oz.) container sour cream, 1 (9 oz.) Cool Whip, 1 large can chunk pineapple, 1 box vanilla wafers
ReferenceRecipe: Combine pudding and milk. Mix thoroughly. Add sour cream and Cool Whip; mix well. Layer with pineapple and wafers.
GeneratedRecipe: mix pudding and milk. stir in sour cream, cool whip and pineapple; set aside. crush wafers; add to pudding mixture. place vanilla wafers in bowl and cover with pudding mix. add pineapple. top with vanilla wafers. cover and chill.

Ingredients: 1 lb. cream cheese, room temperature (for easier mixing), 1 pt. sour cream, 1 c. sugar, 2 tsp. lemon extract, 2 Tbsp. flour, 5 eggs, separated, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1/4 lb. butter for crust, softened, 1/3 pkg. graham cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together cheese, sour cream, sugar, lemon extract, egg yolks, flour and 2 tablespoons butter in a large mixing bowl. Beat egg whites stiff and fold in last.
GeneratedRecipe: soften cream cheese and butter. beat until fluffy. gradually beat in sour cream and sugar ( at room temperature ). blend in flour and lemon extract; chill.

Ingredients: 6 lamb shanks, 2 tsp. seasoned salt, 1 Tbsp. shortening, 1 (10 1/2 oz.) can condensed tomato soup, 1/2 can water, 1 Tbsp. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 c. water, fluffy, hot rice
ReferenceRecipe: Wipe shanks with damp paper towel. Remove excess fat. Sprinkle with salt. Brown meat in hot fat in a heavy skillet or Dutch oven. Combine remaining ingredients except flour and water. Pour over browned shanks. Cover snugly and cook over low heat for 1 1/2 hours or until tender. Skim off fat. Combine flour and water; add to sauce and shanks. Cook until sauce is slightly thickened. Serve with rice. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: cut lamb shanks into serving size pieces. brown in shortening in large skillet. add water, tomato soup, vinegar, soy sauce, worcestershire sauce and salt. cover and cook over low heat for 1 1/2 hours. stir occasionally. add rice and cook until tender.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 large onion, 1 large bell pepper, 4 to 5 fresh tomatoes, 4 to 5 potatoes, 1/4 c. uncooked rice, chili powder, salt, pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef and onion until brown. Drain. Mix chili powder, salt and pepper to meat. Set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef, onion and bell pepper. add tomatoes, rice, salt, pepper and chili powder. cook until rice is done.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour, 1 c. packed brown sugar, 3/4 c. sugar, 1 1/2 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 c. Parkay spread, 1 c. chopped walnuts, 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. milk, 1 egg, beaten, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 3 1/2 c. chopped apples
ReferenceRecipe: Combine flour, brown sugar, 1/2 cup sugar and cinnamon; cut in spread until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in walnuts. Reserve 2 cup crumb mixture; press remaining mixture onto bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan.
GeneratedRecipe: in mixing bowl, combine flour and brown sugar. in a bowl, beat egg; add milk and vanilla. mix well. stir in apple. pour into greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.

Ingredients: 1/2 lb. Velveeta cheese, softened with fork, 2 Tbsp. salad dressing, 8 or 9 chopped, stuffed olives or pickles, 3 hard-cooked eggs, chopped fine, 1/2 small onion, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Blend together and store in pint jar. Can add 2 tablespoons butter.
GeneratedRecipe: combine first four ingredients. blend well. add enough salad dressing to make spreading consistency. spread on crackers or english muffins to serve.

Ingredients: 1/2 small box macaroni, 1 pkg. seafood sticks, 2 lb. shrimp, steamed, Old Bay seasoning, sprinkle of sugar, 1/2 c. celery, 1/2 c. onions, mayonnaise, 2 boiled eggs
ReferenceRecipe: Boil your macaroni. In a large bowl, add the macaroni. Sprinkle a little sugar on it and stir. Cut up your celery and onions very fine (add to bowl and stir).
GeneratedRecipe: cook macaroni and cool. add seafood, eggs, onions and celery sticks. mix thoroughly. add mayonnaise and sugar. stir until mixed well. add more mayonnaise if needed to make a salad consistency.

Ingredients: 1 lb. almond bark, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips, 1 sq. unsweetened chocolate, 1 lb. Spanish peanuts
ReferenceRecipe: Melt the first 3 ingredients in a double boiler. When smooth, add the peanuts. Drop by teaspoonfuls on aluminum foil. Cool.
GeneratedRecipe: melt almond bark and chocolate chips in double boiler. stir in peanuts. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ingredients: large portion deer meat (we use a whole ham, the size will depend on the size of your smoker), 1 (2 liter) bottle Coca-Cola, 1/4 to 1/2 c. corn oil, Tony Chachere's seasoning, hickory or pecan chunks (smoke flavor)
ReferenceRecipe: Cut meat to fit smoker rack. Rinse, drain and dry meat with a towel. Be sure it is dry. Rub meat with oil, then liberally apply seasoning. Place meat on rack over water pan which has been filled with equal parts Coke and water. Cook approximately 8 to 10 hours. When done, bone is easily removed from meat. Slice and serve with your favorite barbecue sauce.
GeneratedRecipe: in heavy pot, add oil and heat up deer or meat to boiling; when meat is done, add tony 's seasoning. after it comes to a boil, add the chopped fresh corn. add pecan pieces and pecan chunks and mix well. cook on medium heat until done and the meat is done.

Ingredients: 6 green bananas, 2 scallions, mayonnaise dressing, salt and pepper to taste, 2 cloves garlic
ReferenceRecipe: Boil green bananas until they are easy to peel. Remove peel; cut into cubes. Roast cloves of garlic and chop into pieces. Add to bananas. Chop scallions, using only the leaves (green storkes). Mix dressing, salt and pepper together; add to banana. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: chop scallions in small pieces. peel bananas and chop. chop garlic. mix with salt, pepper and mayonnaise. stir all together.

Ingredients: 2 (3 oz.) pkg. raspberry jello, 2 c. boiling water, 2 cans frozen raspberries or strawberries, 1/2 pt. whipping cream, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese (Philadelphia), colored mini-marshmallows
ReferenceRecipe: Start to whip whipping cream and add the package of cream cheese. Set aside. Mix the water and jello. Add the frozen berries and let set. After the cream and cream cheese are mixed, put on top of set jello. Add colored mini-marshmallows.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water. pour in cream cheese and stir until smooth. add strawberries and pour into 9 x 13-inch dish. chill until firm. cut in squares. prepare whipping cream or use only as frosting.

Ingredients: 1 large strawberry jello, 1 small can crushed pineapple, 2 c. buttermilk, 1 c. chopped nuts (optional), 1 large Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix pineapple and jello; heat to boiling and then let cool. When cool, mix in buttermilk, nuts and Cool Whip. Pour into bowl or mold and chill until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: bring pineapple and jello to a boil. remove from heat and add buttermilk and cool whip. mix well. add nuts and chill.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. butter, 2 tsp. salt, 3/4 tsp. pepper, 3 c. chicken, 2 c. sifted flour, 6 eggs, 2 c. cooked, cooled and shredded chicken
ReferenceRecipe: Bring to a boil the butter, salt, pepper and chicken broth. Add flour all at once to the boiled mixture, stirring constantly until mixtures leaves side of pan. Cool 3 to 5 minutes. Beat in eggs, one at a time, beating until smooth and glossy after each addition. Mix in chicken. Drop by teaspoonfuls into hot fat. Drain on paper towels.
GeneratedRecipe: mix butter, flour, salt and pepper. add eggs and mix well. add chicken and shredded chicken. bake in moderate oven about 30 minutes or until done.

Ingredients: 1 Small Bottle of Ketchup (12 or 16 ounces), 1 tsp. of Yellow Mustard, 2 Tbsp. of Apple Cider Vinegar, 5 Tbsp. of Brown Sugar, 1 lb. of Chipped Ham or Chipped Baked Ham
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all of the ingredients together and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and add the ham. Simmer until the ham is thoroughly heated through.
GeneratedRecipe: cook ham in water with mustard, vinegar, sugar and mustard until it thickens. put in crock-pot. put chipped ham in crock-pot. pour on top ( do not cook ). cook on low for 2 to 3 hours.

Ingredients: 2 c. water, 2 (14 1/2 oz.) cans Cajun-style stewed tomatoes, 1/4 tsp. hot pepper sauce, 1/2 tsp. Cajun seasoning, 2 garlic cloves, minced, 1 medium onion, sliced, 1/3 c. uncooked regular rice, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen cut okra, thawed, 2 (15 oz.) cans black-eyed peas, drained, 1 1/2 c. medium shrimp
ReferenceRecipe: Note: If fresh shrimp is used, it must be peeled and deveined.
GeneratedRecipe: in 3-quart saucepan, combine water, tomatoes, black-eyed peas, cajun seasoning, okra, onion, garlic and hot pepper sauce. bring to boil over high heat. cover and simmer 20 minutes or until rice is tender. stir in peas and bring to a boil. reduce heat to low. simmer, covered, 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. garnish with parsley. serves 6.

Ingredients: 1 large cucumber, 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1 small onion, grated, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 2 to 3 drops green food coloring
ReferenceRecipe: Pare, grate and drain cucumber. Combine cucumber with remaining ingredients. A favorite sandwich spread or can be thinned with milk or sour cream to make a delightful vegetable or chip dip.
GeneratedRecipe: mix softened cream cheese, mayonnaise and onion. add salt, green food coloring and softened cream cheese. mix well. shape into a ball and roll in chopped pecans. chill.

Ingredients: 3 sprigs dill, 2 garlic cloves, 2 sliced onions, 25 to 30 medium to large cucumbers, 1 pt. water, 1 qt. 5% vinegar, 2 1/2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. pickling salt
ReferenceRecipe: Wash and slice cucumbers 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick. Soak for 1 hour in ice water. Add ice cubes or crushed ice. Mix water, vinegar, sugar and salt; bring to boil. Pack cucumbers into clean, hot jars with 3 sprigs of dill, 2 garlic cloves and onion. Pour boiling hot pickling syrup over cucumbers, leaving 1/2 inch headspace. Wipe off jar mouth and seal. Process in boiling water bath canner for 15 minutes. (Count processing time as soon as hot jars are placed into actively boiling water.)
GeneratedRecipe: slice cucumbers and onions. cover with boiling water and let stand for 3 hours. drain. combine vinegar, sugar, pickling salt and pickling salt. bring to a boil and pour over cucumbers. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. (8 oz.) cream cheese, softened, 2 c. Cheddar cheese, shredded, 1 Tbsp. grated onion, 1 Tbsp. grated green pepper, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Mix well. Shape into a ball. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts. Refrigerate to set. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cream cheese, cheddar cheese, green pepper, onion, worcestershire sauce and lemon juice. mix well. shape into a ball and roll in chopped walnuts. chill. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 1 small can crushed pineapple, 1/4 c. sugar, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry jello, 1 large Cool Whip, 1 (12 oz.) carton cottage cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar and pineapple; bring to boil. Add jello. Mix well. Let cool. Blend in Cool Whip and cottage cheese. Let set 2 hours in fridge before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: boil pineapple and sugar in saucepan on stove. add jello and stir. cool. add cottage cheese and cool whip. stir. chill.

Ingredients: 12 oz. Italian sausage, removed from casing, 1 (16 oz.) can crushed tomatoes, 1 1/2 tsp. minced garlic, 1/2 c. heavy cream, 3 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 lb. bow tie pasta
ReferenceRecipe: Cook sausage over medium heat, breaking up clumps. Pour fat from skillet. Add tomatoes and garlic. Reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and simmer 10 minutes. Skim off excess fat. Add cream. Increase heat and boil, stirring constantly, 2 minutes or until sauce is thickened and creamy. Stir in parsley, salt and pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta according to package directions. drain and set aside. in large skillet, cook sausage until browned. drain off fat. add tomatoes, parsley, garlic, salt and pepper. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes. stir in cream and heat through. serve over pasta.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, 2 c water, 2 pkg Pillsbury Date Bread mix, 2 c pecan (halves or chopped), 2 c raisins, 2 c candied cherries, 1 c candied pineapple
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oven to 350 degrees, grease and flour (or spray with Pam) a tube pan. In large bowl, combine eggs and water. Add remaining ingredients, stir by hand until combined. Pour into prepared pan. Bake for 75 to 85 minutes or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool in pan for 30 minutes, loosen edges and remove from pan. Cool completely, wrap in foil or plastic wrap and store in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: preheat oven to 350 degrees. in a large bowl, combine eggs, water and raisins. stir in bread mix, raisins, pineapple, and pecan halves. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) vermicelli, cut in bite-size, cooked and drained, 1 c. chopped green peppers, 1 c. chopped onions, 1 c. sweet pickle relish, 1 small jar drained pimento, 2 bags frozen cocktail shrimp, salt to taste, little Accent, 1 c. mayo
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together and refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: cook vermicelli according to package directions, omitting salt, but leave in pan. drain well. mix vegetables, mayo and relish. add to vermicelli mixture. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 (3 lb.) chicken, cut in 8ths with skin removed, 4 carrots, 1 onion, 1 parsnip, 1 parsley root, 3 stalks celery
ReferenceRecipe: Remove liver. Place clean, cut up vegetables in pot, except for onion, which is put in whole. Place chicken in pot. Cook 1 1/2 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: cook chicken, bone and carrots in chicken broth until tender. add celery, carrots, parsley, onion, and salt and pepper to taste. bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. add parsnip to thicken with cornstarch mixed with milk.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, 1 (10 oz.) can cream of chicken soup, 1 (16 oz.) can mixed vegetables, 1 (16 oz.) can corn, 1/2 (16 oz.) can green beans (if desired), 2 c. mixed Bisquick
ReferenceRecipe: Cook chicken breasts until tender. Take off bone. Cut in small bite-size pieces. Place chicken with broth in large baking pan. Add cream of chicken soup and all vegetables. Top with Bisquick (recipe on box). Bake 1 hour. Serves 4 to 6.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken in chicken broth with vegetables until tender. debone chicken and place in a casserole dish. mix cream of chicken soup with vegetables, corn and chicken soup. mix well. pour 1/2 of bisquick mixture on top of the chicken mixture. bake until done.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. milk, 1 c. uncooked oats, 1 c. whole wheat flour, 2 Tbsp. honey, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 c. olive oil, 2 eggs, beaten
ReferenceRecipe: Pour milk over oats; let stand 5 minutes. Mix together flour, baking powder, salt and lightly stir in eggs into oats mixture. Add honey then add dry ingredients and oil, stirring until blended. Cook on a hot lightly greased griddle.
GeneratedRecipe: combine flour, oats, baking powder, salt and honey in a large bowl. in another bowl, combine eggs, milk and oil. add to dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened. stir in oats.

Ingredients: 3/4 lb. powdered sugar, 1 lb. Nilla Wafers, crushed, 1 stick margarine, 1 c. chopped nuts, 6 oz. frozen orange juice, coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together all ingredients, except coconut. Form into balls and roll in coconut. Refrigerate 12 hours or overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. form into small balls. roll in coconut. wrap in plastic wrap and cool in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. margarine or butter, 1/4 c. cocoa
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients and bring to a full boil. Boil for 1 minute. Cool by placing pot in sink and running cold water around it. Beat until thick enough to spread.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa and milk in saucepan. bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. boil 1 minute. remove from heat. add butter and beat until thick enough to spread.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 Tbsp. celery seed, 1 Tbsp. salt, 2/3 c. sugar, 1 onion (walnut size), minced, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1 c. oil
ReferenceRecipe: Put all ingredients in blender. Keep refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, mustard, salt, vinegar and onion in a small saucepan. bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. remove from heat and add oil and celery seed. stir until sugar is dissolved. add walnut oil and beat until well blended.

Ingredients: 1 medium onion, chopped, 2 ribs celery, chopped, 1/4 c. butter, 3 Tbsp. flour, 8 c. chicken broth, 2 c. creamy peanut butter, 1 3/4 c. half and half
ReferenceRecipe: Saut onion and celery in butter until soft, but not brown. Stir in flour until well blended. Add chicken broth; stir constantly and bring to a boil. Remove from heat and pure in food processor or blender. Add peanut butter and half and half, stirring to blend thoroughly. Return to low heat and heat until just hot, but do not boil. Serve; garnish with chopped peanuts.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion, celery and celery in butter until tender. stir in flour and cook 1 minute. add chicken broth and half and half. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes. add peanut butter and half; heat through.

Ingredients: 1 (14 oz.) pkg. coconut, 1 c. pecans, 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 small strawberry Jell-O
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together. Form balls (works better with hands wet). Roll in large package strawberry Jell-O.
GeneratedRecipe: mix jell-o and sugar; add milk and stir. then add coconut, vanilla, nuts and coconut. form into small balls. chill overnight.

Ingredients: 2 lb. boiled shrimp, cut in pieces, 1 head lettuce, torn in bite size pieces, 3 Tbsp. chopped dill pickles, 1/2 lb. Cheddar cheese, cut in small pieces, 2 tomatoes, cut in pieces, 1 tsp. grated onion, 1/4 c. chopped sweet pickles, mayonnaise, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients together. Add enough mayonnaise to moisten. Chill until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix shrimp, shrimp, lettuce, pickles, onion, salt, pepper and dill; chill. before serving, add cheese. garnish with tomato and tomatoes. serve cold. yields 6 to 8 servings.

Ingredients: 1 onion, 2 cans tomatoes, 1 can corn, 1 can Great Northern beans, 2 Tbsp. chili powder or more to make hot, salt and pepper, 1 lb. hamburger, green pepper (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat and onion until brown. (Don't drain.) Add tomatoes and all other ingredients in a crock-pot or deep dish. Simmer 4 hours. Best if eaten next day.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger, onion and green pepper. add tomatoes, corn, chili powder, salt and pepper to taste. simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 c. soy sauce, 1/3 c. olive oil, 1/3 c. wine, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 4 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger or freshly grated, 1 tsp. fresh ground black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Combine mix with whisk; marinate 6 hours in Ziploc bag, then use for basting. This can be used for chicken or any steak, grilled or broiled. Try it on roast chicken in the oven, basting occasionally.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, mix first 5 ingredients. add oil and stir to mix. store in tightly covered container. makes about 1 cup. use as a basting sauce for beef, beef, chicken or pork chops.

Ingredients: turkey, cut up, turkey gravy or broth, vegetables (any kind), chopped, 2 handfuls cauliflower, 3 tsp. chicken bouillon, 1 tsp. beef bouillon, 1 small can tomatoes, diced, 2 potatoes, diced, 1 can corn, 1 pkg. mixed vegetables, garlic powder
ReferenceRecipe: Using turkey gravy or broth as a base, add all other ingredients to it and stir together. Cook on low heat for 2 to 3 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: put turkey broth, bouillon, garlic powder, potatoes and cauliflower in a large pot. simmer until vegetables are tender. add the vegetables. cook until vegetables are done.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. granulated gelatin (unflavored), 1/2 c. cold water, 1 c. rich milk, 1 1/2 c. (1 lb. can) Hershey's chocolate flavored syrup, 3/4 c. granulated sugar, few grains salt, 1 pt. light cream, 1 pt. heavy cream, 2 Tbsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Allow the gelatin to soak in the water in a saucepan for 5 minutes. Add the milk and heat, stirring until the gelatin is dissolved. GeneratedRecipe: heat 1 cup milk and the granulated sugar until melted. stir in gelatin and salt. stir in cold water, chocolate and vanilla. chill until partially congealed. beat heavy cream until stiff and fold into cream. pour into a greased 8-inch square pan; freeze until firm. cut in squares and serve. serves 8.

Ingredients: 1 (12 oz.) jar peanut butter, 2 sticks margarine, whipped, 1 lb. confectioners sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cream peanut butter and margarine until smooth. Add confectioners sugar and mix with hands. Shape into balls (small ones about the size of marbles). GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine and peanut butter together. add confectioners sugar and mix well. pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan. chill.

Ingredients: 1 large pkg. strawberry Jello dissolved in 2 c. boiling water, 1 10 oz. pkg. frozen strawberries, 1 small can crushed pineapple, 1 1/2 c. Cool Whip, 1 8 oz. pkg. softened cream cheese, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, Chopped nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve Jello in 2 cups boiling water. Add fruits undrained. Refrigerate for several hours to congeal.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in water. add strawberries, pineapple and frozen strawberries and dissolved in boiling water. let set until slightly thickened. add pineapple, sugar, vanilla and cream cheese ( with mixer ). fold in cool whip. refrigerate until firm.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. butter or margarine, 1 c. sugar, 1 egg, 1 c. persimmon pulp, 1 tsp. baking soda, 2 c. flour, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 1/4 tsp. cloves, 1 c. raisins, 1 c. pecans and/or almonds
ReferenceRecipe: Cream 1/2 cup butter with 1 cup sugar, then add 1 beaten egg and 1 cup persimmon pulp. Persimmon pulp needs 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in it first. Set aside and combine the following.
GeneratedRecipe: cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. add egg and beat well. sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg and cloves. add to creamed mixture alternately with persimmon pulp. stir in raisins and nuts.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 3 large potatoes, pared and diced (3 c.), 1 (16 oz.) can cream-style corn, 1 can condensed beef broth, 1 tsp. salt, dash of pepper
ReferenceRecipe: In large skillet, brown beef and onion; drain off fat. Add remaining ingredients and mix well. Cover and cook over low heat for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring the mixture occasionally. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, cook beef and onion until beef is browned and onion is tender. drain off fat. stir in broth, potatoes, corn, salt and pepper. heat to boiling. reduce heat to low. cover and simmer 20 minutes or until potatoes are tender.

Ingredients: 1 can fruit cocktail, drained, 1 box strawberry jello, 12 oz. cottage cheese, 1 (8 oz.) Cool Whip, nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: mix dry jello with cottage cheese. add fruit cocktail and nuts. fold in cool whip. chill.

Ingredients: 7 c. peeled and sliced cucumbers, 1 c. peeled and sliced onions, 1 c. peeled and sliced green peppers, 2 c. sugar, 1 c. white vinegar, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. celery seed
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together. Place in a jar and refrigerate. Keeps very well. Do not add any water to this recipe.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cucumbers, onions and green peppers. sprinkle with salt. let stand 1 hour. drain well. combine vinegar, sugar and celery seed. bring to a boil. pour over cucumbers and onions. put in containers and freeze.

Ingredients: 1 qt. vanilla ice cream, 1/2 c. crunchy peanut butter, 1 small container Cool Whip, 2 Pet-Ritz graham cracker crusts
ReferenceRecipe: Place ice cream in mixing bowl. Stir just enough to soften. Fold in peanut butter, then Cool Whip. Spoon into graham cracker crusts. Freeze 4 to 5 hours before serving. Makes 2 pies. Will keep several weeks in freezer.
GeneratedRecipe: mix ice cream and peanut butter in large bowl. add cool whip and mix until smooth. pour into crusts. freeze.

Ingredients: 6 qt. sliced cucumbers, 3 green peppers, sliced (2 1/2 c.), 4 1/2 cloves garlic, 7 1/2 c. sugar, 2 1/4 tsp. turmeric, 3 Tbsp. mustard seed, 8 to 10 medium onions, 1/2 c. pickling salt, 4 1/2 c. vinegar, 2 1/2 tsp. celery seed
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cucumbers, onions, green peppers and whole garlic cloves. Add salt; cover with ice and mix thoroughly. Let stand 3 hours. Drain well; remove garlic. GeneratedRecipe: mix cucumbers, onions, garlic and green peppers. cover with cracked ice. let stand 3 hours. drain well. add remaining ingredients. heat to boiling point. seal in hot sterilized jars. yields 8 pints.

Ingredients: 8 oz. extra sharp cheese, 1 small jar pimentos, 2 to 3 Tbsp. Dukes mayonnaise, 2 tsp. granulated sugar, salt, pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Grate cheese and put aside. Mash pimentos with fork into very small pieces. Drain juice. Mix cheese and pimentos, then add mayonnaise and sugar. Salt and pepper to taste.
GeneratedRecipe: grate cheese and mix in mayonnaise and sugar. add pimentos, pimentos, salt and pepper. put in jars. keep in refrigerator until ready to use.

Ingredients: 1 (12 oz.) can frozen orange juice, thawed, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen pineapple juice, thawed, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen lemonade, thawed, 1 qt. pineapple sherbet, 1 qt. lime sherbet, 1 1/2 qt. ginger ale or lemon-lime beverage, chilled, fresh mint sprig (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Prepare orange juice and pineapple juice according to package directions. Prepare lemonade using 3 cans of water. Combine juices; chill at least 2 hours. GeneratedRecipe: in large punch bowl, combine orange juice, lemonade concentrate and pineapple juice. chill. just before serving, add ginger ale. float sherbet on top.

Ingredients: 3 lb. chicken (approximately), 10 corn tortillas, 1/2 b. Cheddar cheese, 1/2 lb. Jack cheese, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1 (6 oz.) can chili salsa, 1 c. chicken broth, 1 can chili with beans
ReferenceRecipe: Boil chicken in water until done (approximately 1 hour). When cool, cut chicken into chunks and place in bottom of 13 x 9-inch greased pan. Cut tortillas into strips and lay on top of chicken.
GeneratedRecipe: in crock-pot, boil chicken, chili, salsa, chili powder and salt. mix all ingredients except tortillas. layer on tortillas. place tortillas on top of sauce. sprinkle 1/2 cup more cream of chicken broth, 1 c. cheese. layer of corn tortilla, then layer rest of tortillas, soup layer of tortillas, salsa and chicken. continue alternating until all tortillas and soup is used all layers. cover and cook on low. heat 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburg, 1 box Betty Crocker au gratin potatoes, 3 c. boiling water
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburg; pour off grease. Add potatoes and water. Simmer for 1/2 hour. Add more water, if needed.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes in boiling water until tender. drain well. add au gratin potatoes to hamburg. let sit until cool.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) containers low-fat vanilla yogurt, 3 1/2 c. thawed Cool Whip, 2 c. sweetened strawberries, sliced, 2 graham cracker crusts
ReferenceRecipe: Fold Cool Whip and yogurt together. Add strawberries. Put in graham cracker crust. Freeze about 4 hours. Let stand at room temperature for about 20 minutes before cutting. Top with strawberries. Makes 2 pies.
GeneratedRecipe: combine yogurt and cool whip. fold in strawberries and strawberries. spoon into pie crusts. freeze until firm. remove from freezer 15 minutes before serving.

Ingredients: 1 c. cocoa, 1 c. sugar, 3 c. nonfat dry milk
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together and store in airtight container. Add 1 or 2 heaping teaspoons to a cup of hot milk.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients with electric mixer and store in airtight container. to use, use 1/3 cup mix to 1 1/4 cups hot cocoa mix.

Ingredients: 1 egg white, 1/4 tsp. cream of tartar, 1/4 c. boiling water, 3/4 c. white sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Put egg white, cream of tartar, sugar and vanilla in bowl. Add water and beat with mixer until it forms peaks.
GeneratedRecipe: combine egg white, sugar, cream of tartar and boiling water in top of double boiler. cook over boiling water, beating constantly with rotary beater until stiff peaks form. remove from heat. add vanilla and beat until thick enough to spread.

Ingredients: 1 (2 lb.) box Velveeta cheese, 1 lb. hot sausage, 1 large jar pimento, 1 lb. hamburger, 1 large can cream
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger and sausage. Drain. Cube the cheese. Drain pimento. Put all ingredients in crock-pot. Heat on high, stirring occasionally until cheese melts. Then cook on low 3 to 4 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger and sausage; drain. add cream cheese and pimento. stir until cheese is melted. serve warm with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 10 oz. boneless chuck steak, cut in 1-inch cubes, 2 tsp. vegetable oil, 1 c. chopped onions, 1 garlic clove, minced, 1 to 1 1/2 tsp. curry powder, 3/4 c. water, 1/4 c. tomato sauce, 1 pkg. instant beef broth and seasoning mix, 1/2 c. frozen peas, dash of salt
ReferenceRecipe: On rack in broiling pan, broil beef cubes, turning to brown all sides until rare, about 6 minutes. Set aside.

Ingredients: 2 ripe peaches, peeled and thinly sliced, 1 1/2 c. fresh or frozen strawberries, thinly sliced, 3/4 c. orange-flavored liqueur, 1/2 gal. chilled white wine
ReferenceRecipe: Place fruit in a bowl. Pour liqueur over fruit; cover. Set aside for 2 or 3 hours. To serve, slowly stir in wine. Makes 9 to 10 cups.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine peaches, wine and liqueur. gently stir to coat. cover and chill for at least 3 hours. serve in a punch bowl. garnish with fresh mint and mint leaves.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. reduced fat liquid butter mix, 1 tsp. crushed oregano, 1/4 tsp. lite salt (optional), 2 lb. medium-large shrimp in the shell, 2 cloves garlic, 3 bay leaves, 2 tsp. crushed red pepper, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1/2 tsp. ground black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all in a Dutch oven or pot. Toss well. Set aside for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Place pot over medium heat and allow mixture to come to a boil. Stir, cover and cook 5 minutes or until shrimp turns pink.

GeneratedRecipe: cook carrots in salted water until tender. drain and set aside. saute onion in butter. add egg, salt and pepper to taste. add cheese and stir until cheese is melted.

Ingredients: 2 envelopes unflavored gelatin, 1/2 c. sugar, 2 c. cranberry juice cocktail, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen strawberries, thawed, 1 (8 oz.) can crushed pineapple, 1 (16 oz.) can whole berry cranberry sauce, 2 medium bananas, mashed, 2 c. thick plain yogurt, 1 c. broken walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: Mix gelatin with sugar and 1 cup cranberry juice cocktail over a low heat until gel is dissolved. Add 1 cup of juice and set aside. Drain strawberries and pineapple. Reserve fruit. GeneratedRecipe: dissolve gelatin in 1 cup boiling water. add cranberry sauce and sugar. stir until dissolved. add pineapple, strawberries, bananas and nuts. pour half of mixture into a 9 x 13-inch pan. chill until firm. spread with yogurt. pour remaining gelatin mixture on top. chill.

Ingredients: 6 fresh beets, pared, 3 Tbsp. margarine, 2 medium onions, sliced, 1 tsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, sprinkle of pepper, lettuce leaves, 2 Tbsp. cider vinegar or fresh lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Shred raw beets; place in saucepan with margarine. Cover with sliced onions. Sprinkle with sugar, salt and pepper. Cover with lettuce leaves that have been wetted down. GeneratedRecipe: in medium saucepan, combine beets and onions. bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. reduce heat; simmer, covered, for 20 minutes. add beets; simmer 5 minutes longer or until beets are tender. place lettuce leaves on plates. drizzle with vinegar, sugar, salt and pepper. top with lettuce, onions and bacon. serves 8.

Ingredients: 1 bag fresh cranberries, 2 navel oranges, quartered with peel and core cut out, sugar to taste, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. pecans

GeneratedRecipe: put cranberries and sugar in a food processor and process until well blended. add oranges and salt and mix well. store in glass jar in cool place.

Ingredients: 2 whole, large chicken breasts, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 c. sliced, fresh mushrooms, 2 Tbsp. sliced green onions, 1/2 c. chicken broth, 1 Tbsp. flour, 1 c. seedless grapes (green), halved, 1/4 c. dry white wine, hot, cooked rice

GeneratedRecipe: in large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon butter over medium-high heat. add chicken; saute about 5 minutes or until no longer pink. remove chicken from skillet; pour off fat. add mushrooms; cook until tender. remove from skillet with green onions; keep warm. stir in flour; cook 1 minute. stir in broth; bring to boiling, stirring constantly. add chicken back to skillet; cook until slightly brown and thickens. add mushrooms, grapes, wine, mushrooms. heat to boil, uncovered, on high heat until sauce thickens. serve over rice and green onions. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 10 qt. pkg. dry milk, 11 oz. jar Coffee-mate, 1 lb. box powdered sugar, 2 lb. box Nestle Quik
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together; keep in airtight container, in freezer. Use 2 heaping tablespoonfuls per cup; add hot water.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together. store in tightly covered jar. add a few tablespoons to a cup of water.

Ingredients: 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 (14 oz.) pkg. Kraft macaroni and cheese, 2 c. water, 1 (8 oz.) can tomato sauce, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 1/2 c. chopped green pepper, 2 tsp. chili powder
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat. Add all remaining ingredients except cheese sauce; mix well. Bring to a boil; reduce heat. Cover. Simmer 8 to 10 minutes or until macaroni is tender. Remove from heat. Stir in cheese sauce. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef, onion and green pepper. drain. add tomato sauce, water, chili powder and chili powder. bring to a boil. stir in macaroni. reduce heat. cover and simmer 20 minutes or until macaroni is tender. top with cheese.

Ingredients: 4 cups or 1 lb potatoes, peeled, 3 cups or 1 lb leeks or yellow onions, 2 qts. water, 1 tbsp salt, 8 tbsp whipping cream, 3 tbsp. chopped parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first 4 ingredients and simmer 40-50 minutes until vegetables are tender. Mash vegetables with a fork. Serve in individual bowls. Stir in 1 tbsp. or whipping cream and garnish with parsley. This soup is also excellent served cold.
GeneratedRecipe: cook leeks and onions in water until tender. add potatoes, parsley, salt and whipping cream. cook until potatoes are tender.

Ingredients: 1 ripe avocado, 1/4 c. vegetable oil, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 clove garlic, 1/2 tsp. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. dry mustard, 3 large navel oranges, 1 small red onion, 1 head bibb lettuce, separated into halves, 2 Tbsp. sliced ripe olives
ReferenceRecipe: Halve avocado; remove pit and peel. Slice avocado into container of electric blender; add oil, lemon juice, garlic, sugar, salt and mustard. Cover; whirl until smooth. Serve with remaining dressing.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine avocado, oranges, olives, onion, lemon juice, sugar, oil, mustard, salt and garlic. cover and chill.

Ingredients: 2 sticks margarine, 1 c. peanut butter (creamy or crunchy), 4 Tbsp. cocoa, 2 Tbsp. vanilla, 3 1/2 c. powdered sugar

GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine and peanut butter in a saucepan over low heat. remove from heat. stir in vanilla, powdered sugar and cocoa. mix well. spread in a 9 x 13-inch pan. chill until firm. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 cup margarine, 2 cups of sugar, 6 eggs, 1 box (12 oz.) vanilla wafers, crushed (approximately 4 cups), 1/2 cup milk, 1 7 oz. box flaked coconut, 1 cup chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Cream margarine and sugar. Add 6 eggs one at a time, beat well after each addition. Add to above; vanilla wafers, crushed, 1/2 cup milk, Flaked coconut, chopped pecans. Pour into greased and floured tube. Bake at 275 for 1 1/2 hours or till done.
GeneratedRecipe: preheat oven to 350 degrees. combine milk, margarine and sugar in mixing bowl. add eggs. beat well. add crushed wafers, pecans, 1/2 cup coconut and pecans. mix well and pour into a greased and floured 9x13 pan. bake for 30 minutes. beat the remaining 1/4 c. sugar and margarine until light and bubbly. add the vanilla wafers and spread evenly over the cookies. bake 15 minutes more. cool completely before serving.

Ingredients: 6 oz. chocolate chips, 6 oz. butterscotch chips, 2 c. small marshmallows, 1/2 c. peanuts
ReferenceRecipe: Microwave chocolate and butterscotch chips 2 to 3 minutes. Stir in marshmallows and peanuts. Pour in 8 x 8-inch pan. Refrigerate until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: melt chocolate chips and butterscotch chips in saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. remove from heat. blend in marshmallows and peanuts. spread in buttered 8 x 8-inch pan. chill until firm. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. cornstarch, 2/3 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 2 1/2 c. milk, 3 egg yolks, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 c. peanut butter
ReferenceRecipe: Scald 2 cups milk with butter. Combine all other ingredients except peanut butter. Gradually add scalded milk. Cook until thickened. Remove from heat and add peanut butter. Pour into baked pie shell. Top with meringue. Bake until browned.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cornstarch and salt. add milk and egg yolks. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick. remove from heat. add butter and vanilla. pour into baked pie shell. top with meringue.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. honey, 1/2 c. chopped nuts, English muffins
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together. Toast muffin; spread with margarine, then with cheese mixture. Cut in half. Delicious!
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese and honey together. stir in nuts. spread on english muffins and freeze. cut into quarters. broil until browned.

Ingredients: 2/3 c. butter, 1 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1 (1 lb.) box confectioners 10x sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in pan; then add brown sugar and milk. Heat to boiling. Boil for 5 minutes; then cool for 10 minutes. After cooled, add confectioners sugar until smooth; then add vanilla. Beat until spreading consistency.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in saucepan. add brown sugar and milk. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. boil 1 minute. remove from heat. add 10x sugar and vanilla. beat until spreading consistency.

Ingredients: 3 or 4 potatoes, 1 medium onion, 3 or 4 Tbsp. bacon drippings
ReferenceRecipe: Dice potatoes. Cut onions. Add seasoning and cook potatoes until they are done.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and slice potatoes. place in skillet with bacon drippings. cover and cook over medium heat until potatoes are tender. add onion and cook until tender.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 to 3 lb. ground chuck or sirloin, 3 to 4 large onions, chopped, 3 c. raw rice, 6 c. water, 1/2 stick butter, 1 Tbsp. salt or to taste, 1 tsp. black pepper or to taste, 1/2 tsp. beef bouillon granules, 2 medium size cabbage heads
ReferenceRecipe: In large skillet, saute onion in butter or margarine until golden. Rinse rice under cold water; drain. Add 6 cups water to 2-quart pot. GeneratedRecipe: cook rice as directed on package, using 3 tablespoons of water and 1 tablespoon of salt and pepper and let stand for 5 minutes. brown meat in 1/2 stick of butter. add onions and cook until tender. add ground chuck and cook about 10 minutes. add rice and water. cook about 1/2 hour on low heat. if desired, add a little water. when cabbage is tender, add bouillon granules and mix well. add cabbage and bring back to a boil. stir until the cabbage is soft and water has absorbed.

Ingredients: 6 medium potatoes, peeled and cut up, 2 small carrots, diced, 6 ribs celery, diced, 2 qt. water, 1 onion, finely chopped, 3 Tbsp. bacon fat, 6 Tbsp. flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 1/2 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: In large pot, cook potatoes, carrots and celery in water until tender, about 20 to 30 minutes. Drain, reserving liquid and setting vegetables aside. Add 1 cup or more of reserved cooking liquid until soup is desired consistency.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes, carrots, celery and onion in fat until tender. add water, salt and pepper. cover and simmer until vegetables are tender. blend flour and milk; stir into soup. cook and stir until thickened.

Ingredients: 2 boxes powdered sugar, 1 stick margarine, 1 can coconut, 1/4 lb. paraffin, 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 4 c. pecans, 2 (12 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips
ReferenceRecipe: Melt margarine and pour over nuts. Combine milk, sugar and coconut. Add nuts and form into balls. Let set for 4 to 6 hours or overnight. Melt chocolate and paraffin over hot water.
