GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, margarine, milk and coconut. roll into small balls. melt chocolate chips and paraffin in double boiler. dip balls in chocolate mixture. place on wax paper to cool.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sirloin steak, cut into strips, 1/2 c. water, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 envelope onion soup mix, 1 (14 oz.) can stewed tomatoes, 2 Tbsp. flour, 2 c. cooked rice
ReferenceRecipe: You will need one large oven bag.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour and pepper. roll beef strips in flour mixture and brown. place in crock-pot. add tomatoes, onion soup mix, tomatoes and water. cover and cook on low for 8 hours. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 1/4 Tbsp. butter, 1 pkg. Alfredo sauce mix, 1 c. lite nonfat milk, 1 c. frozen peas, thawed, 6 1/2 oz. smoked salmon, 1/2 lb. spicy red pasta, cooked
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in medium saucepan over low heat. Stir in milk and Alfredo sauce. Mix well. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer 5 minutes. Mix in peas, salmon and pasta. Heat about 2 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in large skillet, over medium heat, heat butter, smoked salmon and alfredo sauce, spicy milk. stir in peas and salmon. serve over hot noodles.

Ingredients: 4 c. chopped chicken, 2 c. sharp grated cheese, 16 oz. kidney beans, rinsed, medium onion or green onion, 2 Tbsp. chopped red and green pepper, 4 oz. green chili pepper, 1 pkg. taco mix, 1/2 c. sour cream, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, corn chips, lettuce, tomatoes
ReferenceRecipe: Stir taco seasoning mix with mayo and sour cream. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients. Refrigerate four hours. Serve over lettuce. Add corn chips and tomatoes. Serves 8.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken in salted water about 25 minutes. drain off water and cool. in a large mixing bowl, combine chicken, onion, pepper, chili mix and tomatoes. in medium bowl, mix mayonnaise with sour cream mixture. pour 1/2 the mixture over the bean mixture. add cheese, tomatoes, green pepper and corn chips. chill before serving.

Ingredients: 1 c. milk, 1 c. peanut butter, 1/2 c. honey
ReferenceRecipe: Mix well. Place over very low heat until mixture is smooth and creamy.
GeneratedRecipe: mix honey and peanut butter in saucepan. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. remove from heat. add peanut butter. stir until smooth. pour into buttered pan. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 medium can crushed pineapple (undrained), 1/2 c. sugar, 2 eggs, beaten, 1/4 c. water, 3 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 c. diced apples, 1/2 c. chopped nuts, 1 c. whipped cream
ReferenceRecipe: Cook pineapple, sugar, eggs, water and lemon juice on low heat until thick. Chill. Stir in apples, nuts and whipped cream. Pour into 8 x 10-inch glass dish. Freeze until firm. Let stand 10 minutes at room temperature before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: combine pineapple, eggs and sugar in saucepan; stir well. add water. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until custard comes to a boil. cool. stir in apples, nuts and lemon juice. fold in whipped cream. chill. makes 6 to 8 servings.

Ingredients: 2 (6 oz.) cans white crabmeat, 1/2 c. ketchup, 2 Tbsp. chili sauce, 1 tsp. prepared mustard, 2 tsp. horseradish
ReferenceRecipe: Drain crab; shred in bowl. Add all ingredients and mix. If not moist enough, add more chili sauce. Chill in fridge. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: in a medium bowl, combine chili sauce and chili sauce; stir until smooth. add remaining ingredients. heat, stirring occasionally. serve with corn chips or crackers.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. cocoa, 1 stick margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 3 c. oatmeal, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar, cocoa, margarine and milk. Bring to a boil and cook 1 minute. Add rest of ingredients and mix well. Spoon onto wax paper and let stand until firm. Add nuts if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa, milk and margarine in saucepan. bring to a boil. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat. add peanut butter, vanilla and oatmeal. mix well. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. salt pork, 1 sliced onion, 3 c. diced, pared potatoes, 2 c. boiling water, 1 1/2 c. canned corn, 2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 qt. milk, 1/4 tsp. paprika
ReferenceRecipe: In soup pot, cook salt pork, stirring occasionally until brown and crisp. Remove pork bits. (Instead of pork fat you can use 2 tablespoons butter.) To pork fat, add onion and cook until tender, stirring occasionally. Add potatoes and boiling water; cover. Simmer about 10 minutes or until potatoes are fork-tender. Add corn, salt, pepper, milk and pork fat; heat well on low. Serve sprinkled with paprika. Serve 6.
GeneratedRecipe: brown pork in boiling water. add potatoes, onion, salt, pepper and paprika. cover and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes. add milk and corn. heat thoroughly.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cooked shrimp (save a few to decorate top), 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, salt and pepper to taste, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/4 c. catsup, 4 to 5 Tbsp. minced onion
ReferenceRecipe: Let cream cheese soften until workable. Mix all ingredients together well by hand. Shape into ball. Decorate top with whole shrimp. Chill at least 2 hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese, catsup, onion, worcestershire sauce, salt and pepper. add shrimp and mix well. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 2 c. potatoes, grated in food processor, 1 egg plus 1 egg white, beaten, 2 Tbsp. whole wheat pastry flour, 1/8 tsp. baking powder, salt and pepper, if desired, onion juice, chopped onion or onion flakes (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls and saute until browned. Often served with warm applesauce.
GeneratedRecipe: combine potatoes, onion, egg, flour, baking powder, salt and pepper. stir until blended. drop by heaping teaspoonfuls into hot oil and brown on both sides. serve hot with applesauce. makes 6 to 8.

Ingredients: 1 whole fryer, 1 Tbsp. margarine, 3 c. self-rising flour, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 3 Tbsp. margarine, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Boil chicken; remove meat from bones. Add 1 tablespoon margarine to broth and meat.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until tender. remove from bone and cut into bite size pieces. mix flour, salt and pepper. melt margarine in a large skillet. add chicken and brown on both sides. add soup. cover and cook over low heat for 45 minutes or until chicken is tender.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. chopped onions, 3 to 4 cloves minced garlic, 1/4 to 1/8 c. dill weed (fresh) or 1 Tbsp. dry, 1/4 tsp. fresh milled black pepper, 1 large can crushed tomatoes plus 1 can water, 1 Tbsp. honey, 2 fresh tomatoes, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onions and garlic in oil in soup pot until soft. Add tomatoes, dill, pepper, honey and water. Cover and cook over low heat at a slow simmer for about an hour or 45 minutes. You can serve this with a dollop of nonfat yogurt.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onions and garlic in oil until onion is translucent. add tomatoes and water. bring to a boil. reduce heat. cover and simmer until tomatoes are done, about 30 minutes. add honey. simmer 10 minutes or until thick.

Ingredients: 1 box Triscuits, 1 jar pizza sauce, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. shredded Mozzarella cheese, 1 pkg. pepperoni
ReferenceRecipe: Place Triscuits on a cookie sheet. Spread pizza sauce on Triscuits. Put pepperoni on top of sauce. Top with Mozzarella cheese. Place under broiler until cheese is bubbly. Serve hot.
GeneratedRecipe: cut triscuits in half. put in microwave-safe casserole. add shredded mozzarella cheese. spread pizza sauce on triscuits. cover and cook in microwave for 6 minutes. makes 1 serving.

Ingredients: 4 bacon strips, diced, 5 c. shredded cabbage, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/2 c. water, 1/3 c. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper
ReferenceRecipe: In a large skillet, cook bacon until crisp. Remove and set aside. Saute cabbage and onion in drippings until tender. Add remaining ingredients; stir until thickened. Stir in bacon. Serve warm. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: cook bacon until crisp; remove from pan. add onion and cook until tender. stir in flour, brown sugar, salt and pepper. add vinegar and water. cook and stir until thickened. add cabbage and bacon. heat thoroughly.

Ingredients: 1 egg white, few grains salt, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 egg yolk, 1/2 c. cream, whipped, 1 tsp. vanilla or 1 Tbsp. sherry flavoring
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg white with salt until stiff. Beat in sugar gradually. Add egg yolk and beat until thick. Fold in whipped cream and flavoring. Serve soon after making.
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg white until frothy; add sugar and beat until light and fluffy. add salt and vanilla flavoring. beat in egg yolk. fold in whipped cream.

Ingredients: 1 (10 to 12 oz.) bag vegetable pasta spirals, 1/2 c. each red and green bell peppers, chopped, 1/2 bunch green onions, chopped, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. reduced shredded cheese, 1 (8 oz.) bottle no-fat Ranch dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Cook pasta as directed on the package. Add peppers and onions, mixing well. Chill pasta mixture for 2 or more hours (overnight is best). Add cheese and dressing to pasta. Mix and chill for at least 30 minutes more, then serve. This is great with any meat or by itself. Yields 10 servings, 131 calories, 1 g. fat.
GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta according to package directions. drain and rinse with cold water. in a large bowl, combine pasta, green peppers, onions and spirals. add dressing and cheese. mix well. chill.

Ingredients: 1 head iceberg lettuce or 1/2 spinach and 1/2 head lettuce, 1 Tbsp. fresh parsley, chopped, 1 c. chopped celery, 2 green onions, chopped, 1 can mandarin oranges, drained, 1/4 c. slivered almonds, browned in 1 tsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients in	a bowl, cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: toss lettuce, celery, oranges, onions and parsley together. add butter and parsley. toss lightly. add almonds just before serving.

Ingredients: 2 lb. small new potatoes, 2 hard-cooked eggs, sliced, 1/2 tsp. dill weed, 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1/2 lb. kielbasa, diced, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1/3 c. cider vinegar, 1 (10 3/4 oz.) can condensed chicken broth, 1/3 c. water, sliced pimento-stuffed olives
ReferenceRecipe: In a 4-quart saucepan, place potatoes; add water to cover. Over high heat, heat to boiling. Reduce heat to low. Cover; simmer 20 to 30 minutes until fork-tender. Drain. Cool slightly. Cut potatoes into slices.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and cube potatoes; place in large bowl. cover with water; chill. in a large skillet, cook potatoes in hot oil for 10 minutes. meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine condensed milk, flour and sugar. stir until well blended. add to potatoes with olives, eggs, kielbasa and onions. mix well. add dill weed and kielbasa; toss gently. cover and chill.

Ingredients: 3 qt. water, 1 1/2 c. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. salt, 1 large garlic bulb, 5 or more pieces dill, 1/2 chopped onion, 1 Tbsp. mustard seed, 1 Tbsp. dry mustard, cucumbers
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water, vinegar and salt to a boil. Pack cucumbers in gallon jar with remaining ingredients. Fill spaces in jar with dill. Pour boiling water over pickles. Wipe off rim and tighten lid. Flip over on lid to seal. Let cool and refrigerate at least one week before eating.
GeneratedRecipe: bring to a boil the vinegar, water, mustard seed, garlic salt and mustard seed. pour over cucumbers and onions. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 lb. stew beef, boiled and chopped, 1 large onion, chopped, 1/2 c. medium salsa, 1 pkg. corn tortillas (fresh) *, 1 1/2 c. Monterey Jack, shredded, 1/2 c. Mozzarella, shredded, salad oil, chopped lettuce, chopped tomato, sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: *In the dairy case.
GeneratedRecipe: heat oil in a large skillet. add beef and onion. cook until meat is browned and onion is tender. stir in salsa. heat to boiling. reduce heat to low. cover and simmer for 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 qt. whole milk, 1 pt. buttermilk, 6 eggs, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Using a heavy pan, heat milk to near boiling. Have eggs beaten until blended well. Add buttermilk, salt and sugar. Beat again until blended and slowly pour into hot milk, stirring slowly (preferably with a wooden spoon). Allow to heat again a few minutes, stirring slowly until it starts to separate (that's the secret). When whey starts to form, put in a fine wire strainer to drain. After drained, set in refrigerator to chill. Serve with bread and syrup or plain with syrup.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs and salt until foamy. add milk and sugar. beat until thick. add vanilla and pour into ice cream maker.

Ingredients: 48 graham crackers, 1 c. brown sugar, 1 (6 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips, 1 1/2 sticks margarine, 3/4 c. pecans, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Line graham crackers in jelly roll pan. Sprinkle pecans and chocolate chips over crackers. Boil margarine and sugar for 2 minutes. Pour over crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: line a 9 x 13-inch pan with whole graham crackers. mix brown sugar, margarine and pecans in a saucepan. bring to a boil and boil for 5 minutes. pour over crackers. sprinkle with chocolate chips. cover with another layer of crackers. melt chocolate chips and spread over top. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. stew meat, cut in small pieces, 1 (14 oz.) can diced tomatoes, 2 cloves garlic, crushed, 2 Tbsp. cumin, ground, 1 tsp. black pepper, 1 medium onion, diced
ReferenceRecipe: Combine meat, garlic, onion, pepper and cumin. Mix well and refrigerate 2 hours. Brown meats and spices until done. Add tomatoes with juice and simmer 20 to 30 minutes. Serve over steamed rice.
GeneratedRecipe: brown meat and drain. add onion, garlic, cumin, black pepper and tomatoes. simmer for 1 hour. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 can white tuna (spring water packed), 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 Tbsp. or less grated onion, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 1/2 pkg. plain Knox gelatine, 1/2 c. cold water
ReferenceRecipe: Heat soup; dissolve the softened cream cheese in soup. Add gelatine which has been dissolved in the cold water; set aside to cool, then add all other ingredients. Pour into oblong pan (12 x 8-inch). Sprinkle with paprika. Keep refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: mix gelatine with cold water. heat soup in soup. add cheese and blend. stir until dissolved. add celery, onion and mayonnaise to soup. mix well. pour into mold. chill overnight. serve on lettuce with crackers.

Ingredients: regular brownie mix, 2 c. confectioners sugar, 2 Tbsp. creme de menthe, 1 stick margarine, 1 c. chocolate chips, 3/4 stick margarine, 1 tsp. creme de menthe
ReferenceRecipe: Prepare brownie mix using a 9 x 13-inch pan. Beat together confectioners sugar, 2 tablespoons creme de menthe and 1 stick margarine until cream. Frost brownies with it. Melt together chocolate chips, 3/4 stick margarine and 1 teaspoon creme de menthe; mix together until well blended. Frost over the confectioners sugar frosting. Cool at least one hour before cutting.
GeneratedRecipe: mix and bake according to directions: combine crushed brownie mix, margarine and creme de menthe, confectioners sugar, then pour into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.

Ingredients: 14 oz. pkg. dry green split peas, 12 oz. pkg. pearl barley, 14 oz. pkg. alphabet macaroni, 12 oz. pkg. lentils, 1 1/2 c. brown rice, 4 c. dry minced onion
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients in a large airtight container. Stir to evenly distribute ingredients. Label container. Store in a cool dry place. Use within 6 months. Shake before using. Makes about 12 1/2 cups of mix.
GeneratedRecipe: in a dutch oven, combine lentils, barley, peas, onion and barley. bring to boil. cover and simmer 15 minutes. stir in rice and macaroni. cook, covered, for 5 minutes; stir. makes 5 cups.

Ingredients: 12 c. flour, 4 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 1/2 c. fat
ReferenceRecipe: Sift together flour, baking powder and salt. Use a pastry blender and cut in fat that is firm at room temperature until mixture looks like coarse cornmeal. Store in tightly covered jar or can. (This will keep about 3 months.)
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, baking powder and salt. cut in fat until mixture resembles coarse meal. add enough water to make a soft dough. roll out on floured board and cut into strips. drop into boiling chicken broth. cover and cook 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. chopped dried apricots, 2 1/2 c. dried bread cubes (2 1/2 slices), 1/3 c. white sugar, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 2 c. low-fat milk, 1 c. Second Nature, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Soak apricots in milk for 15 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine the apricots cubes, apricots, white sugar, cinnamon, vanilla and vanilla. toss to coat; set aside. in a 4-cup glass measure, combine bread cubes, milk, cinnamon and nature low-fat milk. stir over low heat until melted. pour over bread.

Ingredients: 3/4 lb. beef roast, 1 tsp. vegetable oil, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 3/4 cup water, 2 carrots, sliced, 4 baby onions, 2 potatoes, peeled and quartered
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat in hot oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add water and cover and simmer for one hour. Add vegetables and simmer another hour.
GeneratedRecipe: in a 5-quart dutch oven, in hot oil, cook roast for 3 1/2 hours on each side over medium coals or until browned. turn and brown other side. spoon off drippings. season with pepper, onions and carrots and stir into meat. cover. return meat to skillet. cook over low heat for about 2 hours or until beef is tender. stir potatoes, onions, vegetables and carrots; cover and steam 5 minutes longer.

Ingredients: 2 lb. Hamburg, 1 can Peas, 1 can whole Tomatoes, 1/2 lb. Noodles, 1 Onion
ReferenceRecipe: In large sauce pan, brown hamburg. Slice onion very thin over hamburg. Simmer covered for 5 minutes. Place peas on top of hamburg. Cook and drain noodles and place on top of hamburg/onion mixture then adding tomatoes. Put butter pieces over tomatoes. Simmer again uncovered on very low heat for about 10 minutes. It's a good casserole. Serves 6 people.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburg and onion; drain. add tomatoes and peas. cook noodles until tender. add salt and pepper to taste.

Ingredients: 1 cup oatmeal, 1 stick margarine, 1 1/2 cups boiling water, 2 eggs, 1 cup brown sugar, 1 cup white sugar, 1 1/3 cups flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 1/2 tsp. salt, Nuts or raisins as desired
ReferenceRecipe: All first 3 ingredients to stand in small bowl for 20 minutes. In another bowl, mix all other ingredients. Then stir in cooled oatmeal mixture. Add nuts or fruit if you like at bake in a 9x9 inch pan for 35 minutes or until done. Serves 6-9.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine; add brown sugar, raisins and boiling water. let cool. beat together the flour, baking soda, soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt. add to the creamed mixture. add raisins, nuts and raisins. pour into greased loaf pan. bake 1 hour at 350 degrees.

Ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) canned or fresh crabmeat, 1 (16 oz.) canned or fresh shrimp, 1 medium green pepper, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. celery, chopped, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 c. or more mayonnaise, saltine crackers, crushed and tossed with butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients, except cracker crumbs. Blend well. Place in baking dish; sprinkle buttered cracker crumbs evenly over casserole. Bake 25 to 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: combine crabmeat, celery, green pepper, onion and celery; saute until done. add mayonnaise and shrimp. add salt and pepper. mix well. serve on crackers.

Ingredients: 2 lb. lean ground beef, 3/4 c. milk, 1 1/2 c. soft bread crumbs, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 carrot, diced, 1 small onion, diced, 2 eggs, beaten, 1/4 c. catsup, 3 Tbsp. brown sugar, 3 Tbsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients except catsup, brown sugar and mustard. Put in 9 x 5-inch loaf pan. Use remaining ingredients for topping.
GeneratedRecipe: mix beef, bread crumbs, milk, eggs, carrot, pepper, onion and mustard. shape into small balls, brown in hot fat. combine remaining ingredients and pour over meatballs. cook over low heat for 1 hour.

Ingredients: 2 lb. lean ground beef, 1/2 c. old-fashioned chili sauce, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/8 tsp. Tabasco sauce, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1/4 tsp. mustard, 1 Tbsp. minced onions, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 1/2 tsp. mushroom flavoring
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together. Shape into 8 patties. Chill. Brown over charcoal fire or broil on rack in broiling pan. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together all ingredients. shape into balls. brown in hot oil. drain on paper towels. add sauce and simmer for 30 minutes. serve over spaghetti.

Ingredients: 2 c. plain flour, 1 1/2 tsp. soda, 1 tsp. salt, 2 c. sugar, 2 grated carrots, 1/2 c. chopped pecans, 2 tsp. baking powder, 2 tsp. cinnamon, 4 eggs, 1 1/2 c. oil, 1 small can crushed pineapple, drained, 1/2 c. flaked coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Sift together the dry ingredients. Mix eggs, oil, and sugar. Add dry ingredients a little at a time and beat well after each addition. Fold in carrots, pineapple, and nuts. Bake at 350 degrees in three 9 inch cake pans.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, baking powder, soda, salt and cinnamon. add sugar, oil, eggs and carrots. mix well. add pineapple, carrots and pecans.

Ingredients: 1 1/4 lb. ground beef, 1 green pepper, 1 onion, 2 cloves garlic, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, salt, 1 can tomato paste, 1 can creamed corn, 1 can ripe olives and juice, 1/4 lb. grated cheese, 1 pkg. broad noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat, pepper, onion and garlic in hot shortening or oil. Add tomato paste and other vegetables and let simmer about 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: saute beef and onion in heavy skillet. stir in green pepper. add tomato juice ( add water or tomato paste ), garlic, creamed olives, salt and pepper. bring to a boil and boil 2 minutes. cook noodles and mix in corn until done. add cheese and let melt. cook spaghetti as desired. serve with cheese and worcestershire sauce.

Ingredients: 8 oz. Cool Whip, 12 oz. cottage cheese (small curd), small box strawberry jello, 15 oz. fruit cocktail, drained, cut up banana
ReferenceRecipe: Do not add water. Mix jello, cottage cheese and Cool Whip, then add fruit cocktail and banana. Mix well and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cool whip, cottage cheese and jello and let stand for 1 hour. fold in drained fruit cocktail and banana. add dry jello and blend. chill 1 hour before serving.

Ingredients: 1 stick butter, 1 small bunch green onions, chopped, 1/2 c. finely chopped parsley, 2 Tbsp. flour, 1 pt. breakfast cream, 1/2 lb. grated Swiss cheese, 1 Tbsp. sherry wine or Zinfandel wine, red pepper to taste, salt to taste, 1 lb. white crabmeat, few drops of Tabasco
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in heavy pot and saute onions and parsley. Blend in flour, cream and cheese until cheese is melted. Add other ingredients and gently fold in crabmeat. This may be served in a chafing dish with Melba toast or in pastry shells.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onions in butter. add flour to make a paste. add cream and cream. add tabasco, parsley, salt and pepper. add cheese; stir and cook until cheese melts and add crabmeat. serves 4 to 6.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) jar pepperoncini (salad peppers), drained and stemmed, 8 oz. cream cheese, 1/4 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in food processor. Serve with crackers. Good and zingy.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese until fluffy. blend in sour cream, peppers and cheese. serve with taco chips.

Ingredients: 4 c. hot tap water, 1/4 c. Ivory liquid
ReferenceRecipe: Mix gently and let stand of 1 hour before using. (I sometimes add food coloring for fun.)
GeneratedRecipe: pour hot water over ivory tap tap water. stir until dissolved. add ivory tap water and stir.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. boxed scalloped potatoes, 1 (7 to 8 oz.) can minced clams, drained, 1 Tbsp. shredded green onion, 2 1/2 c. milk, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 Tbsp. freeze dried green pepper
ReferenceRecipe: In large saucepan, mix potatoes slices, sauce mix, water and milk called for on package, clam liquor, green onion and green pepper. Heat to boil, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 25 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Stir in clams, milk and butter. Heat through.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes in boiling salted water until tender. drain and set aside. saute onion and green pepper in butter. add clams, milk and freeze.

Ingredients: 1 (12 oz.) can frozen orange juice, 1 (12 oz.) can frozen lemonade, 1 (46 oz.) can unsweetened pineapple juice, 1 qt. ginger ale
ReferenceRecipe: Dilute	frozen	juice as directed on can. Add pineapple juice and mix. At serving time, add ginger ale. Yields 40 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients, except ginger ale. add ginger ale just before serving. serves 50 to 60.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1/4 c. chopped green pepper, 1/4 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. butter, 2 c. cornbread stuffing mix, 1 c. chopped cooked shrimp, 1/4 c. mayonnaise or salad dressing, 1 Tbsp. snapped parsley, dash of cayenne pepper, 2 Tbsp. melted butter
ReferenceRecipe: Cook celery, green pepper and onion in butter until tender. Prepare stuffing mix. Stir in vegetables, shrimp, mayo, parsley and cayenne.
GeneratedRecipe: cook cornbread according to package directions. drain and cool. combine shrimp, celery, green pepper, onion and parsley. add mayonnaise, salad dressing and cayenne pepper. mix well.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1 c. hot water, 2 tsp. maple extract, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Melt sugar in hot water. Bring to boil and remove from heat. Stir in vanilla and maple flavoring.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar and hot water in saucepan. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. boil for 5 minutes. remove from heat. add maple extract and vanilla. serve warm.

Ingredients: 3 to 4 lb. venison roast, 3 c. diced potatoes, 2 c. sliced carrots, 1 medium onion, sliced, 1 pkg. Schilling brand pot roast seasons with roasting bag, 1 c. water (additional, not optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Place trimmed and boned roast inside roasting bag; add seasonings, potatoes, carrots and onion. Add water per package directions, then add additional water. (Venison has no marbled fat, so will cook drier.) Seal roasting bag closed.
GeneratedRecipe: put venison in crock-pot. cover with water and cook all night. when done, remove meat. add the onion and potatoes and cook until tender. then add the potatoes and schilling. stir and cook another 10 to 10 minutes to cook, then serve.

Ingredients: 6 oz. pkg. blackberry jello, 2 c. boiling water, 1 can blueberries, 1 can crushed pineapple, 8 oz. sour cream, 8 oz. cream cheese, 2/3 c. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, chopped nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve jello in 2 cups boiling water. Drain blueberries and pineapple. Save juices. Combine the two juices and measure 1/2 cup to add to the jello mixture. Refrigerate jello and let set partially, then add the drained blueberries and pineapple. Let set until firm. Then combine sour cream, cream cheese, sugar and vanilla. Whip together. Spread on top of jello. Sprinkle with nuts, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water. add blueberries, pineapple and nuts. chill until firm. mix cream cheese, sour cream, sugar and vanilla. spread on top of congealed salad.

Ingredients: 1 small onion, diced, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 pkg. French's Chili-O seasoning, 16 oz. can stewed tomatoes, 2 (14 oz.) cans pinto beans, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef in skillet with onion; drain. Stir in remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil and simmer 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
GeneratedRecipe: brown together beef, onion and chili-o mix. add seasoning and water. simmer for 20 to 25 to 30 minutes. add tomatoes and beans. simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. fish fillets (cod, haddock, sole, flounder), 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. wheat germ, 2 shallots, chopped, 1 1/2 Tbsp. cold pressed oil, 2 1/2 Tbsp. butter, 3 Tbsp. parsley, minced, 1 lemon, cut into wedges
ReferenceRecipe: Dip fish in milk, then in wheat germ. Saute shallots in oil and butter in a skillet for 2 minutes, then add the fish. Cook briefly, 3 minutes on one side and 2 on the other. Do	not cook until the fish is dry and comes apart. When serving, toss minced parsley over. Add lemon wedges on the side.	Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: in a heavy skillet, saute sliced shallots in 2 teaspoons oil. remove from heat and add shallots and saute for 5 minutes. remove fish to warm serving platter and set aside. mix milk, lemon wedges, fish and shallots in a saucepan and bring to a boil. add fish and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes until fish flakes easily with a fork. pour over fillets and garnish with parsley.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. real butter, 3/4 c. sugar, 3 sq. unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled, 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 eggs, 1 chocolate wafer crust, graham cracker crust or regular crust, whipped cream
ReferenceRecipe: In mixing bowl, cream the butter; gradually add sugar. Cream until light and fluffy. Blend in unsweetened chocolate and vanilla. Add eggs, one at a time, beating 3 minutes after each addition (medium speed). Turn filling into chocolate wafer crust, graham cracker crust or regular crust. Chill several hours. Top with whipped cream.
GeneratedRecipe: cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. add chocolate and vanilla. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. fold in whipped cream. pour into graham cracker crust and chill.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger meat (80% to 90% lean), 2 cans Ranch Style beans, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. chili powder, 1 tsp. garlic powder
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat and drain. Mix beans, meat, onion, garlic and chili powder. Cook in crock-pot. Simmer for about 30 minutes (low).
GeneratedRecipe: cook hamburger meat and onion until done. drain. add chili powder and garlic powder. add beans and 90 % of beans. cook about 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 c. raisins, 1 c. pitted dates, 1 c. pitted prunes, 1 c. dried apricots, 1 c. nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Grind in food processor. Mix well and roll in powdered sugar or chopped nuts. Or mix with 1 tablespoon orange juice, or 1/4 cup honey, 3 tablespoons butter and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla (mixed and barely warmed). Then roll in nuts.
GeneratedRecipe: grind all ingredients and mix with milk. shape into rolls. roll in powdered sugar. makes 3 pound cakes.

Ingredients: 2 large or 3 medium potatoes, cubed, 2 c. water, 1/2 c. butter, 1/2 c. margarine, 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1/4 c. chopped onions, 1 c. flour, 4 tsp. granular chicken bouillon or 4 crushed chicken bouillon cubes, 6 c. cold milk, 1/2 lb. shredded or small cubed Cheddar cheese, 1 c. cubed ham (if desired)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook potatoes until tender in water, but do not overcook. Saute onions and celery in melted butter and margarine. Add flour and chicken bouillon and stir to blend. Add milk and stir until thick and smooth. Add cooked potato cubes and their cooking liquid. Add and stir in Cheddar cheese until it melts. If desired, add ham. Season with white pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes, celery, onions and ham in butter in a dutch oven until celery are tender. add water and bouillon cubes. simmer for 10 to 12 minutes or until potatoes are tender. blend in flour until smooth; cook until thickened. stir in milk, bouillon and salt. cook, stirring constantly, until thickened. remove from heat and stir in cheese. cover and let stand until cheese melts and soup is slightly thickened. makes about 6 cups.

Ingredients: 2 medium cucumbers, peeled and diced, 1 1/4 lb. fresh tomatoes (about 4), peeled and diced, 1 small can diced green chilies, salt, 1 Tbsp. tomato puree, 1 large onion, chopped, 2 small red and green sweet peppers, diced, 1/2 c. wine vinegar, 4 c. cold water, 2 garlic cloves, minced, 2 c. bread crumbs, 4 Tbsp. olive oil
ReferenceRecipe: To save time, put all in a food processor and let it do the chopping. May add an avocado (diced) before serving. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour. Stir before serving and add chopped onions.
GeneratedRecipe: chop tomatoes, cucumbers and green peppers. peel chilies. combine with tomato puree, cucumbers and onion. combine with bread crumbs, water and garlic, salt and olive oil. add a few drops of red wine vinegar mixture to mixture. mix gently. pour into a buttered 2-quart serving bowl. top with bread crumbs. chill well before serving. serve at room temperature. makes 2 1/2 cups.

Ingredients: 15 graham cracker sq., 12 oz. peanut butter, 1 box 4x sugar, 2 sticks butter, 2 large Hershey bars (1/2 lb.)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all the ingredients together except the Hershey bars. Put mix in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Melt chocolate and spread over mixture. Crucial: You must refrigerate 45 minutes and then cut into bars.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter and sugar together. add peanut butter and graham crackers. mix thoroughly, then put in large baking dish. melt hershey bars and spread over graham crackers. let cool; cut in squares.

Ingredients: 1 bag vanilla wafers, crushed, 1 stick butter, melted, 1 small can frozen orange juice, 1 bag crushed pecans, 2 c. coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all 4 ingredients together well in bowl. Then spoon out and roll into balls. Take coconut and put 1 cup of coconut in two small bowls. Color with food coloring, if desired, and then roll ball in it. Place on dish and keep chilled until you serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix crushed vanilla wafers and pecans in blender and set aside to cool. combine all ingredients in saucepan. press mixture into a 9 x 13-inch pan. chill and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 lb. bulk sausage, 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 6 Tbsp. flour, 1 qt. milk, 1/2 tsp. poultry seasoning, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 1/4 tsp. salt, dash of hot pepper sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Cook crumbled sausage; drain on paper towels. Stir in onion; cook until transparent. Stir in flour and a little of the milk. Stir and cook over medium heat for 6 minutes. Stir in the rest of the milk. Add seasonings; cook until thickened. Serve over fresh baked biscuits. Enjoy.
GeneratedRecipe: brown sausage in large skillet. drain off fat. add onion and cook until tender. stir in flour, salt, pepper, poultry seasoning and poultry seasoning. gradually stir in milk. cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.

Ingredients: 1 bunch broccoli, 1 lb. pasta (short or linguini), 1/2 to 3/4 c. olive oil, 3/4 c. basil leaves (fresh), chopped, salt and pepper to taste, 4 cloves garlic, 3/4 c. grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Cut and peel broccoli stems. Cut 1-inch pieces. Blanch a few minutes before flowerets. If flowerets are large, cut smaller. Chop garlic. Saute in oil until golden. Cook pasta. GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta according to package directions. drain and rinse with cold water. in a large skillet, saute garlic in olive oil until golden brown. add broccoli, basil, salt and pepper to taste. cook over medium heat until broccoli is tender. drain pasta and toss with sauce. sprinkle with parmesan cheese.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. crunchy peanut butter, 2 Tbsp. blackberry jelly, 2 slices Sunbeam bread
ReferenceRecipe: Take your bread and spread your jelly on both pieces of bread. Then spread peanut butter on top of the jelly. Smash the breads together and eat it!
GeneratedRecipe: spread peanut butter on one slice of bread. place a cherry slice on a slice of blackberry ( the other toast as a sandwich ). put a strip of bread in the peanut butter. cut each slice of bread into 4 or 5 pieces. place on a cookie sheet and place a cherry jelly sandwich on the top of one piece of the bread and place in microwave for 2 minutes on high until jelly is bubbly.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. sugar, 2 sticks margarine, 3 eggs, 2 1/2 c. plain flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 c. milk, 1 tsp. vanilla flavoring, 1/2 tsp. lemon flavoring, 1 1/2 c. chopped fig preserves, 1 tsp. cloves, 1 tsp. allspice, 1 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Cream margarine and sugar. Add eggs and beat. Add baking powder and flour which has been sifted together. Alternate with milk. Add flavorings. Mix well. GeneratedRecipe: cream margarine, sugar and eggs. sift flour, salt, baking powder, cloves, and baking powder together. add flavoring and lemon flavoring. mix well. alternate flour with liquid ingredients and fig mixture alternately with milk and flour. bake in greased and floured bundt pan until firm. remove from pan and frost with preserves.

Ingredients: 4 - 6 boneless chicken breasts, 1/2 c. flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. black pepper, 1/4 c. shortening, 1/2 c. celery, chopped, 1/4 c. onion, chopped, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 small jar pimentos, 3/4 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Mix flour, salt and pepper. Coat chicken in flour mixture. Heat shortening in skillet; brown chicken. Put browned chicken in baking dish. Set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: cut chicken into bite size pieces. place in flour, salt, black pepper and celery. brown in shortening. add onions, pimentos, water, and soup. cover. cook on low heat for 45 minutes. add pimentos, pimentos and chicken. cook 15 more minutes.

Ingredients: 1 pkg (6 oz, 1 c.) semi-sweet chocolate morsels, 1/4 c. peanut butter, 6 c. Crispix cereal, 1 c. powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: In large microwave bowl, melt chocolate on high for one minute. Stir and heat another 30 seconds on high or until melted. Stir in peanut better. Gently stir Crispix cereal into chocolate-peanut butter mixture until well coated. Place powdered sugar in 2 gallon freezer storage bag, add coated cereal to sugar and close bag. Gently toss cereal mixture until well coated. Store in air tight container in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: melt chocolate morsels and peanut butter in a large saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth. remove from heat. stir in cereal until well coated. pour cereal mixture into a large bowl. add powdered sugar; toss to coat well. store in airtight container.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 5 to 6 Tbsp. flour, 1 3/4 c. milk, 1/2 stick butter, 3 eggs, 5 to 6 Tbsp. cocoa, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Place on low heat until thickened. Pour in vanilla flavoring, then pour in cool, baked pie crust.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, flour and cocoa. add eggs and milk. cook until thick. add butter and vanilla. pour into baked pie shell. top with meringue.

Ingredients: 4 slices bacon, 1 onion, chopped, 1 rib celery, sliced, 1 carrot, diced, 3 c. cooked black-eyed beans, 1 c. bean liquid, 1/4 c. barbecue sauce, 1 tsp. prepared mustard, 1/2 c. green pepper, diced, 1 c. barbecue potato chips, coarsely crushed
ReferenceRecipe: In a large skillet, cook bacon strips until crisp. Remove from pan. Add onion, celery and carrot to drippings in pan and cook until tender, stirring frequently. Serve topped with bacon.
GeneratedRecipe: brown bacon in a large skillet or dutch oven; drain on paper towels. crumble meat. set aside. in skillet, saute celery, onion and green pepper. add bean liquid, barbecue sauce and mustard. cook and add beans; simmer for 10 minutes. stir in cooked bacon. add bacon and beans with liquid. heat thoroughly. garnish with potato chips. serves 4.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 onion, grated, 1/3 c. vinegar, 1 c. salad oil, 1 Tbsp. celery seed
ReferenceRecipe: Measure dry ingredients into a small mixing bowl. Mix sugar, salt and mustard and add onion juice and a small amount of vinegar. Add oil gradually, then remaining vinegar and celery seed.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, mustard, salt, vinegar and onion in blender. add oil and blend until smooth. add celery seed and onion.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, 1/2 c. milk, 1 (7 oz.) pkg. elbow macaroni, cooked and drained, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 (10 3/4 oz.) can condensed tomato soup, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. dried oregano, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: In a medium bowl, beat eggs. Add milk and macaroni. Pour into a greased 9 x 13 x 2-inch baking dish. Set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, cook beef and onion over medium heat until beef is browned and onion is tender. drain off fat. stir in soup, milk, salt, pepper, oregano and oregano.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. active dry yeast or 2 cakes yeast, 1/2 c. warm water (110~ to 115~), 3 1/2 c. water (85~), 10 to 12 c. Robin Hood flour, 1/4 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. salt, 1/4 c. soft shortening
ReferenceRecipe: In mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in water; add remaining water, sugar, salt, shortening and several cups flour. Beat with spoon until smooth and batter falls from spoon in sheets. Mix in (by hand) enough flour until dough cleans the bowl.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve yeast cakes in 1/2 cup warm water. in large bowl, combine yeast, sugar, salt, shortening, soft hood of flour, 1/2 cup of the water and 1 cup of the flour; beat until smooth. add rest of flour to make a soft dough.

Ingredients: 1 c. warm water, 1 pkg. yeast, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 1/3 c. salad oil, 3 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Place water, yeast, sugar, oil and salt in a large bowl. Add flour, a small amount at a time, until it makes a stiff dough that can be rolled out (may take more than 3 cups).
GeneratedRecipe: soften yeast in warm water ( room temperature ). combine flour, salt, sugar and salad oil; mix well. stir in yeast; beat with a large mixer. turn on medium speed until mixed. add flour, 1/2 cup flour, about 1/2 cup at a time. beat 2 minutes longer.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sharp cheese, shredded, 1 small onion, minced, 3 Tbsp. green pepper, minced, 1/2 c. pickles, minced (I use more), 1 Tbsp. pimento, minced, 1/4 c. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. salt, 1 small (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Roll into a ball and chill until serving. Can roll into ball with chopped pecans, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together cream cheese and onion, then add the rest of the ingredients. mold into a ball; then chill.

Ingredients: 1 lb. mushrooms (unpeeled), 1/2 medium onion, salt (to taste), pepper (to taste), 1 c. butter, 8 oz. (1 pkg.) cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Wash mushrooms and slice thin (both stems and caps). Add onions, salt and pepper. Bring to a boil. Turn off heat. Tightly cover pan and let sit for a few minutes (until mushrooms become limp), stirring frequently to prevent burning. Add butter.
GeneratedRecipe: wash mushrooms; remove stems and chop. saute onion in butter until tender. add flour, salt and pepper. cook until thick. add cream cheese and stir until melted.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. cream cheese, 1 cup mayonnaise, 1/2 cup marshmallows (cut up fine), 1 lb. strawberries chopped (can use frozen), 1 cup drained crushed pineapple, 1 small carton cool whip, 1 cup nuts (chopped)
ReferenceRecipe: Beat cream cheese and mayonnaise until fluffy. Add pineapple, strawberries, and nuts. Fold in marshmallows and cool whip. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together cream cheese, mayonnaise and marshmallows. add remaining ingredients. pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan and freeze. cut into squares and serve.

Ingredients: 1 medium potato, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 lb. powdered sugar or more, peanut butter (smooth or crunchy)
ReferenceRecipe: Have powdered sugar, butter and vanilla ready. Boil potato with skin on. Peel and mash while hot. Add butter and vanilla while potato is still hot. Spread with peanut butter and roll up like jelly roll. Slice off 1/2 inch slices. Candy should be refrigerated if not used at one sitting. At Christmas, red or green food coloring can be used.
GeneratedRecipe: boil potato until tender. peel and mash. add butter, vanilla and powdered sugar. roll out on floured board. spread with peanut butter. roll up and slice.

Ingredients: 2 c. clams, 1/2 c. celery, 1/2 c. onion, red and black pepper, 2 cloves garlic, Tabasco sauce, 1/4 lb. bacon, 1 c. clam broth, 1 c. bread crumbs, pinch of thyme, 1 Tbsp. parsley, 2 doz. clam shells
ReferenceRecipe: Chop clams, celery, onion and garlic in food processor or by hand, very finely. Cut bacon in slivers, fry; remove bacon and set aside. GeneratedRecipe: chop onion, celery and garlic. saute in bacon fat. add clam broth, tabasco sauce, thyme, thyme and tabasco sauce. simmer for 1 hour. add clams and bread crumbs.

Ingredients: 1 c. low-fat mayonnaise (I recommend Smart Beat), 1 tsp. each: onion, pimento, green pepper and dill pickle, chopped, 1 Tbsp. tomato sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve with chips or crackers. makes 2 cups. can be frozen.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. dried egg powder, 3 1/4 c. dry milk powder, 1/4 c. cocoa powder
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients thoroughly. Makes 4 cups mix.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients in a large bowl. store in an airtight container. use as a dip for hot chocolate, hot dog or vegetable. yield: 1 1/3 cups.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 2 pkg. (10 oz. each) Birds Eye broccoli with cheese sauce, 2 c. chicken broth, 1/2 c. heavy cream, pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onions in butter until tender, but not browned. Add vegetables with sauce, chicken broth, cream and pepper. Cook over medium heat until thoroughly heated, about 5 minutes. Makes 5 1/2 cups or 6 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion in the butter until soft. add chicken broth and bring to a boil. add broccoli; cook until tender. in a medium bowl, beat heavy cream with the cheese until smooth. add the pepper and salt. stir to mix.

Ingredients: 1 (15 oz.) can pink salmon, 1 egg, beaten, 1/4 c. buttermilk, 1/2 c. self-rising flour, 3 oz. shredded sharp Cheddar cheese, 1/4 c. vegetable oil
ReferenceRecipe: Flake salmon with a fork. Add milk, flour, egg and cheese, stirring well. Shape mixture into 6 patties. Heat oil in heavy skillet. Cook patties in oil over medium heat for 8 minutes or until golden brown, turning once.
GeneratedRecipe: drain salmon, reserving 1/4 cup liquid. combine salmon, cheese, flour and egg in a large bowl. stir well. stir in buttermilk and cheese. add salmon; mix well. shape into 6 patties. fry in hot oil until golden brown. drain on paper towels.

Ingredients: 7 oz. pasta (any kind), 1/2 c. ReferenceRecipe: Prepare pasta. Toss hot pasta with Italian dressing. Let stand. Prepare vegetables and pepperoni. Combine mayonnaise, mustard and dill weed. Set aside. Combine pasta and vegetables. GeneratedRecipe: prepare and prepare pasta following package directions. drain and chill. rinse pepperoni with cold water. add pepperoni, green pepper, cucumber, cucumber, cucumber, celery, green onions, tomatoes and green pepper. blend mayonnaise, mustard and salt. mix well. add to pasta mixture, toss lightly. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 1 quail or more, salt, pepper, 1 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Dress and split quail down the back, leaving breast together. Flatten out each bird with breast down and dust with salt and pepper on each side. Roll in flour. The residue left in skillet may be used to make a cream gravy.
GeneratedRecipe: cut quail into serving size pieces. sprinkle with salt and pepper. dredge in flour. fry in hot oil until golden brown.

Ingredients: 2 c. water, 2 1/2 c. sugar, 6 lemons, 2 oranges, grated rind of 1 orange, large handful fresh mint leaves or 3 Tbsp. dried mint
ReferenceRecipe: Place sugar and water in a saucepan and boil for 10 minutes. Squeeze juice from lemons and oranges. GeneratedRecipe: boil sugar and water for 5 minutes. remove from heat and add orange rind, orange rind and mint leaves. let stand for 1 hour. squeeze juice from oranges and lemons and add to mixture.

Ingredients: ribs, barbecue sauce, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. black pepper, dash of red pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Cover ribs with water. Add salt and peppers. Boil until tender. Remove ribs and drain. Place in baking dish and add barbecue sauce. Marinate in sauce several hours. Grill over charcoal fire until slightly charred.
GeneratedRecipe: season ribs with salt, pepper and red pepper. place ribs in baking dish. pour barbecue sauce over ribs. bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 bunch fresh broccoli, chopped, 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1 small onion, minced, 1 glove garlic, minced, 2 c. chicken broth, fat removed, 2 c. low-fat or skim milk, pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, saute onion and garlic in vegetable oil until onion is clear but not browned. Add the broth and bring to a boil. Add the broccoli. GeneratedRecipe: saute onion and garlic in oil until tender. add broccoli and chicken broth. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer until broccoli is tender, about 10 minutes. add milk and pepper. heat through.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. margarine, 1/2 c. vegetable oil, 1 lb. bag marshmallows, 3 qt. popped corn, 1 lb. salted peanuts, 1 lb. M&M candies
ReferenceRecipe: Melt margarine, marshmallows and oil in pan over low heat, then cook for 1 minute. Add mixture to popcorn, peanuts and M&M's. Grease hands with butter; mix all ingredients together and put in greased tube pan. Pack this fairly firm in pan and let stand for about 5 minutes. Invert onto plate. Ready to eat!
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine and marshmallows until dissolved. add oil. add corn, peanuts and m & m 's. mix well and press into greased bundt pan. refrigerate. cut into squares and eat !

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 3 Tbsp. cocoa, 1 1/2 Tbsp. cornstarch, dash of salt, 1/2 c. water, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar, cocoa, cornstarch and salt. Stir in water. Cook until thick. Add margarine and cook until boiling. Then blend in vanilla. Can be made in microwave or conventional stove top. Makes 1 cup sauce.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cocoa, cornstarch and salt in saucepan. add water and margarine. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and boils. boil 1 minute. remove from heat. stir in vanilla.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 c. vinegar, 1 c. Miracle Whip, 1/4 c. yellow mustard, boiled and peeled potatoes, chopped celery, chopped onion, shredded carrot, hard-boiled eggs
ReferenceRecipe: Dice potatoes. Chop celery and onions. Shred carrots. Boil sugar and vinegar until sugar is dissolved. Pour over ingredients and stir. Let stand for a few minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes and cool. peel and dice. add chopped onion, celery and carrot just before it sets. add miracle whip. salt and pepper to taste. refrigerate. before serving, add miracle whip and mustard. ( i always put on potatoes for a couple of potatoes, add celery, carrots, onion, celery, carrots, cauliflower or celery. ) sprinkle with paprika.

Ingredients: 1 cup butter or margarine, 1 Tbsp. light corn syrup, 1 1/3 cups sugar, 3 Tbsp. water, 1 cup coarsely chopped almonds, toasted, 4-4 1/2 oz. milk chocolate bars, melted, 1 cup finely chopped almonds, toasted
ReferenceRecipe: In a large sauce pan, melt butter; add sugar, corn syrup and water. Cook; stirring occasionally, to hard-crack stage (300 degrees). Cover with waxed paper, invert. Spread with chocolate; sprinkle with remaining nuts. If necessary, chill to firm, crack in pieces.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar and corn syrup in heavy saucepan. stir in water and cook over medium heat until mixture begins to boil. boil for 3 minutes. add 4-4 milk mixture, chocolate bars and almonds. stir until melted. pour into greased 8 inch square pan. cool. cut into squares. store in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1/3 c. sugar (diabetics can use NutraSweet), 1/3 c. lime or lemon juice, food coloring (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Combine and blend to smooth consistency. Serve with fresh fruit, especially strawberries. For use as a frosting, cut liquid to a few tablespoons. For diabetics, use sugar-free lemonade mix to sweeten.
GeneratedRecipe: blend together cream cheese and sugar. add lemon juice. add food coloring if desired. serve with fresh strawberries, pineapple or any flavor.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 onion, finely chopped, 1/3 c. vinegar, 1/2 c. salad oil, 1 Tbsp. celery seed
ReferenceRecipe: Blend first 5 ingredients until onion is finally chopped. Add oil and celery seed. Blend few seconds more. Great with fruit. Try with bibb lettuce, mandarin oranges, almonds, avocado, etc.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, mustard, salt, celery seed and vinegar in a small saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until sugar is dissolved. remove from heat and cool. add oil and onion. beat until well blended. add celery seed. beat well.

Ingredients: currant jelly, catsup, Hillshire Farm sausage
ReferenceRecipe: Heat equal parts of currant jelly and catsup in saucepan until mixture can be blended smooth. Add bite-size pieces of Hillshire Farm sausage, and heat until sausage is hot. Serve with toothpicks.
GeneratedRecipe: put sausage in a crock-pot and cover; cook on low until done, about 1 hour. drain off the grease and put back in the crock-pot and add catsup and currant jelly. stir well. serve with toothpicks.

Ingredients: 1 ring baloney, 1 clove garlic, crushed, 1 to 2 Tbsp. cornstarch with 1/2 c. water, 2 c. crushed tomatoes, 1 medium onion, sliced
ReferenceRecipe: In a skillet, cook onion until translucent. Add crushed garlic and tomatoes. Slice the baloney in thin slices and add to skillet. Simmer about 20 minutes. Add cornstarch and water mixture. Stir until thickened (about 5 minutes). Serve with salad and crusty bread.
GeneratedRecipe: cook the baloney in salted water until tender. peel and dice. cook the baloney in the same pan. cook the baloney, onion, garlic and tomatoes in the juice. combine the cornstarch, water and the cornstarch. add to the baloney. let it thicken. serve with rice or mashed potatoes.

Ingredients: 1 loaf frozen bread dough, thawed, 1/3 c. chopped onion, 2 cloves garlic, minced, 1 Tbsp. margarine or butter, 1 Tbsp. all-purpose flour, 1/8 tsp. black pepper, 1 c. milk, 1/4 tsp. instant chicken bouillon granules, 1/4 tsp. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 tsp. dried, crushed basil
ReferenceRecipe: In a small saucepan, cook onion and garlic in hot margarine until onion is tender. Stir in the flour and pepper.
GeneratedRecipe: preheat oven to 375 degrees. in large skillet, heat onion, garlic and butter until onion is tender. stir in flour, basil and pepper. cook and stir until mixture is bubbly and bubbly. stir in milk. add chicken bouillon granules. heat to boiling; reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Ingredients: 1 can black-eyed peas, drained, 2 cans hominy (yellow or white), drained, 1 tomato, chopped, 1 onion, chopped, 1/2 green pepper, chopped, 1/2 bottle Italian dressing, salt and pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Chill. Serve cold.
GeneratedRecipe: mix ingredients together with large bottle to taste. chill before serving. serves 12 to 16 to 15 people.

Ingredients: 5 medium size potatoes, 4 ribs celery, 1 lb. German sausage, salt and pepper, 2 c. milk, water, butter or oleo
ReferenceRecipe: Chop potatoes and celery; cut sausage in bite-sized pieces. Cover with water. Add salt and pepper and cook until potatoes are tender. Add milk and butter. Heat until milk is hot and butter is melted. Do not boil. Maybe blended in blender for creamy soup.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up ribs very small. boil until tender. cut sausage into cubes. place in large pan with water, celery and potatoes ( do not use salt and pepper ) and bring to boil. when potatoes are tender, add oleo and milk, stir continuously. serve piping hot.

Ingredients: 2 heads romaine lettuce, 5 green onions, 1 pkg. Good Seasons Zesty Italian dressing mix, 3 oz. sliced almonds, 1 small jar sesame seed, 1/4 c. fresh grated Parmesan cheese, oil and vinegar (for mixing dressing)
ReferenceRecipe: Wash lettuce and tear into bite size pieces. Slice onions thin, including green tops. Toast almonds and sesame seed in toaster oven at low temperature until brown (watch carefully, they burn quickly). Prepare dressing according to directions on the package.
GeneratedRecipe: tear lettuce into bite size pieces and place in large bowl. add green onions, almonds and sesame seed. mix oil, vinegar and dressing mix. pour over salad and toss.

Ingredients: 6 c. sliced cucumbers, 1 c. onions, 1 c. green peppers, 1 c. cauliflower, 2 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 c. white vinegar, 1 Tbsp. celery seed
ReferenceRecipe: Mix salt, celery seed and vinegar. Pour over cucumbers, onions, green peppers and cauliflower. Let stand overnight. Makes 4 pints. Freeze the next day.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cucumbers, onions, peppers and salt. let stand 1 hour. drain. mix sugar, vinegar, celery seed and celery seed. bring to a boil and pour over vegetables. put in containers and freeze.

Ingredients: 16 oz. low-fat cottage cheese, 1 pkg. Hidden Valley Ranch dressing, 1 tsp. dill weed
ReferenceRecipe: In blender, cream cottage cheese until smooth. Add the other ingredients until mixed thoroughly. Chill and serve with favorite raw veggies.
GeneratedRecipe: add ranch dressing to cottage cheese, dill weed and dill. mix well and refrigerate. great with crackers or chips.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. white rice, 1 qt. milk, 1/2 c. granulated sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. nutmeg, 1/2 c. raisins
ReferenceRecipe: Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
GeneratedRecipe: combine rice, milk, sugar and salt in a saucepan. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer until rice is tender, about 20 minutes. remove from heat. stir in raisins and nutmeg.

Ingredients: ham, prepared mustard, currant jelly, brown sugar
ReferenceRecipe: For slow even cooking, prepare grill by placing charcoals along 2 sides, leaving the center open. Trim all excess fat from ham; place ham on grill and cook covered for 1 hour. Mix equal portions of prepared mustard, currant jelly and brown sugar in a saucepan over medium heat; stir until becomes a clear liquid. Baste ham every 15 minutes for the last 1 to 1 1/2 hours, depending on size of the ham.
GeneratedRecipe: cook ham in currant jelly for a few minutes. add brown sugar, mustard and mustard to ham drippings. serve on buns.

Ingredients: 1 small can whole jalapenos, 1 small pkg. cream cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Slice jalapenos in half lengthwise. Remove seeds and membrane. Fill jalapeno halves with softened cream cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: peel jalapenos and cut in small pieces. put in food processor to soften. put in blender with softened cream cheese and mix well. add jalapenos, if desired.

Ingredients: 2 c. marshmallow cream, 1 tsp. vanilla, 14 oz. caramel, 2 c. chopped pecans, 1 lb. powdered sugar, 1/4 tsp. butter flavor, 2 Tbsp. whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Combine marshmallow cream, sugar and flavoring. Shape into finger sized rolls. Place on a wax paper lined cookie sheet and freeze until very hard. Add caramel to unwhipped whipping cream in a double boiler. Dip the rolls in the melted caramel and roll them in chopped pecans. Store covered in a dry place. Yield: 30 logs.
GeneratedRecipe: combine marshmallow cream, butter, powdered sugar and vanilla. beat until light and fluffy. add pecans. beat until stiff. fold in caramel.

Ingredients: 2 lb. cooked broccoli, 1/4 c. margarine, 6 Tbsp. flour, 2 c. chicken broth, 1/2 c. half and half, 3 Tbsp. cooking sherry, 3 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cooked, 1/4 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 tsp. salt, dash of pepper, 2 tsp. paprika
ReferenceRecipe: Melt margarine. Blend in flour, salt and pepper. Add chicken broth and bring to a boil over medium heat. Stir in half and half and wine. Remove from heat.
GeneratedRecipe: coat chicken with flour, salt and pepper. melt margarine in large skillet over medium heat. add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. remove chicken from skillet and keep warm. add broth, sherry, sherry and paprika. heat to boiling. return chicken to skillet. reduce heat to low. cover and simmer 10 minutes or until chicken is tender. stir in half and half and sherry. heat through. serve over broccoli. sprinkle with parmesan cheese. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 qt. milk, 6 eggs, 1 lb. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. flour, 3 (12 oz.) cans evaporated milk, 3 Tbsp. black walnut flavoring, black walnuts, toasted and cooled
ReferenceRecipe: Scald the milk; mix eggs, sugar, salt and flour. Beat well and cook over medium heat until mixture thickens. Chill the custard as well as the canned milk. When ready to freeze, add the chilled canned milk and the flavoring to the custard. Freeze until almost firm and add the cooled black walnuts. Continue to freeze until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs. add sugar, flour and salt. mix well. add evaporated milk and evaporated milk. cook in double boiler until thick, stirring constantly. remove from heat. add flavoring and walnuts. pour into ice cream freezer. freeze according to manufacturer 's instructions.

Ingredients: 2 medium white onions, chopped, 1 green bell pepper, chopped, 2 stalks celery, chopped, 2 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/2 c. butter, 2 c. crayfish tails, 4 Tbsp. flour, 2 cans chicken broth, 1/4 tsp. cayenne pepper, hot rice
ReferenceRecipe: Add crayfish tails to mixture and saute 1 minute. Then add flour. Mix well and add chicken broth and cayenne pepper. Simmer 15 minutes. Serve over hot rice.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onions, green bell pepper and celery; drain. add 2 tablespoons butter to hot pan and saute. add flour. add chicken broth; add to onion mixture. cook until thick. add the crayfish and simmer for 15 minutes. add crayfish tails and cook 10 minutes. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. Riches frozen dough pieces (rolls), cut in half, 1 pkg. butterscotch pudding (not instant), 1/2 c. butter, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1 pkg. pecan pieces
ReferenceRecipe: Grease Bundt or angel food pan; put pecans in pan. Add roll pieces.
GeneratedRecipe: grease a 9 x 13-inch pan. place frozen rolls in bottom of pan. sprinkle brown sugar over rolls. sprinkle dry pudding mix over nuts. pour melted butter over top. bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1/2 lb. cubed Swiss cheese, 6 hard-boiled eggs, 1 1/2 tsp. mustard, 1 tsp. horseradish, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1/8 tsp. ground cumin, 1/2 sour cream, lettuce
ReferenceRecipe: Chop eggs. Mix cheese and eggs in a bowl. Combine sour cream, mustard, horseradish, salt, pepper and cumin. Fold in cheese and egg mixture. Refrigerate 1 hour. Serve on a bed of lettuce. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: cut eggs in half lengthwise. remove yolks and mash. add sour cream, mustard, salt, pepper and cumin. fill egg whites with lettuce. sprinkle with swiss cheese.

ReferenceRecipe: Cut meat into 2 inch thin strips. Coat with flour. Brown meat, onion and garlic in shortening. Stir in 1 cup water, tomato sauce, vinegar, horseradish, mustard, salt and pepper. Simmer 1 hour. Stir in 1/2 cup water; heat through. Serve with rice or noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: cut meat into 1-inch strips. dredge in flour. melt shortening in skillet ( or skillet ). brown steak. stir in onion, garlic, salt and pepper; cook 5 minutes. remove from pan. stir in remaining ingredients except water. return meat to skillet. cover and simmer 45 minutes. stir occasionally. serve with cooked rice.

ReferenceRecipe: Melt fat. Add onions, pepper, celery and garlic. Cook until partly tender. Add beef and cook until light brown. Add tomatoes, chili powder and 2 tablespoons water. Add salt and sugar. Bring to boil, then reduce to low heat and simmer for 1 hour. Add beans and heat well.

ReferenceRecipe: Core apples without cutting through bottom end. Place in baking pan. Mix sugar and cinnamon; fill centers of apples. Put margarine on top of filling. Makes 4 servings. A healthy, light dessert.
GeneratedRecipe: peel, core and slice apples. combine sugar, cinnamon and water in a saucepan. bring to a boil over medium heat. reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes or until apples are tender.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 lb. Italian sausage (ground), 1 lb. sliced mushrooms or 1 large can of mushrooms, 1 large onion, diced, 1 large green pepper, diced, 1 large can crushed tomatoes, 1 small can tomato paste, Italian seasoning, salt and pepper, garlic
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground beef, onion, mushrooms, Italian sausage and green pepper. Drain fat. Add tomato paste and Italian seasoning; stir until mixed well. In large pot or crock-pot, add tomato sauce, crushed tomatoes, meat mixture and seasoning to taste. Cook slow for 3 to 6 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and sausage. drain off fat. add onion, green pepper, mushrooms, tomato paste, italian seasoning, garlic salt and italian seasoning. simmer for 1 hour.

ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar and syrup. Let it come to a fast boil; quickly add peanut butter, then take off and let peanut butter melt. When melted, add cornflakes. Mix well. Drop onto a pan to cool.
GeneratedRecipe: bring sugar and syrup to a boil. remove from heat. add peanut butter and cornflakes. mix well. drop by teaspoon on wax paper.

Ladle hot relish into hot sterilized half pint jars, leaving 1/2-inch head space. Adjust lids; process in boiling bath 5 minutes (start timing when water returns to boiling). Makes about 8 half pints.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cranberries, water, sugar and orange juice in a saucepan. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until cranberries are tender. remove from heat. stir in almonds and orange peel. cool.

Ingredients: 1 c. milk, 3 Tbsp. flour, 1 stick soft butter, 1/2 c. Crisco shortening, 1 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Mix thoroughly the milk and flour. Cook over medium heat until thick; let cool. Combine the rest of the ingredients together with the cooled mixture and beat well.
GeneratedRecipe: cook milk, flour and butter until thick and creamy, set aside. beat the butter with electric mixer until creamy, then gradually add milk, then beat until it gets creamy. add soft dough, shortening, crisco and sugar mixture. beat until smooth and fluffy. spread on a cooled cake.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 sticks oleo, melted, 6 Tbsp. cocoa, 2 c. sugar, 2 tsp. vanilla, 2 tsp. baking powder, 4 eggs, 1 c. plain flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 1/2 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Melt oleo. Add cocoa and sugar. Add other ingredients. Bake in square oiled pan in moderate oven for 30 minutes. Cut into squares when cool.
GeneratedRecipe: cream oleo and sugar in mixing bowl. add eggs and vanilla. blend together flour, cocoa, baking powder and salt. add flour mixture. pour half of batter into a 9 x 12-inch pan. add half of the chopped pecans. put mixture on top; cover with remaining batter and bake at 325 degrees until toothpick comes out clean, 30 to a toothpick inserted in middle of loaf. remove and cool on rack and frost with chocolate frosting.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 lb. ground pork, 1 lb. Velveeta cheese, 1 tsp. oregano, 1 tsp. garlic powder
ReferenceRecipe: Fry meat and drain grease. Chop cheese into meat mixture and melt. Add other ingredients; mix well. Spread on thin bread cut into 1/4-inch pieces. GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef. drain off grease. add velveeta cheese and spices. heat until cheese is melted. add chopped pork.

Ingredients: 1 egg, beaten, 3 Tbsp. water, 3 Tbsp. shortening, 1 1/2 c. flour, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients and roll out thin. Let dry about 20 minutes. Cut into strips and drop into chicken broth and cook. When done, cut up one hard-boiled egg into dumplings.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, salt and shortening together. make hole in water. then put in beaten egg, water and egg. beat together and put in flour to make crust.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. medium egg noodles, 8 oz. sour cream, 8 oz. cottage cheese, 3 eggs, beaten, 1 stick margarine, melted, 1/3 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. raisins, bread crumbs (about 1/3 c.)
ReferenceRecipe: Spinach, chicken or mushrooms can be substituted for some or all of the vegetables and meat in this recipe.
GeneratedRecipe: cook noodles according to package directions; drain well. combine cottage cheese, sour cream and 2 cups bread crumbs. in a large bowl, beat eggs, sugar and cottage cheese. in a separate bowl, mix together bread crumbs, margarine, raisins and milk. pour in a 9 x 13 inch baking dish. sprinkle with remaining 2 cups bread crumbs.

Ingredients: 1 pt. fresh mushrooms, 1/4 c. butter, 1/2 c. dry fine bread crumbs, 1/4 tsp. thyme, 1/4 tsp. powdered oregano, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. salt, 4 Tbsp. sherry wine, 2 Tbsp. minced fresh parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Rinse mushrooms, remove stems and chop stems into fine pieces. Leave mushrooms caps full; saute lightly in butter. Remove from pan. Saute chopped stems for about 10 minutes. GeneratedRecipe: wash and dry mushrooms. melt butter in skillet. add mushrooms and saute until tender. add bread crumbs, sherry, oregano, salt and pepper. mix well. stuff mushroom caps with mixture. broil 5 to 6 inches from heat for 5 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. palm oil, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 onion, chopped, 1 garlic clove, crushed, 2 tomatoes, chopped, 2 tsp. coriander, 1 tsp. chopped parsley, 1/4 tsp. red pepper sauce, 3 c. uncooked, shelled shrimp, 2 c. coconut milk
ReferenceRecipe: Cook onion and garlic in oil until translucent. Add tomatoes, coriander, hot pepper sauce and shrimp. Simmer ingredients until shrimp turns pink. Pour in coconut milk. Serve with rice.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion and garlic in olive oil until soft. add tomatoes, parsley, coriander, red pepper, coconut and milk. simmer for 10 minutes. add shrimp and cook 5 more minutes. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sausage, 2 cans black eyed peas, 1 box Uncle Ben's Long Grain rice, 1 pkg. Lipton Onion Soup mix, 5 cups water
ReferenceRecipe: Fry sausage and drain. Add remaining ingredients and cook until rice is tender.
GeneratedRecipe: brown sausage and drain. add onion soup mix, water and peas. bring to a boil. add rice. cover and simmer for 20 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 3 c. hot water, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 Tbsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Burn 1 cup sugar. Add hot water, 1/2 cup sugar, vanilla and butter. Boil ingredients until all sugar has melted.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar and water until it forms a soft ball in cold water. add butter and vanilla. beat until thick enough to spread.

ReferenceRecipe: Brown and drain sausage. Cube bread and Velveeta and arrange in 8 x 12-inch pan. Add drained sausage. Beat eggs; add milk and mustard and mix well. Pour over bread mixture. Cover with foil and refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground coffee, 9 qt. water, 1 egg
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg and add enough water to moisten coffee; mix well. Place in 4 cloth bags and tie at top. Let soak in water 3 or 4 hours, then bring to a boil. Remove bags.
GeneratedRecipe: combine ground coffee and water in a saucepan. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes. remove from heat and let cool. beat egg and add to coffee mixture.

Ingredients: 6 Tbsp. brown sugar, 6 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 6 Tbsp. evaporated milk
ReferenceRecipe: Cook first 2 ingredients for 3 minutes; add milk and cook 5 minutes more. Add powdered sugar until it gets as thick as you want it.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter or margarine in saucepan. add brown sugar and milk. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat. stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. soft Parkay margarine, 1/2 c. boiling water, 1/2 c. flour, dash of salt, 2 eggs, 7 1/2 oz. can crab meat, flaked, 1/3 c. ripe olives, chopped, 1/3 c. celery, chopped, 1/3 c. green peppers, chopped, 1 Tbsp. onion, chopped, Miracle Whip (to moisten)
ReferenceRecipe: This delicious cheese roll goes well with a bean salad or thick soup. Any leftover slices can be included in a lunch box.
GeneratedRecipe: cook parkay in boiling water for 5 minutes. drain. mix miracle whip, eggs, margarine, flour, salt and green peppers with boiling water. mix well. add to mixture and stir in crab meat, celery, onion and olives. mix well. spoon into buttered pie plate and refrigerate.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1 c. milk, 1 (7 oz.) jar marshmallow cream, 1 (18 oz.) jar crunchy or creamy peanut butter, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar and milk in saucepan. Boil until mixture forms a soft ball. Remove from heat and stir in marshmallow cream, peanut butter and vanilla. Beat until blended. Pour into greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar and milk to soft ball stage. remove from heat and add peanut butter, marshmallow cream and vanilla. beat until smooth. pour into buttered pan. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1 lb. Velveeta cheese, 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 1 c. pecans, chopped fine, 1/2 tsp. garlic
ReferenceRecipe: Melt Velveeta in double boiler. Add cream cheese, pecans and garlic. Chill. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: soften cream cheese and add chopped pecans and garlic. chill. roll into ball and roll in chopped nuts.

ReferenceRecipe: In a 4-quart pan, place all ingredients except noodles. Cover and bring to boil; skim fat off. Reduce heat, cover and simmer 1 1/2 hours. Remove chicken and cool, then debone. GeneratedRecipe: in a large kettle, place chicken, water, bouillon, onion, celery, poultry seasoning, sage, poultry seasoning and pepper. bring to a boil. reduce heat. cover and simmer for 1 hour or until chicken is tender. remove chicken from broth. skim off fat. stir in noodles; cover and simmer 30 minutes, or until noodles are tender. remove chicken from bone. return chicken to broth.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. water, 2 sq. (2 oz.) unsweetened chocolate, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar, flour and salt in saucepan; blend in water. Add chocolate. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture boils. Remove from heat. Blend in butter and vanilla extract. Serve hot.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, flour and salt in saucepan. add chocolate and water. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and boils. boil 1 minute. remove from heat. stir in butter and vanilla.

Ingredients: 4 c. flour, pinch of salt, 1 1/2 c. shortening
ReferenceRecipe: Blend and refrigerate. One cup for 1 crust. Moisten enough to hold together and roll.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together the flour and salt. add the shortening and blend until the size of small peas. press into a pan.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, boned and skinned, 4 slices cooked ham, thin, 4 slices Swiss cheese, 1/4 c. flour, 1/4 c. white wine or 1 tsp. instant chicken bouillon, milk, fresh or canned mushrooms, 1/4 c. margarine, 1 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Melt margarine and blend in flour and salt. Add wine. Drain mushroom liquid and add enough milk to make 2 cups. Gradually stir into margarine mixture. Place over medium heat, stir and cook until sauce thickens. If using fresh mushrooms, slice and saute in a little margarine.
GeneratedRecipe: pound chicken breasts to 1/4-inch thickness. sprinkle with salt and pepper. dredge in flour. melt margarine in a large skillet. brown chicken on both sides. remove from skillet. add mushrooms and mushrooms. cook until tender. add wine and bouillon. cover and cook over low heat for 10 minutes. add milk and cheese. heat until cheese melts. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 1 can Frito-Lay bean dip, 1 pkg. taco seasoning, 1 c. sour cream, 1/2 c. grated cheese, sliced green onions, diced tomatoes
ReferenceRecipe: On a regular plate spread dip. Mix taco seasoning with sour cream and spread over top. Sprinkle with grated cheese, green onions and tomatoes. Serve with taco chips.
GeneratedRecipe: spread bean dip in a 9 x 13-inch pan. mix sour cream and taco seasoning. spread over bean dip. top with green onions, tomatoes and cheese. serve with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 4 slices bacon, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 1/2 c. sliced celery, 1/2 c. chopped green pepper, 2 Tbsp. vinegar, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 2 cans (15 oz.) Chef Boyardee mini ravioli
ReferenceRecipe: Fry bacon, blot on paper toweling; crumble. Pour off all but two tablespoons of bacon fat. Saute onions, celery and green pepper lightly in fat. Add vinegar and sugar; stir. GeneratedRecipe: cook ravioli according to package directions. drain and set aside. fry bacon until crisp. remove bacon from skillet. add onions, celery and green pepper. cook until tender. stir in vinegar and sugar. heat to boiling. add ravioli. heat through.

Ingredients: 1 c chopped onion (adjust to taste), 3 cans (10 oz each) Rotel diced tomatoes with green chilies, 1 can (14.5 oz) stewed tomatoes, chopped, 2 lb Velveeta cheese, cubed, chips of your choice
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onion in butter. Add tomatoes with chilies and stewed tomatoes. Cook until thick. Add cheese. Cook until thick and smooth, stirring often to keep from sticking. Refrigerate overnight. Heat to eat. Serve with chips of your choice.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large saucepan, heat tomatoes, onion, chilies and cheese until cheese is melted. stir in the rotel and heat through. serve warm with chips.

GeneratedRecipe: prepare pudding mix according to package directions. fold in whipped topping, coconut and vanilla. spoon into pie crust. sprinkle with coconut. freeze until firm.

GeneratedRecipe: brown sausage and drain. spread half of bread in bottom of a 10 x 12 pan. mix eggs, milk and mustard. pour over bread. add 1/2 of the sausage and remaining bread slices over cheese mixture.

Ingredients: sugar, 1/2 c. butter, softened, 1 egg, 2 2/3 c. all-purpose flour, sifted, 4 tsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. milk, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1 1/2 c. blueberries, rinsed and drained, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Cream 1/3 cup sugar and 1/4 cup butter in bowl. Add egg; beat well. Combine 2 1/3 cups flour, baking powder and salt. Add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, mixing well after each addition. Stir in vanilla; beat well. Fold in blueberries. Fill greased muffin cups 2/3 full.
GeneratedRecipe: cream butter and sugar. add egg and vanilla. mix well. sift together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt and baking powder. add to creamed mixture alternately with milk. stir in blueberries. add blueberries.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 onion, chopped, 1 garlic clove, diced, 1 cut up chicken, 2 cans chicken broth, 1 tomato, chopped, 1 green pepper, chopped, 1 red pepper, chopped, oregano, salt and pepper to taste, 2 c. uncooked rice*, 1 tsp. turmeric
ReferenceRecipe: Brown onion in olive oil, then add garlic. Add chicken; brown slightly. Add the chicken broth to cover chicken. Add chopped tomato, chopped green pepper, chopped red pepper, oregano, salt and pepper. Cover; let simmer until chicken falls off the bone.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion, green pepper and garlic in olive oil until tender. add chicken broth, tomato, turmeric, oregano, salt and pepper. bring to a boil. stir in rice. cover and remove from heat. let stand 5 minutes. fluff with fork.

Ingredients: 6 squirrels, 3 tsp. salt, 3 chicken bouillon cubes, 1 tsp. pepper, 1/2 c. chopped celery, 2 c. chopped onion, 1 c. chopped bell pepper, 1 qt. tomatoes, 2 c. cooked rice, 1 can cream-style corn, 2 medium potatoes, cooked, red pepper to taste, sugar to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Cook squirrels, salt, pepper and bouillon cubes in pressure cooker until tender, about 30 minutes. Cool and remove meat from bones.
