Serve warm.
GeneratedRecipe: cook in large stew pot until tender. cut up meat and cook with onion, celery and pepper in broth. add potatoes, salt and pepper to taste. cook until potatoes are tender. add tomatoes and corn; cook until potatoes are done. serve over hot rice.

Ingredients: 11 lb. pears (after peeling and coring), 2 oranges, seeded (peels included), 6 lb. sugar, 1 (No. 2 1/2) can crushed pineapple, 1 lb. shredded coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Put pears and oranges through food chopper. Add sugar and cook until tender, stirring constantly. Add pineapple and cook until it looks like marmalade. Add coconut; boil again. Stir very often to prevent scorching. Seal while hot.	Makes 12 pints.
GeneratedRecipe: core and peel pears. peel and cut into small chunks. add crushed pineapple, sugar, peels and coconut. cook slowly until mixture forms a syrup and thickens. add pineapple and cook slowly, uncovered, 15 minutes longer. pack into sterile jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 c. chopped onion, 1 c. catsup, 1 c. water, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 can corned beef, 1/4 c. vinegar, 1/4 c. brown sugar, 2 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. paprika, buns
ReferenceRecipe: In blender, combine all ingredients. Pour into electric skillet and simmer for 1 hour. Add corned beef; warm through and serve on buns.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together catsup, water, brown sugar, vinegar, mustard and worcestershire sauce. simmer for 5 minutes. add corned beef, onion and dry mustard. simmer for 5 to 10 minutes. place hamburger buns on toasted bun and add sauce.

Ingredients: 1 can condensed milk, 2 cans Angel Flake coconut (8 oz.), 2 boxes powdered sugar, 1 stick butter, melted, 12 oz. chocolate morsels, 1 sq. paraffin wax
ReferenceRecipe: Combine milk and butter. Add sugar and coconut. Mix well. Let chill for 2 hours. Roll into balls and flatten. Place on wax paper; chill for 2 hours. GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, milk, butter and coconut. roll into small balls. melt chocolate morsels and paraffin in double boiler. dip balls into chocolate mixture. place on wax paper to cool.

Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 c. water, 1/2 c. salt, 2 tsp. cream of tartar, food coloring or tempera paint
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat. Stir constantly until mixture forms a ball. Knead until smooth. Store in covered container.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, cream of tartar, salt and cream of tartar and set aside. make the liquid of the dry ingredients as needed. add to the dry ingredients.

Ingredients: 6 Tbsp. margarine, 1 garlic clove, minced, 1 tsp. dried basil leaves, 1 tsp. dried oregano leaves, 1 (1 lb.) loaf French bread, cut in half lengthwise, 16 Velveeta cheese slices, cut in 1/2 diagonally, 1 c. chopped tomatoes, 1/2 c. chopped cooked pepperoni
ReferenceRecipe: Heat broiler. Mix margarine, seasonings and garlic until well blended. Place each bread half, cut side facing up, on cookie sheet. Spread with margarine mixture. Top with cheese, tomatoes and pepperoni.
GeneratedRecipe: in a medium saucepan, heat margarine, garlic and oregano. add cheese and melt over low heat. stir until cheese is melted. place tomatoes, cheese and pepperoni on toast. spoon cheese mixture evenly over bread slices.

Ingredients: 3 eggs, 1 pt. heavy cream, 3/4 bag chocolate chips (12 oz. bag), 3 Tbsp. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Separate eggs. Beat egg whites and heavy cream separately. Melt chocolate in microwave. Beat egg yolks with 2 tablespoons of water. Slowly add sugar and beat until creamy. GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs until thick; add sugar and heavy cream. beat well. add chocolate chips. pour into graham cracker crust. refrigerate until set. top with whipped cream.

Ingredients: 1 'Nilla pie crust, 2 bananas, 1 small box sugar-free banana pudding (instant), 1 small container Cool Whip lite
ReferenceRecipe: Slice bananas and completely line 'Nilla crust. Make pudding as directed and pour on top of bananas. Top with Cool Whip. Chill for approximately 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: slice bananas in pie crust. layer with 'nilla bananas. prepare pudding as directed on box. add cool whip to pudding. mix well and pour over bananas. chill.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground chuck, 2 medium onions, chopped, 2 c. (or more) chopped cabbage, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 can tomatoes, 1 small can tomato paste, 1 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. chili powder, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 2 cand drained kidney beans
ReferenceRecipe: Brown chuck and then add other ingredients listed. Can mix and store in refrigerator or let simmer one hour and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground chuck, onions, celery and cabbage. add tomatoes, tomato paste, chili powder, salt, pepper and chili powder. simmer for 1 hour.

Ingredients: frozen bananas, soy milk, honey or dates, flavoring (vanilla, maple, etc.)

GeneratedRecipe: cut bananas into small pieces. add soy flavoring and maple flavoring. add milk to taste. serve with sliced bananas.

Ingredients: 1 c. sifted all-purpose flour, 1/4 c. cornstarch, 1/4 c. sugar, 1/3 c. corn oil margarine, 1 egg, beaten, assorted fresh fruit: peach or plum slices, strawberry halves, seedless green grapes or blueberries, Citrus Glaze
ReferenceRecipe: Stir together flour, cornstarch and sugar in medium size bowl. With pastry blender or 2 knives, cut in margarine until mixture is well blended and coarse crumbs form. With fork, stir in egg. Press dough firmly into ball with hands. (If mixture seems crumbly, work with hands until it holds together.) Flatten dough slightly; roll out on large cookie sheet to 10 1/2-inch circle.
GeneratedRecipe: in a small bowl, combine sugar, flour, cornstarch and cornstarch. in small saucepan, stir in egg and oil; cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and boils. boil and stir 1 minute. remove from heat. stir in grapes. cool.

ReferenceRecipe: Boil potatoes (skins on) in a 4-quart pan or Dutch oven. Drain, cube and season with salt and pepper (to taste) while still hot. Set aside in colander. Great potluck dish or complement to baked ham or sausage.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes and slice them. cut bacon and onion; cook until tender. drain bacon, reserving all grease. mix sugar, cornstarch, water, vinegar, salt, pepper and celery water. cook until thickened. pour hot potatoes in potatoes; cool. dice bacon. add to potatoes along with celery; cut into 1-inch squares. garnish with paprika. yields 6 to 8 servings.

Ingredients: 1 3/4 c. warm water, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 pkg. or 1 Tbsp. dry yeast, 1/3 c. honey, 1 1/2 c. rolled oats, 1 Tbsp. oil, 3 1/2 to 4 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: I sometimes add 2 to 3 tablespoons wheat germ.
GeneratedRecipe: in an 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan, sprinkle 2 tablespoons oats with 1/2 cup water and honey. mix and set aside. in a medium bowl mix the yeast, 2 tablespoons warm water and 1 tablespoon rolled oats. add oil, honey and salt mixture to yeast. beat with electric mixer at high speed until mixture is smooth. stir in enough of the remaining flour to make a stiff dough. turn and mix into pan. turn onto lightly floured surface; knead on a lightly, turning a lightly floured board, until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 c. crushed pineapple, 1 c. large pineapple tidbits, 2 c. fruit cocktail, 1 c. peaches, 1 to 1.2 lb. marshmallows, 1 c. oranges, 3 large bananas, 1/2 jar cherries, 1 pt. whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Drain fruit; measure 1 1/2 cups juice and 1 1/2 pounds marshmallows into large pan. Heat and stir until melted. Cool. Pour over fruit. Whip 1 pint cream, no sugar, and pour over fruit mixture. Freeze. Serve frozen.
GeneratedRecipe: drain fruit. cut fruit into bite-size pieces. cut all fruit into small pieces. combine fruit in a large bowl. mix whipping cream, marshmallows and pineapple tidbits in the bowl. fold in whipping cream. put in refrigerator for 2 hours.

Ingredients: 2 c sugar, 2 c orange-flavored breakfast beverage crystals, 2/3 c presweetened lemonade mix, 1/2 c instant tea mix, 1 Tbsp ground cloves
ReferenceRecipe: Combine the sugar, beverage crystals, lemonade mix, tea mix and cloves in a large bowl and mix well. Store in an airtight container. To serve, place 2 heaping tablespoons of the mix in a cup or mug. Add 3/4 c boiling water and stir until mixed.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients except sugar and mix thoroughly. put in an airtight container. when ready to use, stir thoroughly until all mixture is thoroughly mixed and store tightly covered. ( i put mine in a plastic bag or plastic baggie. )

Ingredients: 1 (2 layer) yellow cake mix, 1 1/4 c. Miracle Whip salad dressing, 4 eggs, 1/4 c. cold water, 2 tsp. cinnamon, 2 c. finely shredded carrots, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts, 1 (16 oz.) tub vanilla ready-to-spread frosting
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cake mix, salad dressing, eggs, water and cinnamon, mixing at medium speed on electric mixer until well-blended. Stir in carrots and walnuts. Pour into greased 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
GeneratedRecipe: prepare cake mix as directed on package. combine eggs, carrots, salad dressing, walnuts and vanilla. stir well. blend in remaining ingredients. pour into 2 ( 13 x 9 x 2-inch ) cake pans. bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes or until toothpick comes out clean. cool 10 minutes; spread frosting over cake. sprinkle with chopped nuts.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour, 1 1/4 tsp. baking powder, 3/4 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. butter, about 2/3 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients together. Roll thin and cut in small squares. Sprinkle with pepper. Drop in boiling chicken broth. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, baking powder and salt. cut in butter with pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal. add milk and mix until dough forms a ball. turn out on floured board and knead until smooth and elastic. roll out to 1/4-inch thickness. cut into squares. drop into boiling chicken broth. cover and cook 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 stick oleo, 2 c. graham cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Melt oleo. Mix with graham crackers. Press in 13 x 9-inch pan.
GeneratedRecipe: melt oleo and mix with crumbs. press into bottom of 9 x 13-inch pan. chill for 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 boxes cherry jello, 2 c. water, 1 (No. 2) can crushed pineapple and juice, 2 crushed bananas, sour cream, 1 large box strawberries and juice
ReferenceRecipe: Mix jello and water; cool. Mix fruit with jello. Layer jello and sour cream. Serves 12.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in 1 cup boiling water. add strawberries, pineapple and bananas. pour half of mixture into 9 x 13-inch pan. chill until firm. spread sour cream on top. pour remaining jello mixture over sour cream. chill.

Ingredients: 3 large yellow squash, sliced thin, 3 zucchini squash, sliced thin, 1 medium onion, sliced thin, 2 Tbsp. bacon drippings, 1 tsp. each: salt and pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Peel raw sweet potatoes and slice into rounds about 1/4-inch thick. Fry in shortening 2 to 3 minutes on each side until they are done and golden brown. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with sugar. One potato serves 2.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, heat bacon drippings. add squash, onion, salt and pepper. cover and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.

Ingredients: 8 oz. shredded sharp cheese, 1 c. flour, 1/2 c. butter, softened, 3 Tbsp. dry onion soup
ReferenceRecipe: Knead all together in smooth ball. Divide in half. Shape into 1-inch roll. Wrap in wax paper and refrigerate or freeze.
GeneratedRecipe: in a medium bowl, combine soup, cheese and butter. beat until smooth. stir in flour. cover and chill 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 large carton cottage cheese (small curd), 1 large pkg. orange Jell-O, 2 cans mandarin oranges, 1 can pineapple tidbits, 1 large carton Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Drain oranges and pineapple. Mix cottage cheese and Jell-O together. Add in remaining ingredients. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cottage cheese and cool whip together. add dry jell-o and mix well. add drained pineapple and mandarin oranges. chill.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. dried apricots or canned, 1/3 c. chopped dates, 1/3 c. golden raisins, 1 tsp. poppy seed, 1/2 tsp. seasoned salt (garlic or onion), 1 lb. mild cheese, grated, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1 c. chopped pecans, 2 Tbsp. chopped candied cherries
ReferenceRecipe: If dried apricots are used, chop and soak in 1 cup water for 2 hours; drain. (I prefer to use canned apricots.)
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. chill for several hours. shape into a ball, roll in nuts or poppy seed. chill.

Ingredients: 1 oz. rum, 1/2 oz. coffee liqueur, pineapple juice, orange juice, grenadine
ReferenceRecipe: Fill a tall glass with ice. Add rum and coffee liqueur. Fill glass 2/3 with pineapple juice. Fill almost to top with orange juice. Top with grenadine. Stir and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: put pineapple, orange juice and rum in a tall glass, then put ice cubes, grenadine and orange juice in the glass. then add a little ice to fill glass.

Ingredients: 2 cans small English peas, 1 chopped onion, 3 eggs, chopped, Miracle Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 3 ingredients together. Add Miracle Whip until you get the desired consistency. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
GeneratedRecipe: drain peas. add onion; cook until transparent. add peas and eggs. mix with miracle whip. chill overnight.

Ingredients: 9 c. water, 2 c. sugar, 12 tea bags, 1 large can pineapple juice, 3 c. whiskey, 7-Up
ReferenceRecipe: Boil 7 cups water and sugar. Boil 2 cups water and tea bags. Let cool. Mix pineapple juice with sugar water and tea water in large container. Add whiskey and freeze overnight. Fill glasses with slush and add 7-Up over the top.
GeneratedRecipe: boil water, sugar and tea bags for 5 minutes. cool. add pineapple juice, whiskey and whiskey. freeze. when ready to serve, add 7-up.

Ingredients: 8 oz. can crushed pineapple juice, 3 1/2 oz. pkg. instant coconut cream pudding, 3/4 c. milk, 1/2 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Blend all ingredients. Blend 30 seconds. Refrigerate overnight. Serve with cut up fruit.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve with fresh fruit. makes 1 1/2 cups. can be frozen.

Ingredients: 1 c. strong tea, 1 c. lemon juice, 2 c. orange juice, 2 c. pineapple juice, 1 jar cherries and the juice, 2 1/2 c. sugar, 1 1/2 c. water, 2 qt. ginger ale, 2 c. apricot nectar
ReferenceRecipe: Make syrup of sugar and water. Boil. Let set overnight. Add all other ingredients.
GeneratedRecipe: boil the water and sugar. add the tea, lemon juice, orange juice, pineapple juice and cherries. refrigerate until chilled. add ginger ale just before serving. serves 50.

Ingredients: 8 leaves Boston lettuce, 4 leaves romaine lettuce, 2 medium tomatoes (wedge size), 8 oz. Feta cheese, sliced, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. olive oil, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. red wine vinegar, 1/4 tsp. oregano, 4 leaves chicory, 1 cucumber, sliced, 2 scallions, sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Tear lettuce and chicory leaves into bite size pieces. Place in large bowl. Add tomatoes, cucumber, Feta cheese and scallions. Pour oil	and vinegar over salad. Sprinkle with oregano. Toss and serve immediately.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large salad bowl, combine lettuce, tomatoes, scallions, cucumber and feta cheese. in a small bowl, whisk together oil, vinegar, oregano and oregano. pour over salad and toss to coat. serve immediately.

Ingredients: 1 can tomato sauce, 1 can stewed tomatoes, 2 Tbsp. oregano, 1 tsp. basil, 1 tsp. parsley, 1 lb. hamburger, 1 tsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper, 1 diced onion, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder
ReferenceRecipe: Fry hamburger until brown. In another pan, mix tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes, oregano, basil, parsley, sugar, salt, pepper, onion and garlic powder. Let simmer 2 hours. Mix hamburger into sauce when done.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger in frying pan. add onion and cook for 10 minutes or until done. add rest of ingredients. simmer for 1 hour.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1/2 c. cocoa, 1/3 c. milk, 1 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 3 1/2 c. confectioners sugar, dash of salt
ReferenceRecipe: Combine melted butter and cocoa, then add milk and vanilla. Stir in the sugar (sifting if lumpy) and salt in three parts; beat until smooth. If frosting is too thick to spread easily, beat in 1/2 teaspoon milk at a time.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cocoa, sugar and salt; add milk and vanilla. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until butter is melted. remove from heat. cool. add confectioners sugar to milk mixture. beat until spreading consistency.

Ingredients: 1 lb. Italian sausage, 1 clove garlic, minced, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 2 Tbsp. basil leaves, pinch of oregano, 2 (6 oz.) cans tomato paste, 10 oz. lasagne noodles, 8 oz. Ricotta cheese, 1/2 c. Romano cheese, grated, 2 Tbsp. parsley flakes, 1 lb. thin-sliced Mozzarella cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown sausage slowly with garlic, salt and pepper. Drain fat. Add basil, oregano and tomato paste along with enough water to make a medium-thick sauce. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring often.
GeneratedRecipe: saute sausage, garlic, oregano, salt and pepper until done. drain well. add tomato paste, oregano, basil and basil. bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. in a large bowl, mix cheeses and noodles. put one cup of sauce in bottom of pan. layer noodles, sauce and mozzarella cheese, ending with sausage. bake for about 30 minutes. serves 8.

Ingredients: 4 large chicken breasts, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 2 cans Veg-All, drained, 1 c. chicken broth, 1 c. flour, 1 stick margarine, melted, 1 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Boil chicken and cut into chunks. Mix Veg-All, cream of chicken soup and chicken. Use about 1 cup of chicken broth.
GeneratedRecipe: cook chicken and cool. take out of the bone and cut meat into small bite-size pieces. mix the flour with the milk. add the melted margarine and stir well. add veg-all and cook until thick. mix all the other ingredients together and pour over chicken.

Ingredients: 8 Tbsp. butter, 1 to 2 Tbsp. flour, 1 onion, chopped, 1 c. milk, juice of 1 lemon, 1 large can salmon, save liquid, cracker crumbs, 1 egg, beaten
ReferenceRecipe: Brown onion in butter until clear. Add enough flour to thicken. Stir in all of the salmon juice and milk. When this thickens, add mashed salmon and lemon juice. Mix well. GeneratedRecipe: drain salmon, reserving 1/4 cup liquid. flake salmon. reserve 1 cup salmon liquid. add clam juice to make 2 cups. mix flour with milk. add egg and milk. stir in salmon, onion, lemon juice and lemon juice. add salmon and butter. mix well. add cracker crumbs. mix well. shape into cakes. brown in hot oil.

Ingredients: 1 c. milk, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. mace, 1/3 c. margarine or butter, 2 c. cooked mashed sweet potatoes, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1 egg, slightly beaten, 1 small pkg. yeast in 1/4 c. warm water, 4 1/4 to 4 1/2 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Scald milk. Add sugar, salt, mace and margarine. Stir to melt margarine. Pour over potatoes; add lemon juice. Beat until smooth. Cool to lukewarm. Add beaten egg and yeast; blend. GeneratedRecipe: dissolve yeast in warm water. add milk, sugar, salt, butter, lemon juice and egg. cool to lukewarm. add flour and mix well. knead until smooth and elastic. place in greased bowl. cover and let rise in warm place until double in bulk.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked millet, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 1 large onion, chopped, 1/2 tsp. celery salt
ReferenceRecipe: (Millet is cooked in 1 part millet to 4 parts water.)
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients and mix well. chill. serve on crisp lettuce leaves. serves 4 to 6.

Ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) can wax beans, drained, 1 (16 oz.) can green beans, drained, 1 (16 oz.) can pinto beans, drained, 1/4 c. chopped onion, 1/4 c. chopped green bell pepper, Dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Combine wax beans, green beans, pinto beans, onion and green pepper in large bowl; mix well. Add dressing; mix well. Marinate in refrigerator for 1 hour. Yield: 12 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: combine beans and onion in a large bowl. combine dressing and green pepper in small bowl. cover and chill.

Ingredients: 4 c. eggnog, 1/4 c. cornstarch, 2 Tbsp. butter, softened, baked pie shell
ReferenceRecipe: Blend eggnog and cornstarch in saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until mixture thickens and boils. Boil and stir for 1 minute. Remove from heat, blend in butter. GeneratedRecipe: mix eggnog and cornstarch in large saucepan. cook over medium heat until thickened. add butter and eggnog, stirring constantly. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick. pour into baked pie shell. chill.

Ingredients: 1 large can sweet potatoes, drained, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 eggs, beaten, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 small can crushed pineapple, drained, 1 c. raisins (optional), 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1/4 tsp. nutmeg
ReferenceRecipe: Heat potatoes, drain and mash well. Add other ingredients. Place in buttered casserole and cover with the topping.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together sweet potatoes, sugar and eggs. put in a baking dish. sprinkle with spices, then raisins and pineapple. bake for 30 minutes on high.

Ingredients: 1 c. water, 1/3 c. Joy dishwashing liquid, 2 Tbsp. light corn syrup
ReferenceRecipe: Mix solution well and allow it to sit for 1 hour before using it. Cover and label any leftover solution; store in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix ingredients thoroughly; add enough water to make the desired consistency. store in tightly covered container in refrigerator. makes 1 1/2 cups ( 1/2 cup ).

ReferenceRecipe: In medium saucepan, sprinkle gelatine over 1 cup milk. Let stand 1 minute. Stir over low heat until completely dissolved, about 5 minutes. GeneratedRecipe: heat milk and chocolate chips to boiling. remove from heat. add gelatine. stir until dissolved. chill until slightly thickened. fold in cool whip and nuts. place half of the cake cubes in bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan. pour half of mixture over cake cubes. repeat layers. refrigerate until firm. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 2 c. pineapple juice, 1/4 c. sugar, 1/4 c. dry sherry, 1/4 c. red wine vinegar, 1/2 c. soy sauce, 1 tsp. garlic granules, chicken, boneless and skinless

ReferenceRecipe: Cook sauce to a gravy consistency, stirring constantly. Add chicken to sauce and simmer for 20 to 30 minutes. Serve with beans or rice.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, chili powder and salt. cut chicken into small pieces. heat peanut butter in skillet. add chicken and brown lightly. when chicken is done, add water and chili powder. simmer for 10 minutes. serve over rice or noodles.

Ingredients: 1 stick margarine, 2 c. sugar, 4 Tbsp. cocoa, 1/2 c. milk, 1 c. peanut butter, 3 c. quick cooking oats, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix melted margarine, sugar, milk and cocoa together over medium heat. When mixture comes to a rolling boil, boil for 2 minutes. Take off heat and add vanilla, oats and peanut butter. Stir until peanut butter has melted. Drop by tablespoons onto wax paper. Let set for 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cocoa, milk and margarine in saucepan. bring to a boil. boil for 1 minute. remove from heat. add peanut butter, vanilla and oats. mix well. drop by spoonfuls onto wax paper.

Ingredients: 4 Tbsp. shortening, 1 1/2 c. sugar, 8 egg yolks, 2 c. buttermilk*, 8 c. flour, 4 tsp. nutmeg, 4 tsp. cinnamon, 2 tsp. salt, 1 1/2 tsp. soda, 1 tsp. cream of tartar, powdered sugar

GeneratedRecipe: * if using self-rising flour, omit salt and cream of tartar. use 2 teaspoons of tartar to make a stiff dough.

ReferenceRecipe: Bake pie shells and let cool. Mix sugar, cornstarch and water. Bring to a boil and cook until thickens. Take off heat and add Jell-O; stir well and let cool. GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cornstarch and water. bring to a boil. stir until clear. add dry jell-o and stir until dissolved. cool. add strawberries. pour into pie shells. chill. serve with cool whip.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. lean pork or 6 pork chops, 2 Tbsp. garlic, finely chopped, 3 bay leaves, boiling water, 6 Tbsp. vinegar, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 peppercorns or 1/16 tsp. black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Clean and slice pork into individual pieces for serving. Combine all the ingredients and let stand for 10 minutes in the frying pan. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: season pork chops with salt, pepper and garlic. brown in boiling water. add vinegar and bay leaves. cover and simmer 1 1/2 hours or until meat is tender.

Ingredients: 2 cans Cheddar cheese soup, 1 can Ro-Tel chilies and tomatoes, 1 lb. ground chuck, browned
ReferenceRecipe: Optional: If you like it hotter, add several tablespoons picante sauce to mixture. Serve warm with chips. A crock-pot is handy.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients in crock-pot. cook on low for 3 to 4 hours. serve with tortilla chips.

ReferenceRecipe: Boil fryer and debone. Cook diced potatoes in chicken broth. Cook until tender and add vegetables, onion, stewed tomatoes, soup and cheese. Cook until cheese and soup have melted and soup is hot throughout.

Ingredients: 3 whole lemons, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. water, 3 lb. green tomatoes, 6 c. sugar

GeneratedRecipe: boil tomatoes, sugar, water and salt for 10 minutes. add lemon and cook another 5 minutes. add tomatoes ( green tomatoes ). put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1/2 stick oleo (butter), 3/4 c. white sugar, 3/4 c. white syrup, 3/4 c. peanut butter, 3 c. K-cereal
ReferenceRecipe: Boil first 3 ingredients together 1 minute. Add peanut butter and cereal. Drop at once by teaspoon onto oiled paper. Makes about 50 non-baked cookies.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar, oleo and syrup until it forms a soft ball in cold water. remove from heat and add peanut butter and peanut butter. mix well and pour into buttered pan.

Ingredients: 1 stick of butter, 1 egg, beaten, 1 clove garlic chopped, optional, 1 tsp chopped parsley, optional, 1/2 pint whipping cream, 1 lb. fettucine, 1 cup fresh grated Romano cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Cook fettucine, drain and set aside. Melt butter; add parsley and garlic. Saute for a few minutes. Add cream and 1 beaten egg. Stir together. Add fettucine and grated cheese. Stir until well blended.
GeneratedRecipe: cook fettucine according to package directions. drain and rinse with cold water. melt butter in saucepan. add garlic, parsley and cream. cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. add egg and cheese. stir until cheese is melted. serve over fettucine.

Ingredients: 12 eggs, 4 c. white sugar, 1 Tbsp. Karo syrup, 1 Tbsp. vanilla, 8 tsp. baking powder, 2 lb. brown sugar (5 c.), 1 lb. oleo, melted, 3 lb. crunchy peanut butter, 18 c. rolled oats, 1 lb. chocolate chips, 1 lb. M&M's*
ReferenceRecipe: *Add just before baking, since they tend to lose their color.
GeneratedRecipe: * if desired, add m & m 's, 1/2 teaspoon baking powder, 1 teaspoon vanilla.

Ingredients: 1 box macaroni and cheese, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 can corn
ReferenceRecipe: Prepare macaroni and cheese according to package directions. Brown ground beef and add to macaroni and cheese. Stir in corn (drained). Heat thoroughly, stirring constantly.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef with ground beef and macaroni until tender. drain. add the corn. add cheese in casserole dish. cook over medium heat until cheese melts. serve with salad and bread.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 tsp. ground cloves, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. Accent seasoning, 1/2 c. catsup, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 12 oz. beer
ReferenceRecipe: Mix beef, cloves, salt, pepper and Accent. Form into small balls; brown well. Mix catsup, Worcestershire sauce and beer in separate pan; simmer for 10 minutes. Drain fat from meat balls. Add beer sauce. Cover; simmer for 2 hours. Serve with toothpicks.
GeneratedRecipe: in large frying pan, brown meat, drain off grease. add all ingredients and cook slowly. serve, cover and cook on low heat until beef is tender. makes 4 to 6 servings.

Ingredients: 1 can salmon, flaked, 1 1/2 c. bread crumbs, 1/4 c. butter, 1/2 c. heated milk, 1 small chopped onion, 2 eggs, separated, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. lemon juice, dash of pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg whites until foamy and fold in. Steam 1 1/4 hours in double boiler. Make egg gravy to serve over it.
GeneratedRecipe: drain salmon; remove bones and flake. add milk, lemon juice, onion, salt, pepper and bread crumbs. mix well. shape into patties. melt butter in skillet. brown patties on both sides.

Ingredients: 6 oranges, pared and sectioned, 2 apples, chopped, 2 c. shredded cabbage, 1 c. seedless green grapes, 1/2 c. whipped cream or topping, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Place oranges, apples, cabbage and grapes in bowl. Fold whipped cream (or topping), sugar, lemon juice and salt into mayonnaise. Stir into fruit mixture. Chill. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine cabbage, apples, grapes and grapes. in a small bowl, mix mayonnaise, sugar, lemon juice and salt. pour over cabbage mixture and toss gently. chill. just before serving, fold in whipped cream.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. lime Jell-O, 2 c. hot water, 2 pkg. Dream Whip, 1 c. milk, 1 small jar pineapple cream cheese, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 small can crushed pineapple with juice
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve Jell-O in hot water. Set aside to cool. Whip until thick Dream Whip and milk. Add cream cheese and continue to whip. Fold into Jell-O. Add crushed pineapple and chopped pecans. Refrigerate until set.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jell-o in hot water. add cream cheese, pineapple and pecans. let set until firm. mix dream whip according to directions on package. fold into jell-o mixture. spread on top of dream whip. sprinkle with chopped nuts.

Ingredients: 6 c. potatoes (about 5 large), 1/2 c. sliced carrots, 6 slices bacon, 1 c. chopped onion, 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 c. milk, 2 c. light cream, shredded Cheddar cheese, parsley sprigs
ReferenceRecipe: Cook potatoes and carrots in boiling water until tender. Drain. Cook bacon until crisp. Drain and crumble. Saute and celery in 2 tablespoons bacon fat. GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes, carrots and celery in water until tender. drain. saute bacon until crisp. set aside to cool; drain. place potato in a large skillet; add onion, celery, salt and pepper. saute until tender. blend in cream, milk, cheese and parsley. stir until cheese melts. add bacon. heat.

Ingredients: 4 egg whites, beaten, 2 sticks butter, melted and cooled, 1 box brown sugar, 1 c. white sugar, 4 egg yolks, 2 c. plain flour, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1/4 tsp. salt, 2 tsp. vanilla, 1 c. nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg whites and set aside. Cream butter, sugars and egg yolks. Sift flour, baking powder and salt together. Add to the creamed mixture. Add vanilla.	Fold in beaten egg whites.
GeneratedRecipe: cream butter and brown sugar. beat in egg yolks, vanilla and white. sift together flour, baking powder and salt. add to the cooled mixture alternately with milk and mix. add vanilla and nuts.

Ingredients: 2 c. Tang, 1 envelope unsweetened lemonade (makes 2 qt.), 1/2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. instant tea (unsweetened), 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 tsp. ground cloves, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together the dry ingredients. Stor in an airtight container.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. store in airtight container. use 2 teaspoons per cup of hot water. makes 2 quarts.

Ingredients: 1 doz. eggs, separated, 2 1/2 c. sugar, 2 qt. milk (I use 3 qt.), 2 qt. half and half, 1 qt. whiskey (Jack Daniels), 1/2 pt. apple jack (Captain Applejack), 1/4 pt. white rum
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg whites until fluffy and stiff.
GeneratedRecipe: combine eggs, sugar and rum in a large bowl; beat well. add milk, then slowly add whiskey and continue to beat until thoroughly mixed. add whiskey and half and half. beat egg whites until they are thoroughly mixed.

Ingredients: 3 c. water, 2 Tbsp. baby oil, 1 to 2 tsp. baby shampoo (with conditioner), 1 roll Bounty Mega paper towels, 1 large square Tupperware container
ReferenceRecipe: You will also need one large mixing bowl and one pair of scissors.
GeneratedRecipe: take 1 1/2 cups water and 1 cup shampoo. put in pan with oil. when it begins to bubble, add tupperware paper bag of mega, shampoo and tupperware. shake well and then add 2 drops of water and shake.

Ingredients: 1 angel food cake, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. frozen whipped topping, 1 can cherry pie filling
ReferenceRecipe: Cream softened cheese and sugar; blend in thawed topping. Crumble cake into a 13 x 9-inch cake pan. Pour cheese mixture evenly over cake. Top with cherry filling. Cover and chill for 2 hours or overnight. Serves 12.
GeneratedRecipe: tear angel food cake into small pieces and place in a 9 x 13-inch pan. mix cream cheese, powdered sugar and whipped topping until smooth. spread over cake. top with cherry pie filling.

Ingredients: 3 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 medium size onion, chopped, 1 c. chopped nuts, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. parsley flakes, garlic and paprika as desired
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together and form in a ball. Add a little milk, then roll in parsley, paprika and nuts. Wrap in foil and store in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients except nuts and parsley. chill. form into ball or log. roll in paprika until ball is covered. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 1 stick margarine, 1 small pkg. chocolate chips, 1 pkg. colored small marshmallows, 1 c. nuts, 1 pkg. coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Melt chocolate and mix with margarine. Add marshmallows. Take 2 pieces of waxed paper and sprinkle with coconut, then drop this mixture on the paper. Roll	into logs. This will make 4 logs. Refrigerate overnight, then slice.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine and chocolate chips. add marshmallows and nuts. mix well. roll in coconut. wrap in wax paper and chill. slice.

Ingredients: 4 c. Quaker corn bran cereal, 1 c. raisins, 1 c. candy-coated chocolate pieces (M&M's), 1 c. salted peanuts, 1/2 c. dried banana chips
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Store in tightly covered container at room temperature.
GeneratedRecipe: combine first 4 ingredients in a small bowl and pour the chocolate over them and mix thoroughly.

Ingredients: 1 bay leaf, 2 (6 oz.) cans tomato paste, 1 tsp. salt, 2 cloves garlic, 1/2 lb. Mozzarella cheese, 1 lb. ground beef, 1/2 pkg. lasagna noodles, 1 (29 oz.) can tomato sauce, 1 c. diced onion, pinch of Italian seasoning, 1/4 lb. Parmesan cheese, 1 small carton cottage cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Simmer tomato paste, sauce, salt and Italian seasoning in uncovered pan. Cook onion, garlic and ground beef in another pan until brown. Add tomato sauce mixture and simmer until thickened (about 1 to 1 1/2 hours). Add 1 bay leaf 1/2 hour before done.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef, onion and garlic. drain. add tomato sauce, tomato paste, bay leaf, salt and italian seasoning. simmer for 20 minutes.

Ingredients: fruit (of choice, canned apple, cherry or blueberry pie filling; do not drain!), 1 box Duncan Hines butter recipe cake mix, 1 stick margarine (liquid margarine does not work)
ReferenceRecipe: Place pie filling in bottom of loaf cake pan. Sprinkle cake mix on top. Place pats of margarine all over top, making sure to cover completely. Bake until brown on top.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine and mix in a 13 x 9-inch glass dish. spread fruit evenly over top of batter in pan. mix together cake mix as directed on cake mix. drizzle over cake mixture; do not stir. bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 can tuna, drained, 1/2 c. fine fresh bread crumbs (2 slices), 1/2 c. chopped celery, 2 Tbsp. minced onion, 1/3 c. mayonnaise, 2 Tbsp. chili sauce, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 4 hamburger buns, toasted, lettuce and tomato slices
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first 4 ingredients. Blend the next 3 ingredients. Stir into	tuna mixture.	 Form 4 patties. Fry	in lightly oiled skillet for 5 minutes, or until browned. Serve on buns with lettuce and tomato.
GeneratedRecipe: combine tuna, bread crumbs, celery, onion, lemon juice and chili sauce. mix well. shape into 6 patties. grill or broil until done. serve on buns.

Ingredients: 1 box salt, 4 oz. black pepper, 2 oz. red pepper, 1 large box Accent, 2 oz. paprika, 1 oz. dry mustard, 1/2 can curry powder, 3 oz. chili powder, 3 oz. garlic powder
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients and store in covered container.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. store in airtight container. to serve, add 2 to 3 teaspoons to a cup of hot water.

Ingredients: 1 qt. heavy cream, 1/4 c. granulated sugar, 1/2 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1/4 tsp. freshly grated nutmeg
ReferenceRecipe: Beat the cream with an electric mixer on high speed in a large cold mixing bowl for about 2 minutes. The colder the bowl, the better and faster the cream will thicken. Add the sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg and beat again until the mixture thickens and forms stiff peaks. Makes 4 cups.
GeneratedRecipe: whip the cream and sugar until creamy. mix in the cinnamon, nutmeg and heavy cream. chill. makes 1 pint.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. fresh cranberries, 3/4 c. sugar, grapes, cut in half and seeded if necessary, miniature marshmallows, broken nuts (walnuts or pecans), pineapple chunks (with juice), 2 Tbsp. flour, heavy cream, whipped with vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Grind the cranberries. Add sugar and mix. Heat pineapple juice with flour. Will thicken as it cools. Set aside until cool. Mix cranberry-sugar mixture with grapes, mini marshmallows, nuts and pineapple chunks. Add cooled juice-flour mixture. Mix. Blend in whipped cream. Chill until serving time. Doubles well.
GeneratedRecipe: chop cranberries fine. mix with marshmallows and let stand overnight. mix sugar, flour and vanilla until smooth. add pineapple, grapes and nuts. chill. add whipped cream just before serving.

Ingredients: 2 to 3 lb. chicken, cut into pieces, 1 1/2 qt. cold water, 3 c. flour, 1 walnut size lump butter, 3/4 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Cook chicken on medium heat for 1 hour. Take meat from bone; save or reserve to pour into chicken dumpling broth. Stir flour, butter and milk together until consistency stiff as pie crust dough. Lay onto slightly floured cutting board; roll with rolling pin until thin. Cut dough with knife into desired size pieces. Cook in boiling broth. Don't forget to put chicken in.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until tender. cool. cut in small pieces. add milk and 1 cup water. heat to boiling. thicken with flour and water. drop dough by tablespoons into boiling broth. reduce heat and simmer until thick. add butter and salt and pepper to taste.

Ingredients: 6 to 8 split chicken breasts, skinned and boned, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/4 or less cooking oil, 1 lime, juiced, 6 Tbsp. butter, 1 tsp. fresh chives, minced, 1/2 tsp. dill weed
ReferenceRecipe: Sprinkle chicken on both sides with salt and pepper. In large frying pan, place oil and heat to medium temperature. Add chicken; saute about 4 minutes, or until light brown. Turn chicken; cover and reduce heat to low. Cook for 10 minutes, or until fork can be inserted in chicken with ease. Remove chicken; drain off oil and discard. In same frying pan, add lime juice and cook over low heat until juice begins to bubble. Add butter, stirring until butter becomes opaque. Stir in chives and dill weed. Spoon over chicken. If chicken needs to be kept warm until meal is served, put back in pan with lime butter until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: sprinkle chicken with salt, pepper and dill weed. heat oil in large skillet over medium heat. add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. remove from skillet and keep warm.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. graham cracker crumbs, 2 3/4 c. powdered sugar, 1 c. melted butter, 2 c. creamy peanut butter, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips, 1/2 c. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Mix crumbs and powdered sugar. Add butter and mix well. Add peanut butter and walnuts; mix well. Spread in greased jelly roll pan. Melt 1/2 cup butter and chocolate together. Spread over graham mixture. Chill for 2 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: combine graham cracker crumbs, powdered sugar, peanut butter and butter. press into a 9 x 13-inch pan. melt chocolate chips and peanut butter over low heat, stirring until smooth. spread over peanut butter mixture. chill until firm. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 6 pork chops, butter, 2 c. onions, thinly sliced, 2 c. water, 1 1/3 c. quick rice, 1/2 tsp. savory salt, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Brown pork chops in butter; remove and saute onions. Add remaining ingredients to the onions. Lay chops on top. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown pork chops in butter. add onions and cook until tender. add rice, water, salt, pepper and savory. cover and simmer until rice is tender.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. firmly packed brown sugar, 1/8 tsp. ground cinnamon, dash of ground nutmeg, 2 c. thawed Cool Whip (lite) whipped topping
ReferenceRecipe: Mix sugar and spices in small bowl. Gently stir into whipped topping. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Sprinkle additional cinnamon on top, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: in small bowl, combine brown sugar, cinnamon and nutmeg. fold in whipped topping. chill. serve with fresh fruit.

Ingredients: 1 pt. rum, 16 oz. cream of coconut, 3 (6 oz.) cans lemonade, 1 can pineapple juice
ReferenceRecipe: Mix well and freeze. Scoop a couple of spoonfuls into a glass and add pop (7-Up, Squirt). Mix well and enjoy.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and freeze. when ready to serve, add 1 quart ginger ale. makes 1 gallon.

Ingredients: 1 (9-inch) baked pie shell, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 3/4 c. powdered sugar, 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 4 egg yolks, 1/2 c. water, 1 (4 serving) pkg. vanilla flavor pudding (not instant), 1 (8 oz.) container sour cream, Cool Whip for topping
ReferenceRecipe: In small bowl, cut peanut butter into powdered sugar until crumbly. Sprinkle into prepared crust (reserve small amount for topping). In medium saucepan, combine Eagle Brand milk, egg yolks, water and pudding mix. Over medium heat, cook until thickened. Cool 15 minutes. Beat in sour cream. Spoon into shell. Top with Cool Whip and sprinkle with reserved crumb mixture. Refrigerate leftovers.
GeneratedRecipe: in a medium bowl, beat peanut butter, powdered sugar and egg yolks until smooth. add sour cream; mix well. spread in bottom of pie shell. mix pudding and water. add sour cream mixture to the pudding mixture, then beat until thick. spread over crumbs. chill for 1 hour. top with cool whip before serving.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1 stick butter, 1/2 c. milk, 1/4 c. cocoa, 1/4 c. peanut butter, 2 1/2 c. rolled oats, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar, butter, milk and cocoa. Cook until mixture boils. Remove from heat. Add peanut butter, oats and vanilla. Drop onto wax paper or put in a sheet cake pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa, milk and butter. bring to a rolling boil and boil for 3 minutes. remove from heat. add peanut butter, rolled oats, peanut butter and vanilla. drop on wax paper.

Ingredients: 1 egg, beaten, 2 Tbsp. oil, 1 c. buttermilk, 1/2 c. whole wheat flour, 1/2 c. all-purpose flour, 1/2 tsp. baking soda, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/3 c. packed brown sugar, 1/2 c. plus 2 Tbsp. quick oats
ReferenceRecipe: In a mixing bowl, combine egg, oil and buttermilk. Combine flour, baking soda, salt and sugar; add to egg mixture. Stir in oats. Pour by 1/3 cupfuls onto lightly greased hot griddle. Turn when bubbles form on top of pancakes and start to pop. Yields about 10 pancakes.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking soda and salt. in another bowl, stir together buttermilk, egg and oil. add to dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.

Ingredients: pineapple slices, sugar, flour, pineapple juice, grated cheese, maraschino cherries
ReferenceRecipe: Arrange pineapple slices on large glass dish or tray, using crisp lettuce leaves under each. Cover with sauce, spooned on.
GeneratedRecipe: combine flour and sugar; add juice and pineapple slices. cook on low heat and let stand 2 hours. pour over hot, baked ham and sprinkle with cheese.

Ingredients: 1/2 box spaghetti, 4 Tbsp. flour, 1 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 1/2 c. cheese, grated fine, 4 Tbsp. butter, 2 c. tomatoes, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 can tomato sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Boil spaghetti in a large saucepan, drain and place in a serving dish. In a skillet, melt butter. Add onion and cook until tender. Blend in flour, mixing well. Add remaining ingredients except the cheese. Cook thoroughly. Just before serving, add cheese and cook only long enough to melt cheese. Pour over cooked spaghetti. Serves 6 to 8.
GeneratedRecipe: cook spaghetti according to package directions. drain and set aside. saute onion in butter until tender. blend in flour, salt, pepper and sugar. add tomatoes, tomato sauce and cheese. cook until cheese melts.

Ingredients: 1 lb. butter, 1 1/2 c. sugar, 15 oz. box yellow raisins, 6 eggs, separated, 2 oz. bottle lemon extract, 16 oz. walnuts, 3 c. flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, mixed in 1 Tbsp. water
ReferenceRecipe: Cream butter, sugar, egg yolks, one at a time. Add lemon extract and soda water. In a separate bowl, mix raisins and nuts thoroughly in flour. Add this to butter mix. Beat egg whites and fold into mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: cream butter and sugar. then beat egg yolks and water together. combine flour and baking soda and stir into butter mixture. add raisins and nuts. combine flour mixture with raisins and walnuts. add raisins. fold in egg whites.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour, 1 c. salt, 4 tsp. cream of tartar, 2 Tbsp. oil, 2 c. water, food coloring (color of choice)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. When mixture is smooth, put on burner. Cook all ingredients until the play dough is formed.
GeneratedRecipe: combine in saucepan the flour and salt. add the water, oil, and food color of the food coloring; mix well. cook until mixture leaves bottom of pan over low heat and cook until it forms a thick paste. add food coloring, if desired. let cool and knead in food coloring. store.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. honey or syrup, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 1/4 c. firmly packed brown sugar, 1/4 c. instant milk (dry), 1/4 c. raisins, 1/2 c. coarsely chopped nuts, 3 1/2 c. Special K
ReferenceRecipe: Measure honey, peanut butter and brown sugar. Cook over medium heat until melted and well blended. Add nuts and dry milk. Add raisins, peanuts and Special K. Stir until well coated. Press into buttered pan.
GeneratedRecipe: in saucepan, combine honey and syrup. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. remove from heat; stir in peanut butter and raisins, stirring until smooth. stir in special k. combine special k cereal, nuts and raisins. mix well. press into greased 9-inch square pan. chill until firm. cut into squares. makes about 2 dozen.

Ingredients: 1 1/4 lb. pkg. Oreos, 1/2 c. melted margarine, 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 2 (8 oz.) Cool Whip, 2 small chocolate instant pudding, 1 c. powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Crush Oreos; reserve 1 cup. Mix remainder with melted margarine. Press into 13 x 9-inch pan; chill 1/2 hour. Blend softened cream cheese with powdered sugar. Fold in 8 ounces Cool Whip. Spread over Oreo crust and chill 1/2 hour. Prepare instant pudding. Spread over cream cheese layer. Chill. Top with 8 ounces Cool Whip. Sprinkle with crushed cookies remaining and chopped nuts (optional).
GeneratedRecipe: crush oreo cookies. mix melted margarine and cream cheese in a large bowl. beat powdered sugar and cool completely ( not pudding ). add cool whip and cream cheese mixture to pudding mixture. crush remaining oreos and put on bottom of flowerpot. alternate the cookie crumbs, pudding and cool whip mixture and chill at least 30 minutes. top with gummy worms. keep chilled until ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. shortening, cold water, 3 eggs, 2 c. cooked strained squash, 1/2 c. honey, 1 1/2 c. evaporated milk, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg, 1/2 tsp. cloves, 1/2 tsp. ginger
ReferenceRecipe: Sift flour and salt into bowl; add shortening. Cut in with pastry blender until combined. Cut in a small amount of water to hold together from bowl. Roll on floured board; fit into 10-inch pie pan, letting pastry hang over 1/2 inch. Fold under extra 1/2 inch; flute edges.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, shortening, salt and ginger. mix in water, honey, nutmeg, spices and vanilla. stir into squash and evaporated milk. pour into greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch pan.

Ingredients: 1 can French-style beans, 1 can wax beans, 1 can kidney beans, 1 can baby lima beans, 1/2 c. green pepper, chopped, 1/2 c. sliced onion, 1/2 c. vinegar, 3/4 c. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Drain beans. Mix chopped green pepper and onion together. Mix vinegar, oil, pepper, salt and sugar. Heat to boiling. Pour over beans. Let cool overnight. Keeps several days in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: drain all beans and lima beans. add onion and green pepper to onion and green pepper. mix vinegar, sugar, salt and pepper to the liquid. pour over bean mixture and chill for 24 hours.

Ingredients: 9-inch pie shell, cooked, 1 pt. vanilla ice cream, 1 c. canned pumpkin, 3/4 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. each: nutmeg, ginger and cinnamon, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 c. whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Line pie shell with ice cream. Make layer 1/2-inch thick. Place in freezer. Blend together the pumpkin, sugar, nutmeg, ginger, cinnamon and salt. Whip cream until stiff; fold into pumpkin mixture. Spoon over ice cream in pie shell. Return to freezer for at least 2 hours. Let stand at room temperature 5 minutes before cutting.
GeneratedRecipe: combine pumpkin, sugar, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and vanilla. whip cream until stiff. fold into pumpkin mixture. pour into pie shell. chill. top with whipped cream.

Ingredients: 1 (9 oz.) pkg. green beans, 1 lb. hamburger, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/4 c. soy sauce, 1/8 tsp. garlic, minced, 1/8 tsp. ground pepper, 2 c. cooked rice, 2 Tbsp. oleo, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 can bean sprouts
ReferenceRecipe: Rinse green beans under hot water to separate. Brown meat and onion; drain. Add soy sauce, 2 tablespoons water, garlic and pepper. Remove and keep warm. Add beans to skillet and cook 2 to 3 minutes. Stir in rice and push mixture up sides of skillet. Melt oleo in center. Add eggs and fry until set. Stir rice and meat mixture carefully into egg mixture. Stir in sprouts and cook 1 to 2 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion and green pepper in oleo until tender. add hamburger and cook until brown. add beans, bean sprouts, soy sauce, garlic and pepper. cook 5 minutes. stir in rice and eggs.

Ingredients: 5 Tbsp. peanut butter, 2 c. milk, 2 c. chocolate ice cream
ReferenceRecipe: Mix in blender or mixing bowl until foamy.
GeneratedRecipe: put the peanut butter in bowl. add milk and ice cream; mix until smooth. serve. serves 2.

Ingredients: 1 3/4 sticks margarine, 1 box brown sugar, 3 eggs, 2 3/4 c. plain flour, 1 1/2 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 1 (6 oz.) pkg. chocolate bits, 1 c. chopped nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together the margarine and brown sugar. Add eggs and beat well. Sift plain flour, baking powder and salt. Cream this with eggs, chocolate bits and chopped nuts.
GeneratedRecipe: cream margarine and brown sugar. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. sift flour, baking powder and salt together and add to creamed mixture. stir in chocolate bits and nuts.

Ingredients: 1 9 inch pie shell, baked, 4 c. fresh blueberries, 1 c. sugar, 3 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 c. water, 1 Tbsp. butter, whipped cream
ReferenceRecipe: Place 2 cups blueberries in pie shell. Cook remaining berries with sugar, cornstarch, salt and water over medium heat until thickened. Remove from heat. Add butter and cool. Pour over berries in pie shell and chill. Top with whipped cream. It seems easier to heat the sugar, cornstarch and water before you put the berries in to cook.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, cornstarch and salt. gradually add water; boil until clear. remove from heat and stir in blueberries. refrigerate until cool. pour into baked pie shell. cool whip cream; pour cooled mixture over berries. garnish with whipped cream.

Ingredients: 1 (9 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, melted, 6 (1 oz.) sq. unsweetened chocolate, 6 c. powdered sugar, 2 tsp. vanilla, dash of salt, nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Let cream cheese set at room temperature. Add sugar to cream cheese and cream together. Add melted chocolate, vanilla, salt and nuts (if desired). Press fudge into buttered 9 x 13-inch pan and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together cream cheese and powdered sugar. add salt, vanilla and nuts. mix well. spread in buttered 8-inch square pan. chill until firm. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 4 Idaho potatoes, baked, 3 Tbsp. butter, melted, salt, garlic powder and paprika to taste, bacon bits
ReferenceRecipe: Cut potatoes in half lengthwise. Scoop out the insides and serve as mashed potatoes, leaving 1/4-inch of potato to the shell. Halve shells lengthwise. On baking sheet, brush skins with butter and sprinkle lightly with salt, garlic powder, bacon bits and paprika. Broil until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Makes 16 potato snacks.
GeneratedRecipe: peel and scrub potatoes, leaving just a little bit soft. boil until done and let them cool. take potatoes and place skins on a plate. add butter, paprika, garlic powder, salt and paprika to taste. cover potatoes with foil and cook for 20 - 25 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. Velveeta cheese, 1 (10 oz.) can Rotel tomatoes with green chiles
ReferenceRecipe: Pour Rotel tomatoes into medium saucepan: add cheese. Cook over low heat; serve with favorite chips.
GeneratedRecipe: heat tomatoes and green chiles in microwave for 5 minutes or until soft. add cheese and stir until melted. serve with chips.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. vegetable oil, 4 sq. unsweetened chocolate, 2 c. sugar, 4 eggs, 2 tsp. vanilla, 2 c. flour, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Mix oil, chocolate and sugar. Blend in one egg at a time until well mixed. Add vanilla. Measure flour, baking powder and salt; stir into oil mixture. Chill several hours or overnight.
GeneratedRecipe: melt chocolate and oil in double boiler. add sugar, eggs and vanilla. sift together flour, baking powder, salt and baking powder. add to chocolate mixture and mix well.

Ingredients: 1 box pistachio pudding, 1 container Cool Whip, 1/2 c. pecans, 1 can crushed pineapple
ReferenceRecipe: Mix dry pudding and pineapple. Add Cool Whip and pecans. Refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: mix pudding and pineapple together. add cool whip and pecans. mix well and chill. serves 6 to 8.

Ingredients: 2 slices bacon, 1 large green pepper, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1 large red pepper, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1 large yellow peppers, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1/4 tsp. oregano leaves, 2 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley
ReferenceRecipe: In a large skillet, saute bacon until crisp. Break up into small pieces and drain! Save drippings. Add peppers and oregano to skillet. Cook until tender. Stir in bacon. Season and sprinkle with parsley. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, cook bacon over medium heat until crisp. remove bacon and set aside. add green peppers, parsley, oregano and pepper to bacon drippings in skillet. cook and stir until bacon is crisp. add peppers and bacon; toss to coat. serve immediately. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1/2 c. vegetable oil, 2 eggs, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1/2 c. cocoa, 2/3 c. flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. baking powder
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients in bowl. Beat at low speed for 2 minutes. Spread into greased pan and bake 25 minutes. Cool.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine sugar, oil, eggs and vanilla. beat until well blended. stir in flour, cocoa, baking powder and salt.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. chocolate cookie crumbs, 1 1/2 pt. vanilla ice cream, 1/4 c. butter, 1/4 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Roll thin chocolate wafers with a rolling pin to make crumbs. Cream the butter; add crumbs and sugar; blend thoroughly. Cover crumbs with ice cream, packing down well. Press remaining crumbs firmly on top. Garnish with whipped cream. Return to refrigerator to freeze.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cookie crumbs, sugar and butter. press into 9-inch pie plate. freeze until firm. spread ice cream over ice cream. top with remaining crumbs. freeze.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 1 can condensed milk, 1/2 c. lemon juice, 1 graham cracker crust
ReferenceRecipe: Mix cream cheese, condensed milk and lemon juice together and pour into graham cracker crust. Chill and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese and condensed milk until smooth. add lemon juice and mix well. pour into graham cracker crust and chill.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. corn bread mix (Martha White Cotton Pickin corn bread mix), 2 large tomatoes, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/2 c. bell pepper, chopped, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Cook corn bread mix like package says. Let it cool. Crumble up. Put in large bowl and mix all ingredients together. Let set in the refrigerator several hours before serving. Keep in covered dish in refrigerator until eaten.
GeneratedRecipe: cook corn bread according to package directions. drain and cool. crumble corn bread into large bowl. add onion, bell pepper, tomatoes and tomatoes. mix mayonnaise, mustard and mustard. pour over corn bread and mix well.

Ingredients: 6 c. peeled zucchini, chopped fine or grated, 1 can crushed pineapple, drained, 1/2 c. lemon juice, 6 c. sugar, 2 pkg. apricot jello (3 oz. size)
ReferenceRecipe: Boil zucchini 6 minutes and drain well. Add pineapple, lemon juice and sugar. Boil all together 10 minutes, then add jello. Mix well.	Ladle into jars. Put wax on top or put flats and rings on and they will seal. Tastes a lot like apricot jam.
GeneratedRecipe: cook zucchini and sugar until tender. add pineapple and lemon juice. boil 5 minutes. remove from heat and add jello. stir until dissolved. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1/2 c. peanut butter, 1 c. powdered sugar, 2 Tbsp. milk, 4 oz. Cool Whip, chocolate flavored crumb pie shell or graham cracker shell, chocolate flavored syrup (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: In large mixer bowl, combine cream cheese and peanut butter, beat with electric mixer until combined. Add powdered sugar and milk, beat until combined. Fold in whipped topping. Spoon into pie shell. Cover and chill in freezer for 15 minutes. If desired, drizzle each serving with chocolate syrup.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together the cheese, powdered sugar, peanut butter and milk. beat until fluffy. fold in cool whip. pour into pie shell. top with chocolate syrup, if desired. refrigerate at least 3 hours before serving.

Ingredients: 24 whole graham crackers, 1 large box instant vanilla pudding mix, 1 c. lite cool whip, 1/2 can lite chocolate frosting
ReferenceRecipe: Make pudding with skim milk according to package directions. Fold in cool whip. In 13x9 pan layer 8 whole graham crackers; top with one half the pudding mixture. Layer 8 more crackers and remaining pudding. Layer with last crackers on top. Thin frosting with a little milk and spread on top. Chill at least 4 hours. Serves 15.
GeneratedRecipe: mix and pour mixture over crackers. put layer of whole graham crackers on bottom of 13 x 9-inch pan. mix pudding according to box directions. spread over crackers. add cool whip. sprinkle remaining crackers on top. put chocolate frosting over all. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 2 lb. powdered sugar, 1 can canned milk, 1/2 lb. oleo, 1/2 tsp. cornstarch, 10 1/2 oz. small marshmallows, 2 c. peanut butter (creamy)*
ReferenceRecipe: Stir constantly first 4 ingredients until boiling; boil (full rolling) for 7 minutes. In a large mixing bowl, combine marshmallows and peanut butter. Pour hot mixture over marshmallows and beat with mixer until well blended. Pour into buttered cookie sheet. Let cool and cut.
GeneratedRecipe: * if you do n't have to add a little more milk. if it is too thick, add more powdered sugar.

Ingredients: 2 lb. ground beef or veal, 1/4 c. onion flakes, 2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper, 1/4 c. parsley, 2 Tbsp. green peppers, 1 small ball gargel
ReferenceRecipe: Mix and make small balls. Brown in skillet.
GeneratedRecipe: saute ground beef, onion, salt and pepper in skillet. add the other ingredients. simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes. add the green peppers ( or green peppers ).

Ingredients: 20 oz. pkg. Oreos, crushed, 1 Tbsp. butter, melted, 1/2 gal. vanilla ice cream, 2 jars hot fudge, 1 large container Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix Oreos with melted butter (save 1 ounce without butter). Spread Oreos in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Press firmly in pan. Spread softened vanilla ice cream over Oreos. Spread 2 jars hot fudge on top of ice cream, saving some hot fudge for garnish. Spread Cool Whip over hot fudge. To garnish, sprinkle 1 ounce Oreos and drizzle remaining hot fudge on top of Cool Whip. Cut into squares to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: crush oreos and mix with melted butter. press into a 9 x 13-inch pan. spread softened ice cream over crust. spread cool whip over ice cream. top with hot fudge. freeze.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. cocoa, 1/4 c. butter, 1/4 c. milk, 1 c. sugar, pinch of salt
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients and boil for 1 minute. Remove from heat. Beat until creamy enough to spread.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cocoa, sugar and salt in saucepan. add milk and butter. bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. boil for 2 minutes. remove from heat. add vanilla. beat until thick enough to spread.

Ingredients: 2 slices sandwich bread, 1/2 Tbsp. butter, margarine or spread, 2 tsp. jam or jelly (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Plug in toaster to most convenient electric outlet. Place bread slices into slots on top of toaster (one in each slot). Press down on handle in front of toaster. If handle returns to the up position immediately, along with bread, press down on handle again, only harder. Wait. When bread, now toasted, pops up from the slots, remove them. Use knife to apply other ingredients as desired.
GeneratedRecipe: spread butter or margarine on one side of each slice of bread. top with jam and jelly. roll up jelly roll fashion. secure with toothpicks.

Ingredients: 1 chicken, 1 c. dry white wine, water, 1 large onion, chopped, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken in large stock pot with enough water to cover. Add wine; put on lid. Bring to a boil. Scrape off any scum that may form. Lower the heat; add vegetables, salt and pepper. Simmer for 1 hour. Remove chicken; let cool. Remove any meat on bones; reserve for other uses. Return bones and skin to stockpot. Simmer for 2 hours. Strain the stock into containers. This will keep for 3 to 4 weeks in refrigerator. Can be frozen. Makes about 1 gallon.
GeneratedRecipe: season chicken with salt and pepper. place in crock-pot. add onion, wine and water. cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.

Ingredients: 1 c. Tang, 1/4 c. lemon and sugar tea mix (instant), 1/2 tsp. cloves, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: To Use: 2 teaspoons mix to 1 cup hot or cold water.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. store in airtight container. use 2 teaspoons per cup of hot water. makes 1 cup of tea.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked chicken, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1 jar mushrooms or fresh mushrooms if you prefer, 1 onion (medium), 1 c. converted rice, 1/2 c. celery, 1/2 c. green pepper, 1/4 c. milk, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Saute onion and mushrooms in margarine. Add two cups chicken broth from cooked chicken. Bring to boil. Add converted rice and cook, covered, for 15 minutes. Chop the celery and green pepper. Add to rice along with 2 cups chicken, milk, salt and pepper to taste. Simmer 20 minutes, covered.
GeneratedRecipe: chop onion, green pepper and mushrooms into small pieces. saute in margarine. add chicken and rice, stirring until lightly browned. add milk gradually. when done pour over cooked chicken, rice; season with salt and pepper. add soy sauce to taste.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. Bisquick, 3 eggs, 1 c. sugar, 2/3 c. canned pumpkin, 1 c. chopped nuts, 2 tsp. cinnamon, 1 tsp. pumpkin pie spice, 1/2 tsp. nutmeg
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oven to 375 degrees. Line a jelly roll pan with wax paper and grease. Beat eggs and sugar until fluffy. Add pumpkin. Add dry ingredients and stir in. Pour into pan. Spread evenly and sprinkle with nuts. Bake 13 to 15 minutes. Invert pan onto towel sprinkled with confectioners sugar. Roll up in towel and cool completely. Unroll and spread with filling. Reroll and refrigerate until ready to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs, sugar, pumpkin, spices and bisquick. pour into a greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan. bake for 45 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 c. flour (sift or spoon into cup), 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. vegetable shortening, 1 egg yolk, milk
ReferenceRecipe: Mix flour, sugar and salt in bowl. Cut in shortening as for pie crust. Put egg yolk in measuring cup and fill with milk to 2/3 cup mark. Add to pie crust mixture an blend just until mixed. Divide dough in half and roll half on floured cloth to fit into jelly roll pan, 15 1/2 x 10 1/2-inch.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, sugar and salt. cut in shortening. blend in egg yolk and milk. add to flour mixture. roll into a ball. roll between wax paper to fit pie pan.

Ingredients: 6 oz. tri-colored rotini, cooked and drained, 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. reduced-calorie tub margarine, 1 Tbsp. chopped fresh basil, sage or oregano, 1/4 tsp. garlic salt, freshly ground black pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place pasta, margarine, herbs, garlic, salt and pepper in large serving bowl; toss until margarine is melted. Makes 4 servings. Each serving provides: 1FA, 2B.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine; stir in herbs. add garlic; cook 1 or 2 minutes. stir in rotini; stir. add basil, salt and pepper to taste. toss and serve. serves 4.

Ingredients: 2 c. flour (plain), 3 tsp. baking powder, 3/4 c. milk, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. shortening
ReferenceRecipe: Sift flour, baking powder and salt together. Cut in shortening. Add milk; have the broth boiling and drop by spoonfuls into it. Cover and cook about 10 minutes. The liquid must be kept boiling. Stir occasionally to keep from sticking. Serve while hot.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, baking powder and salt. cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse meal. add milk and mix well. roll out on floured board. cut into squares. drop into boiling broth. cover and cook 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 10 potatoes (the size of an egg), 2 c. sugar, 2 c. water, 1/4 lb. butter, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Select and wash potatoes. Put in pot. Cover with water. Cook until skin will slip. Drain off hot water. Cover with cold water and peel. Put the sugar, water, butter, vanilla and salt on stove. Cook until thick as syrup. Drop in peeled potatoes. Cook until syrup is thick. Turn potatoes once while cooking.
GeneratedRecipe: boil potatoes until tender. peel and mash. add sugar, salt, butter, vanilla and egg. beat until smooth.

Ingredients: 1 lb. bulk sausage (lite or regular), 3 c. Bisquick, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. Cheddar cheese (sharp)
ReferenceRecipe: Knead uncooked sausage, Bisquick and cheese. Roll into bite size balls. Cook until brown, or about 20 or 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown sausage and drain. add cheese and bisquick. mix well. roll into small balls and place on cookie sheet. bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 large pkg. cream cheese, 1 c. salad dressing, 1 c. pineapple, 1 bottle cherries, 1 c. dates, 1 c. nuts, 1 pt. whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Cream the cheese and salad dressing. Chop fine the pineapple, cherries, dates and nuts and add to creamed cheese. Whip the cream and fold into first mixture. Pour into mold and freeze.
GeneratedRecipe: soften cream cheese; drain. add pineapple, chopped nuts, dates and salad dressing. whip cream and fold into cheese mixture. chill and serve.

Ingredients: 5 c. grated zucchini, 5 c. sugar, 1 (20 oz.) can crushed pineapple, 2 (3 oz.) pkg. orange jello, 2 Tbsp. orange peel or McCormick's
ReferenceRecipe: Boil everything, except jello and peel, together for 15 minutes to a rolling boil, stirring often. Add jello and orange peel last. Put into sterile jars and seal. Makes 9 (1/2 pint) jars. Can use other fruit, such as berries or peaches (match jello).
GeneratedRecipe: cook zucchini and sugar until tender. add pineapple and orange peel. boil 5 minutes. remove from heat and add jello. stir until dissolved. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 3 3/4 c. sugar, 1 1/2 c. white syrup, 1 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Boil until it forms a hard ball in a cup of cold water. Remove from heat. Add your choice of flavoring and food coloring.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar, syrup and water until it forms a soft ball in cold water. remove from heat and add 1 teaspoon vanilla. beat until thick enough to spread.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. chopped dried apricots, 1/3 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 (8-inch) graham cracker pie shell
ReferenceRecipe: Cook apricots with 1 1/2 cups water in saucepan until tender. Blend sugar, salt, cornstarch and 3 tablespoons apricot liquid in small bowl. Stir into apricots. Cook until thick, stirring constantly. Cool. Spoon into pie shell. Chill until serving time.
GeneratedRecipe: in a saucepan, combine apricots, sugar, cornstarch and salt. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and boils. boil 1 minute. remove from heat. stir in apricots. pour into pie shell. chill. serve with whipped cream.

Ingredients: 12 eggs, 1 large or 2 medium onions, sauteed, 1/3 lb. sauteed mushrooms, 3 c. Sauce (see below), toast
ReferenceRecipe: Hard boil the eggs. Separate yolks and whites. Chop up whites and crumble yolks, separately, with a fork. Mix egg whites, onions and mushrooms into the sauce. Serve on toast. Sprinkle crumbled egg yolk on top. Sprinkle with paprika. Serve while hot. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: chop onions and mushrooms. saute in butter until tender. add eggs and mix well. add sauteed onions and sauteed mushrooms. cook until eggs are done. serve over toast.

Ingredients: 16 oz. rotel tomatoes, 2 Tbsp. butter, salt, 1/4 tsp. oregano, 7 oz. cooked elbow macaroni, 1/4 c onion chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Simmer all together 10 to 15 minutes, sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in heavy skillet, add rotel tomatoes and onion. cook over medium heat until tender. add salt, oregano and oregano to taste. cook over low heat until macaroni is done, stirring occasionally. sprinkle with parmesan cheese.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1 small carton sour cream, 8 oz. Cheddar cheese, grated, 1 small onion, grated, garlic salt to taste, 1 tsp. chives (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Fix the night before. Serve at room temperature.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients except chives. blend well. add cheddar cheese and mix thoroughly. if too stiff, add a bit of sour cream to desired consistency. chill.

Ingredients: 2 cans Early June peas, 1 onion, chopped fine, 8 oz. Cheddar cheese, shredded, 2 eggs, boiled and chopped up, 1/2 c. Miracle Whip, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. garlic, 1/2 tsp. oregano
ReferenceRecipe: Drain peas well, then mix all together and let refrigerate for 24 hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. chill and serve. serves 8 to 10 people. can be made ahead of time and refrigerated.

Ingredients: 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 2 boxes (2 lb.) powdered sugar, 1 stick margarine, 4 c. pecans or 2 c. pecans and 2 c. coconut, 12 oz. semi chocolate bits, 1/8 lb. paraffin wax
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together ingredients except chocolate and paraffin wax. When mixed, refrigerate 30 minutes; roll into small balls. Refrigerate 30 minutes again. Melt the chocolate and paraffin wax in double boiler. Dip each ball and drop on wax paper. Keep on low heat as wax will catch on fire. Ice pick or small fork good to handle balls.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, milk, margarine and pecans. roll into small balls. melt chocolate bits and paraffin in double boiler. dip balls in chocolate mixture and place on wax paper.

Ingredients: 2 c. mashed, cooked sweet potatoes, 1 c. firmly packed brown sugar, 1 c. light cream, 1/2 c. milk, 3 eggs, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1 tsp. ground nutmeg, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger, 1 9 inch deep dish pie shell, 1/2 c. whipped cream
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sweet potatoes, brown sugar, cream, milk, eggs, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and ginger in a large mixing bowl; Pour into pastry shell. Bake in preheated 350 degree oven for 50 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean. Garnish with whipped cream.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sweet potatoes, sugar, eggs, milk, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and nutmeg. mix well. pour into pie shell.

Ingredients: 5 c. blackberries, 3 c. sugar, water to dissolve sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cook until bubbles come up and burst. Fill hot jars and seal.
GeneratedRecipe: wash and hull blackberries. place in a large kettle. add sugar and water. bring to a boil. boil for 10 minutes. remove from heat and skim off foam. pour into hot jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 gal. chopped tomatoes, 8 jalapeno peppers, chopped, 2 medium onions, 3/4 c. vinegar, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 3 sweet peppers
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together; bring to a boil and boil 10 minutes. Fill jars; process in hot water bath for 10 minutes. Makes 9 pints.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and cook for 1 hour. put in jars and seal. makes 6 to 8 pints.

Ingredients: 1 pt. fresh clean spinach, coarsely chopped, 2 Tbsp. chopped scallions, 2 Tbsp. chopped olives, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 (12 oz.) can chunk tuna in water, 2 Tbsp. French dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Mix spinach, scallions and olives. Sprinkle with salt. Mix tuna and French dressing and let stand 10 to 15 minutes. Just before serving, toss spinach and tuna mixtures. Serve with additional French dressing and hard-cooked eggs. Makes 3 to 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: remove the tough ends from spinach and remove any stems. wash and remove leaves. rinse spinach and dry. in a colander, drain and rinse with cold water. in a bowl, combine the tuna mixture, olives, scallions and french dressing. toss gently and serve on lettuce leaves.

Ingredients: 2 c. pecan halves, 1 c. sugar, 1/2 c. dark corn syrup, 1/2 stick butter, 1-inch sq. paraffin, 2 tsp. soda
ReferenceRecipe: Microwave sugar, syrup and butter 3 minutes on High. Stir in paraffin to melt. Stir in nuts. Mix well and microwave on High 7 to 12 minutes, checking nuts several times to make sure they don't burn. Add soda, quickly stir and pour onto greased surface. Cool and break into pieces. Store in airtight container.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, corn syrup and paraffin in a heavy saucepan. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. boil for 5 minutes. remove from heat and add soda. stir until well coated. drop by spoonfuls onto waxed paper.

Ingredients: 1 stick margarine, 1 1/2 c. sugar, 2 eggs, 1 c. buttermilk, 2 c. flour, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. vanilla, 4 to 5 c. rhubarb, diced
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together first 3 ingredients. Add next 5 ingredients. Put rhubarb on top of batter mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: cream margarine; add sugar and beat well. add eggs, buttermilk and vanilla. sift flour, baking soda and salt. add to mixture alternately with buttermilk. add rhubarb and rhubarb to rhubarb mixture.

Ingredients: 1 c. self-rising flour, 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 egg, milk (to moisten)
ReferenceRecipe: Spoon into skillet of hot oil. Cook approximately 3 minutes on each side.
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg. add all the other ingredients and beat again. drop by spoonful on hot griddle with small amount of oil. cook until light brown.

Ingredients: 8 graham cracker squares, 12 Tbsp. peanut butter, raisins
ReferenceRecipe: On each cracker, spread peanut butter and then sprinkle with raisins. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: spread peanut butter on graham cracker. put raisins on top of peanut butter. put in refrigerator until ready to eat.

Ingredients: 6 c. strawberries, 5 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine strawberries and sugar; cook 15 to 20 minutes. Add lemon juice; cook 10 minutes more. Pour into containers and freeze.
GeneratedRecipe: combine strawberries and sugar in a large saucepan. bring to a boil, stirring constantly. boil for 5 minutes. remove from heat. stir in lemon juice. pour into sterilized jars and seal.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked green beans, drained, 6 plum tomatoes, chopped, 1 c. fat-free shredded Mozzarella cheese, 1/4 c. chopped fresh basil, 1/3 c. Good Seasons Italian fat-free dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Place beans, tomatoes, cheese and basil in a large bowl. Pour dressing over beans. Refrigerate at least one hour.
GeneratedRecipe: toss vegetables with dressing and refrigerate for 1 hour. toss with cheese. makes 8 servings.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. oil, 2 Tbsp. butter, 2 1/2 lb. chicken parts, 3 Tbsp. flour, 1 c. dry white wine, 1 c. water, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/4 tsp. garlic powder, salt and pepper, 1 tsp. dried parsley, 1/8 tsp. thyme, 1/2 bay leaf, 2 tsp. tomato paste, 1/2 lb. mushrooms, 2 Tbsp. oil
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oil and butter in frying pan; brown the chicken. Sprinkle with flour; let it brown. Add the wine, water, spices and tomato paste. Cook for 45 minutes. Prepare mushrooms; saute in oil and add to chicken. Cook for 15 minutes more.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, melt butter. brown chicken pieces on all sides. add onion, parsley, salt, garlic and thyme. brown chicken in butter. add tomato paste and water. add tomato paste; simmer 45 minutes. add wine and simmer for 15 minutes. add mushrooms and cook another 10 minutes. serve over white rice.

Ingredients: 6 thick pork chops, trimmed, salt and pepper to taste, 1/4 c. minced onion, 1 can cream of chicken soup (undiluted), 3 Tbsp. catsup, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Brown chops in trimmed pork fat; drain excess fat. Season chops with salt and pepper. Top with onion.
GeneratedRecipe: in skillet, brown pork chops on both sides. spoon off fat. stir in soup, catsup, worcestershire sauce, salt and pepper. pour over chops. cover and cook over low heat for 45 minutes or until chops are tender.

Ingredients: 1 pt. whipping cream, 1 pt. half and half, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 c. milk, 1 Tbsp. butter, 2 Tbsp. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter in saucepan. Mix in flour slowly; stir in milk, bringing slowly to a boil. On low heat, in a separate pan, whisk whipping cream and half and half together with cornstarch. Blend two mixtures together.
GeneratedRecipe: combine milk and flour in saucepan. gradually add half and half and half. cook until thickened. add butter, salt and cornstarch mixture. stir constantly until thickened and bubbly. add whipping cream to desired thickness. pour into baked pie shell. top with meringue and brown.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 1/4 c. cocoa, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together. Cook on medium heat and bring to a rolling boil that won't stir down. Boil 1 minute, remove from heat and add 1 tsp. vanilla. Cool and beat until thick enough to spread.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa and milk. bring to a boil. boil for 2 minutes. remove from heat. add margarine and vanilla. beat until thick enough to spread.
