Ingredients: 1 pkg. lemon flavored gelatin, 3/4 c. syrup from fruit cocktail, 1 c. cottage cheese, 1 1/2 c. drained fruit cocktail, 1/2 c. chopped nuts, 1/2 c. chopped unpeeled apple, 1/4 c. lemon juice, 1 c. Carnation milk (undiluted)
ReferenceRecipe: Heat syrup until hot. Pour over gelatin. Mix all other ingredients. Pour gelatin over salad. Mix well. Pour into shallow bowl. Chill and serve each square in lettuce cup.
GeneratedRecipe: drain fruit cocktail, measuring 3/4 cup; save syrup. heat juice to boiling in medium saucepan and add gelatin. blend in milk until dissolved. remove from heat; stir in softened gelatin. refrigerate until partially set. stir in cottage cheese until smooth. stir in fruit cocktail, fruit cocktail, fruit cocktail and nuts. pour in gelatin mold and chill until firm. unmold onto serving bowl. serve with mayonnaise.

Ingredients: sliced apples, sliced kiwi, orange wedges, grapes, large chunks sliced bananas, chunked pineapple (fresh or canned)
ReferenceRecipe: Pour canned pineapple juice over fruit. It will keep for days without coloring.
GeneratedRecipe: arrange fruit in a large bowl. sprinkle with orange wedges. serve chilled. serves 4 to 6.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1/4 c. maple, blended or maple flavored syrup, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 medium banana, mashed, 1 (8 3/4 oz.) can crushed pineapple, drained, 1/2 c. chopped dates, 1/2 c. chopped pecans, 1 c. whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Cream cheese; beat in syrup, lemon juice and banana. Stir in pineapple, dates and nuts. Fold in whipped cream. Put paper bake cups in muffin tin and fill with salad. Freeze until firm. Let stand for 15 to 20 minutes at room temperature before serving. Serve on lettuce with pineapple slices and garnish with cherry.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese at medium speed until light and fluffy. add maple syrup, pineapple and nuts. stir in banana and lemon juice. fold in whipping cream. place in refrigerator tray. freeze until firm.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 c. flour, 2 pkg. unsweetened Kool-Aid, 2 c. boiling water, 1/2 c. salt, 3 Tbsp. oil
ReferenceRecipe: Mix dry ingredients and add water and oil. Stir quickly over medium heat mixing well. When cool, mix with hands. Wrap in small balls in Ziploc baggies. Smells great and lasts "forever."
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, kool-aid and salt. add oil and boiling water. mix well. store in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 2 2/3 lb. winter squash, 2 chicken legs, 12 slices cooked ham, 6 Chinese black mushrooms, 3 dried scallops, 2 (1 1/2-inch) pieces green onions, 2 slices ginger root, 1 Tbsp. cooking wine or sherry, 6 c. stock or water, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, dash of black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Pare the winter squash and scoop out balls with melon ball scooper. Cut the chicken legs through the bone into bite size pieces. Blanch the chicken pieces in boiling water. Remove, drain and discard the water. Soak the dried scallops in water for 1 hour. Remove and drain. Place the remaining ingredients (except pepper) in a casserole. Stew over medium heat for 40 minutes. Add the black pepper. Transfer to a serving bowl and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: combine chicken stock, water, sherry, ginger, salt, black pepper and ginger in a medium size saucepan. cover and simmer for 20 minutes. remove scallops. remove ham and reserve marinade. place ham in a large frying pan and brown quickly on both sides. add mushrooms and green onions to pan. add chicken; cook 3 minutes. add sherry, cover and simmer 5 to 10 minutes more. remove scallops to platter. add wine, water and sherry to pan and pour over squash mixture. serves 4.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 3 cloves garlic, sliced, 1/3 onion, chopped, 4 chicken breasts, boneless, 1/2 lb. mushrooms, cut in half, 1/2 c. white wine, 1 c. chicken stock, salt, pepper, 1 Tbsp. flour, 1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped, 1 lb. kuski noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Cut chicken into bite-size pieces. Place olive oil and garlic in saute pan. Add chicken and mushrooms. Saute until tender. Add wine and reduce in half. Add chicken stock and salt and pepper to taste. Add water to flour to make a roux and add to sauce. Heat until sauce thickens. Add parsley. Pour sauce over pasta and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: saute garlic, onion and mushrooms in olive oil until onions are translucent in large skillet. add chicken stock, parsley, parsley, mushrooms, salt, pepper and parsley; cook until chicken is done. add wine and half and half; simmer until sauce thickens, about 10 minutes. add noodles; heat through. serve over noodles.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. baking soda, 3/4 c. butter, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 c. buttermilk, 2 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: In a 3 - 5 quart dish, combine sugar, soda, butter and buttermilk. Cover with plastic wrap; punch small holes in the plastic. Microwave on 70% for 15 minutes. Stir and continue cooking for 13-15 minutes, until soft-ball stage. Add vanilla and beat with mixer until soft peaks form. Stir in nuts and pour into buttered 12 x 7 dish. Cool and cut into small pieces.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, baking soda and buttermilk in a heavy saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture forms a soft ball in cold water. remove from heat. add butter, vanilla and pecans. beat until thick enough to spread.

Ingredients: 2 sticks margarine, 2 c. graham cracker crumbs, 2 c. powdered sugar, 2 eggs, 1 tsp. vanilla, 4 bananas, 1 (20 oz.) can crushed pineapple, drained, 1 (9 oz.) frozen whipped cream, 1/2 c. walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: Melt 1 stick butter, combine with graham cracker crumbs; press into pan. Combine eggs, sugar, butter and vanilla. Beat until smooth and spread over crumbs. Cover with sliced bananas and a layer of pineapple. Cover with whipped topping. Sprinkle with nuts; chill.
GeneratedRecipe: mix graham cracker crumbs and 1 stick melted margarine. press into 9 x 13-inch pan. beat eggs, powdered sugar and vanilla for 15 minutes. spread over crust. slice bananas over pineapple. spread whipped cream over bananas. sprinkle with nuts. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 2 lb. potatoes, peeled, sliced and boiled*, 4 Tbsp. butter, 2 lb. ground beef, 1/4 lb. yellow onion, chopped, 1/2 c. celery, chopped, 2 pressed garlic cloves, 2 oz. beef base**, 1 c. water, 2 Tbsp. flour, approximately, 2 carrots, peeled and sliced, 4 oz. cheddar cheese, shredded
ReferenceRecipe: *You may substitute 6 cups instant mashed potatoes made relatively stiff and seasoned with butter, salt, black and white ground pepper and a bit of garlic powder.
GeneratedRecipe: * if using frozen vegetables, use frozen potatoes, thaw and drain. melt butter in a large skillet. add ground beef and cook until browned. add flour and stir until blended. add water and celery; cook until thickened. add potatoes, carrots and celery. simmer for 20 minutes.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. peeled shrimp, finely chopped, 1/2 Tbsp. cooking sherry, 1/2 c. ground pork, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/2 tsp. ginger, smashed, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 egg white, sesame seed (optional), 6 slices Wonder bread
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients in bowl until fairly smooth. Add some sesame seed (optional). Cut off the crust of bread and quarter. Spread shrimp mixture evenly on each piece of bread. Deep-fry at medium heat 1 minute on each side, spread side down first.
GeneratedRecipe: soak shrimp in cooking water for 5 minutes. drain. rinse shrimp. drain. mix with the cornstarch, salt, ginger, sherry, and egg. add shrimp, pork and sesame seed. mix well. shape into 8 patties. fry in oil until done. serve with cocktail sauce.

Ingredients: 2 c. pasta (any kind), 2 c. julienne carrots, 2 c. broccoli, cut up
ReferenceRecipe: Cook pasta until almost done and add vegetables for last 5 minutes of cooking. Rinse well and add a no fat or low-fat dressing. Very tasty.
GeneratedRecipe: cook pasta according to package directions. drain and rinse with cold water. add broccoli, carrots and broccoli. cook until tender.

Ingredients: 5 c. diced apples (do not peel), 1/2 c. walnut pieces, 1 c. raisins or dates
ReferenceRecipe: Stir all ingredients together. Serve with Almond Cream Fruit Dressing or juice of a lemon and honey to taste and/or pineapple juice.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve on lettuce leaves. serves 4 to 6. ( can be doubled. )

Ingredients: 1 head green cabbage, 1 doz. green tomatoes, 1 or 2 red peppers, 1 or 2 green peppers, 4 c. sugar, 1 qt. red cider vinegar, 1 tsp. celery seed, 3 Tbsp. allspice
ReferenceRecipe: Use old hand grinder (or food processor) to grind cabbage, tomatoes and peppers together. Mix sugar, vinegar and spices in saucepan; bring to a boil for 5 minutes. Add cabbage mixture and bring to a boil again. Cook about 3 to 5 minutes. Pour into pint jars and seal.
GeneratedRecipe: chop peppers into fine blade. place cabbage and green tomatoes in large kettle. add sugar, salt and allspice. let stand overnight. in morning, boil vinegar, celery seed and allspice. pack in sterilized half-pint jars. cover with boiling brine and seal. makes 7 pints.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked fresh or frozen whole kernel corn, drained and cooled, 1/2 c. low-fat or non-fat plain yogurt, 2 Tbsp. sour cream, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 1/2 tsp. cooking oil, 1/4 tsp. cumin seed, 1/4 tsp. mustard seed, 1 fresh Serrano chili pepper, seeded and finely chopped, leaf lettuce (optional), chopped red or green pepper (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Combine in a medium bowl, cooled corn, yogurt, sour cream and salt. In a small saucepan, combine oil, cumin seed, mustard seed and chili pepper. Cook 5 minutes over low heat (do not overheat). Stir both mixtures together. Serve immediately or cover and chill up to 4 hours. Serve on lettuce leaves. Sprinkle with chopped peppers, if desired. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: place corn, red pepper, serrano corn, cumin, yogurt and salt in a medium size bowl. cover and let stand at room temperature 15 to 20 minutes. combine sour cream, chili seed and mustard seed. stir into corn mixture. cover and chill for 30 minutes or longer. place lettuce leaves on plates and place lettuce on top. serves 4.

Ingredients: 2 small peach jello, 1 (16 oz.) crushed pineapple, 2 c. buttermilk, 1 (8 oz.) Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Heat pineapple and juice to boiling. Remove from heat and add jello. Stir and let cool. Add buttermilk and Cool Whip. Pour into 9 x 12-inch pan and let congeal.
GeneratedRecipe: bring pineapple to a boil. add jello and stir until dissolved. cool. add buttermilk and cool whip. mix well and refrigerate.

Ingredients: 1 large head cabbage, 1 c. vinegar, 1 c. water, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 6 slices bacon
ReferenceRecipe: Mix water, sugar and vinegar in large kettle. Cut up cabbage in small pieces and break apart. Place in kettle with bacon. Simmer for 3 hours. Can also be cooked in crock-pot on low for 5 to 6 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: chop cabbage into small cubes. cook bacon until crisp. in large skillet, fry bacon until crisp. remove. saute sugar and vinegar until it boils. stir in water and bring to a boil. add cabbage and cook 2 minutes.

Ingredients: 2 potatoes, 1 onion, 1 stalk celery, 1 lb. hamburger, 1 can tomato soup, 1 can pork and beans
ReferenceRecipe: Boil first 3 ingredients in 3 cups water. Brown hamburger and add potatoes, soup and pork and beans. Heat thoroughly to boiling and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburger. drain. place potatoes, onion and celery in a pan. add tomato soup. add hamburger and pork. let simmer 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 garlic clove, crushed, 1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1/4 c. balsamic vinegar, 3/4 c. extra virgin olive oil, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 Tbsp. chopped parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Place all ingredients except parsley in a blender. Blend 2 minutes or until emulsified. Stir in parsley. Use immediately or refrigerate up to 3 days. Makes 1 cup. Use as a marinade or on salads. Delicious!
GeneratedRecipe: combine the first 5 ingredients in a jar. combine the remaining ingredients. cover and shake well. shake well before serving. serve with cooked pasta.

Ingredients: 2 c. chopped, cooked shrimp, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 4 c. cooked rice, 1/4 c. oil, 2 eggs, lightly beaten, 4 oz. can mushrooms, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper, 1/2 c. scallions, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Fry shrimp in oil in a deep frying pan for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Add eggs, mushrooms, salt and pepper. Fry over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Add rice and soy sauce; fry for 5 minutes, stirring frequently. Mix with chopped scallions. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: heat oil in large skillet. add rice, mushrooms, scallions, salt and pepper. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until eggs are set. stir in shrimp, mushrooms and soy sauce. cook until heated through. serve over rice.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, 6 hard-boiled eggs, chopped fine, 1 c. celery, chopped fine, 3/4 c. sweet salad cubes, 1 tsp. celery salt, 1 c. mayonnaise or desired consistency
ReferenceRecipe: Cook chicken breasts in simmering, salted water. Cool and chop real fine. Add eggs, celery and salad cubes. Mix well. Add celery salt and mix with mayonnaise until you get the consistency you desire.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken breasts for 20 to 30 minutes. remove from bone. cut into bite size pieces and add chopped chicken pieces. add chopped celery, eggs, mayonnaise, salt and salad dressing. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 box vanilla tapioca pudding, 1 box vanilla instant pudding, 1 box jello (any flavor), 3 c. water, 1 c. Rich's topping, whipped, mandarin oranges (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook together the first 4 ingredients for 2 minutes. Cool, then add whipped topping and oranges. Very simple and delicious!
GeneratedRecipe: cook together the jello, pudding, water and the water. mix in the refrigerator to thicken to thicken. add whipped topping and mandarin oranges.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 3 Tbsp. cocoa, 2 1/2 c. milk, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 Tbsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: You will need Tupperware molds for this recipe.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cornstarch and cocoa. add milk and cook until thick. add butter and vanilla. pour into baked pie shell.

Ingredients: 5 c. diced chicken breast, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. sliced seedless red or white grapes, 5 oz. slivered almonds, 1/4 c. chopped scallions, 1 tsp. grated lemon rind, 1/2 c. lemon juice, 1/2 c. mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Put cooked, diced chicken in large bowl, sprinkle with salt and mix well. Add grapes, almonds, scallions and lemon rind. Drizzle with lemon juice and mix gently. Cover and chill. To serve, toss with mayonnaise.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine chicken, grapes, scallions, lemon rind and salt. in a small bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice and lemon rind. pour over chicken mixture and toss to coat well. cover and chill. just before serving, sprinkle with almonds.

Ingredients: 1 to 2 butter cookie crusts, 1 (6 oz.) frozen lemonade, 1 (8 oz.) Cool Whip, 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk, 2 to 4 drops yellow food coloring
ReferenceRecipe: Whip all together and spoon into cookie crusts. Put in refrigerator 4 to 6 hours or overnight. Top off with lemon wedges and a spoonful of whipped cream on each slice.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cool whip, condensed milk and food coloring. pour into crusts. refrigerate and garnish with fresh food coloring ( optional ).

Ingredients: 1 stewing chicken, 5 to 6 c. water, 4 c. broth, 2 c. rice, uncooked, 1/4 c. finely diced carrot, 1/2 c. raisins, salt and pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Cook chicken in water, salt and pepper until tender. Remove chicken and skim broth. Combine broth, rice, carrot, raisins, salt and pepper in large pan. Bring to a boil, stir briefly, cover and cook without stirring on very low heat until rice is almost done. Place chicken pieces on top and finish cooking. Add onion, garlic and curry. You're done!!
GeneratedRecipe: bring chicken broth and water to a boil. add rice, carrot, raisins, salt and pepper. cover and simmer 20 minutes or until rice is tender.

Ingredients: 7 oz. Coco Lopez (cream of coconut), 8 oz. pineapple juice, 4 c. ice, 7 oz. sweetened condensed milk, 2 oz. pineapple
ReferenceRecipe: Mix well in blender. Garnish with pineapple and cherry. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: in blender, mix together all ingredients. serve over crushed ice and garnish with orange slices, if desired.

Ingredients: 4 lb. country style pork ribs, 1/2 c. cider vinegar, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 tsp. salt, dash of cayenne pepper (optional), 1 (10 1/2 oz.) can condensed tomato soup, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1 tsp. celery seed, 1 tsp. chili powder
ReferenceRecipe: Layer spareribs in slow cooker. Combine soup, vinegar, brown sugar, soy sauce, celery seed, salt, chili powder and pepper. Pour over spareribs. Cover and cook 6 to 8 hours at medium setting. Skim fat from juice before serving. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: combine soup, soy sauce and vinegar. heat to boiling and cook 10 minutes. add pork ribs and stir to coat in the soup mix. cook for 5 minutes longer, or until done.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sliced ham, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 tsp. parsley flakes
ReferenceRecipe: Grind your ham into very small pieces. (You may use leftover baked ham or sliced sandwich meat.) Set aside. In a separate bowl, mix mayonnaise and cream cheese. Stir in ham with a fork. When mixed well, shape mixture into a ball with hands. Roll ball in parsley flakes. Chill at least one hour before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese, mayonnaise and parsley flakes. spread on ham slices. roll up and chill. slice and serve.

Ingredients: 1 (18 oz.) jar creamy peanut butter, 1 (12 oz.) bag butterscotch morsels, 1 can chow mein noodles
ReferenceRecipe: You will also need baking cups.
GeneratedRecipe: mix peanut butter and noodles together. melt butterscotch morsels together, stirring constantly until blended and smooth. drop on waxed paper. cool and store in a covered pan. may be frozen or left in freezer.

Ingredients: 3 c. graham cracker crumbs, 1 can pineapple pie filling, 2 envelopes Dream Whip, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 1/2 sticks margarine, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 c. cold milk
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the graham cracker crumbs and margarine together for the bottom crust. Press tightly into bottom of pan. Whip the Dream Whip with cold milk, then add the powdered sugar and the softened cream cheese. Add vanilla. Spread half of the mixture on the graham cracker crust. Spread pie filling over the Dream Whip mixture. Add remaining Dream Whip mixture over the pineapple.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine and mix with graham cracker crumbs. press into bottom of 9 x 13-inch pan. beat cream cheese, powdered sugar and vanilla until smooth. add cold milk and beat until thick. fold in dream whip. spread over crust. top with pineapple and pie filling. chill.

Ingredients: 1 small chicken, boiled and deboned, 1 c. water, added to broth, 1 small pan corn bread, 1 box Stove Top stuffing, 2 Tbsp. sage, 1 small onion
ReferenceRecipe: Boil chicken and debone. Add cup of water to broth. Slice onion in broth. Put seasoning packet from Stove Top stuffing in broth; bring to boil. Take out a cup of the broth and add corn bread packet to your corn bread slowly. Add sage and your chicken. Put in crock-pot until ready to serve (low heat).
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken breasts and cut into pieces. put broth over stuffing. add onion, sage and boiled onion. mix together.

Ingredients: 1 1/4 c. pancake mix, 1 egg, 1/3 c. sugar, 1 c. milk, 1 tsp. vegetable oil, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 6 bananas, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the pancake mix, milk, egg, vanilla and oil in bowl. Cut bananas into 1-inch slices. Coat with batter. Drop into fryer until brown; drain. Roll in sugar and cinnamon mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: combine pancake mix, milk, egg, sugar, oil, vanilla and cinnamon. beat until smooth. stir in bananas.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. oil for sauteing, 2 garlic cloves minced, 1 egg, 3/4 cup diced white onion, 2 green onions chopped, 1/2 cup chopped red cabbage, Freshly-ground white pepper to taste, 3/4 cup diced bacon (or ham), 4 cup cooked rice, 1 1/2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 4 Tbsp. oyster sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Heat skillet or wok over high heat, then add 2 tablespoons oil and garlic. Saute garlic until lightly browned, about 1 minute. Add egg and scramble until yolk is set but egg is not dry or overcooked. Add white onion, green onions, cabbage and white pepper to taste. (If skillet becomes dry and vegetables start to stick, add 1 more tablespoon oil.) Add bacon to skillet and cook 1 to 2 minutes. Fold in rice, gently mixing with egg and vegetables. Cook, stirring, over high heat until rice is heated through, 2 to 4 minutes. Add soy sauce and oyster sauce, and stir to coat rice. Keep stirring until vegetables soften and rice starts to brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Serve hot. This recipe yields 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: brown garlic, onion, green pepper and bacon oil in large frying pan. add chopped red cabbage and saute about 5 minutes until crisp. add the egg and soy sauce. add the cabbage and saute until wilted. add the cooked rice to skillet and stir to cook about an additional 5 to 7 minutes. add the remaining ingredients. mix well and serve with rice.

Ingredients: 1-8 oz. can crushed pineapple, 1 t. cornstarch, 1/4 t. ginger, 1/3 c. mayonnaise, 1 c. cooked chopped chicken, 1/4 c. chopped celery, 1/4 c. toasted slivered almonds, 1 sm. chopped onion, 1 sm. can chopped water chestnuts, drained
ReferenceRecipe: Simmer pineapple and corn starch, remove from heat and all all other ingredients. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: combine chicken, celery, water chestnuts, onion and water chestnuts. mix mayonnaise, cornstarch and ginger. add to chicken mixture and mix well. chill. serve on lettuce leaf.

Ingredients: grapefruit, sugar or brown sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cut grapefruit in half. Cut in segments and remove core. Garnish with sugar or brown sugar. Place in broiler for 10 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: cut grapefruit in half. place in microwave dish. sprinkle with brown sugar. microwave on high for 2 to 3 minutes.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen lemonade, 2 or 3 drops yellow food coloring, 1 (8 oz.) Cool Whip, 1 (9-inch) baked pie crust
ReferenceRecipe: Cream the cream cheese. Add Eagle Brand milk, frozen lemonade and food coloring. Fold in Cool Whip. Spoon in 9-inch baked crust to chill.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together the cream cheese, eagle brand milk and cool whip. add food coloring and coloring, if desired. pour into pie crust and chill.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 2 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1/4 tsp. onion salt, 1/4 tsp. garlic salt, dill pickle spears, whole wheat bread
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together and spread on wheat bread. Roll dill spear up in slice of bread. Slice roll into quarters.
GeneratedRecipe: in medium bowl, blend well the cheese, mayonnaise and dill spears. add onion. add garlic salt and pickle; mix well. cut bread into bite size pieces. spread with cream cheese mixture. broil until golden, bubbly.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 to 2 lb. ground round beef, 2 large onions, cut up, 2 cans stewed tomatoes, cut up, 1 can whole kernel corn (white shoe peg), 3 cans pinto beans, 1 small can mild green chili peppers, cut up, 1 pkg. dry Ranch dressing, 1 pkg. dry taco seasoning, 2 Tbsp. sugar, pepper to taste, approximately 1 Tbsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef (break up with fork) and onions until done. Add rest of ingredients. Let come to a good boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer a while until ready to eat. Serve over corn Tostitos. Also good with corn bread. Top with grated cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onions. drain; add all of the ingredients except the dressing in big pot. simmer for 30 minutes, then add the rest of the seasonings. simmer for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 3 c. flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. shortening, 1/3 c. water (cold), 1 egg, 2 tsp. vinegar, 1 tsp. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Cut flour, salt, sugar and shortening into pea size. Beat egg, vinegar and water. Sprinkle over dry ingredients.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, sugar and salt. cut in shortening with pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal. add egg, water and vinegar. mix well. makes 2 double crusts.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 3/4 c. chopped walnuts, 2 Tbsp. honey, 3/4 c. chopped dates
ReferenceRecipe: Mix and serve with party crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese, honey and dates together. form into a ball and roll in chopped walnuts. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 6 oz. can frozen lemonade concentrate, thawed, 6 oz. can frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed, 6 oz. can frozen tangerine juice concentrate, thawed, 2 c. water, 2 c. sugar or to taste, 2 (28 oz.) bottles ginger ale, chilled, ice cubes or ice mold
ReferenceRecipe: In large pitcher or punch bowl, combine concentrates and water (2 1/2 or 3 cups of water can be added, if desired). Just before serving, add ginger ale and ice (33 ounces of ginger ale can be added, if desired). Stir to blend. Garnish as desired.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large pitcher, combine orange juice, lemonade concentrate, sugar and water. add ice cubes. stir to mix. add ginger ale; mix well. makes 4 quarts.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/4 c. cold water, 2 Tbsp. fat drippings, 2 c. broth or bouillon, Desired seasonings
ReferenceRecipe: In a small bowl, combine cornstarch and water until smooth. Set aside. Remove all but 2 tablespoons of fat dripping from roasting pan. Stir in broth or bouillon. Cook over medium heat, stirring to loosen the browned bits. Remove from heat. Stir the cornstarch mixture into pan. Add seasonings. Stirring constantly, bring to a boil over medium heat and boil 1 minute.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cornstarch and cold water. add fat and bouillon. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and boils. boil 1 minute.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) elbow macaroni, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1/2 c. low-fat milk, 4 oz. Mozzarella cheese, 6 oz. Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water to a boil with salt and oil in a 2 1/2-quart cooker. Add macaroni and cook until well done, about 5 minutes. Drain. Add milk and margarine. Cook until margarine melts and milk starts to bubble. Add cheese. Stir occasionally. Cook on low heat for about 15 minutes or until milk cooks down and becomes creamy.
GeneratedRecipe: cook macaroni according to package directions; drain. meanwhile, in a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. add macaroni and salt. cook, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 5 minutes. stir in milk and butter. cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until cheese is melted.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 c. dark corn syrup, 1 Tbsp. white vinegar, 1 Tbsp. baking soda
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar, corn syrup and vinegar and cook over medium heat, stirring until sugar melts. Cook, without stirring, until mixture is very brittle when placed in cold water. Remove from heat and add baking soda. Pour into a well-greased pan. When hard, break into pieces.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, corn syrup and vinegar. cook to soft ball stage. add baking soda. pour into buttered pan. cool and break into pieces.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1/4 c. chopped onion, salt and pepper, 1 small jar spaghetti sauce, 1 can biscuits, 8 oz. pkg. shredded Mozzarella cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground beef and onion. Salt and pepper to taste. Drain well. Add spaghetti sauce. Line a 9 x 13-inch pan with flattened canned biscuits. Pour meat mixture onto biscuits. Top with shredded Mozzarella cheese. Bake at temperature indicated on biscuit can until biscuit crust is brown and cheese bubbles.
GeneratedRecipe: fry ground beef and onion together. drain. stir in salt, pepper and spaghetti sauce. cook and stir until bubbly.

Ingredients: 1 ripe avocado, 3 Tbsp. chopped onion, 1/2 can taco sauce, 1/4 to 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, 2 tsp. lemon juice, 1/2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 to 1 chopped onion, 1/2 clove garlic, crushed, 1/8 tsp. cayenne pepper, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. Tabasco sauce
ReferenceRecipe: and proceed as before. Or you can make up your own combination, using ingredients of this type. The Mexicans might not think so, but it will all come out guacamole.
GeneratedRecipe: mash avocado and blend with onion, lemon juice, salt, pepper, garlic, cayenne and taco sauce. mix until smooth. add lemon juice, worcestershire sauce and onion; blend until smooth. serve with corn chips or chips.

Ingredients: 1 qt. mayonnaise, 1 c. sugar, 1 c. mustard (9 oz. jar), 1 small onion, chopped fine
ReferenceRecipe: Stir together gently. Refrigerate overnight. Good on most meats, sandwiches or slaw.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients and let stand 24 hours. put in a jar and put in refrigerator. this is also good on fresh spinach salad greens.

Ingredients: trimmed brisket (small flat end is leaner), Tex Joy steak seasoning, Kraft Hickory smoked barbecue sauce (onion bits)
ReferenceRecipe: Will also need a large size brown and bake bag.
GeneratedRecipe: put brisket in crock-pot. cover with barbecue sauce and hickory seasoning to taste. cook on low all day and then on low for about 4 hours.

Ingredients: 1 head red cabbage, 2 Tbsp. Crisco, 1 tsp. salt, 2 apples, 1 small jar grape jelly, 3/4 c. cider vinegar, 1/2 c. water, 1/2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Melt Crisco. Cook cut up cabbage. Add salt. Add vinegar. Slow cook for 1 hour. Add jelly, sugar and apples; stir. Cook for another hour.
GeneratedRecipe: grate cabbage. mix sugar, jelly, vinegar, water, salt and crisco together. cook slowly until jelly is dissolved. add grape jelly and grape jelly. pour over cabbage and apples. let set overnight or several hours in refrigerator.

Ingredients: 1 large can kraut, 1 c. chopped celery, 1 c. diced green bell peppers, 1 c. diced red onion, 1/2 c. vinegar, 2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Boil vinegar and sugar. When cool, pour over vegetables and let marinate several hours before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix kraut, onion and pepper in bowl. cover and set aside. mix vinegar and sugar. pour boiling mixture over vegetables. mix well. cover and refrigerate 24 hours. stir before serving.

Ingredients: 1 can peach pie filling, 1 box frozen straw berries, 1 jar cherries, drained, 1 large can pineapple chunks, drained, 1 can mandarin oranges, drained, 4 to 6 bananas, sliced, 1 c. chopped nuts (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together and your salad is made! Refrigerate and serve when chilled.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together. chill and serve. serves 8 to 10 people. can be made ahead of time and frozen.

Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 1 c. corn meal, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 egg, 3/4 c. milk, 1 tsp. sugar, wieners
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients, except wieners, and let stand 1 hour. Dip wieners in batter and deep fry until golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: cut wieners into small pieces and mix into the dry ingredients. heat the milk. add wieners. pour milk mixture into dry until the batter resembles cornmeal. drop in hot grease and fry until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. semi-sweet chocolate, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1 (12 oz.) container Cool Whip, thawed, 1/3 c. water, 1/4 c. sugar, 1 graham cracker pie crust
ReferenceRecipe: Stir chocolate into water over low heat until melted; cool. Beat the cream cheese and sugar until smooth; add chocolate. Spoon mixture into pie crust; chill for 3 hours.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese until creamy. gradually add sugar until creamy. beat in water. fold in cool whip. pour into pie crust. refrigerate at least 3 hours. top with chocolate shavings, if desired.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1/2 c. pork sausage, 1/2 c. dry bread crumbs, 1/3 c. evaporated milk, 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 1 tsp. chili powder, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can cream of celery soup, 1 c. evaporated milk, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Combine meat, crumbs, milk and seasonings. Shape into meat balls. Brown and cook 10 minutes. Place in 2 1/2-quart casserole.
GeneratedRecipe: mix beef, bread crumbs, onion, celery and pepper. shape into 1-inch balls. brown in skillet. combine soup, milk, water and chili powder. pour over meatballs. cover and cook over low heat for 20 minutes. stir occasionally. serve over rice or noodles.

Ingredients: 3 large carrots, finely grated, 3 Tbsp. finely chopped onion, 3/4 c. raisins, 6 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients in a bowl. cover and chill for at least 1 hour before serving. serves 4 to 6.

Ingredients: 1 can white cannelini beans, 2 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/4 c. olive oil, 1 Tbsp. parsley, chopped, 1/4 tsp. oregano, 1/4 tsp. basil, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. tomato paste, 1 lb. macaroni (small shells), Romano cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Saute garlic in olive oil until golden. Slowly add can of cannelini beans and stir. Add parsley, oregano, basil and salt. Add 1 can of water to beans; stir and add tomato paste. Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes. In a 3-quart pot, boil water for pasta. Cook according to package directions. Drain and add beans. Heat through; stir and top with Romano cheese.
GeneratedRecipe: saute garlic in olive oil. add tomato paste, parsley, oregano, salt and basil. simmer for 10 minutes. cook macaroni according to package directions. drain and add to sauce.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 3 egg whites, 3/4 c. Karo, 3 Tbsp. water, 1/4 tsp cream of tartar, 1/4 tsp salt, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients except the vanilla in the top part of a double boiler and continuously beat with an electric mixer or egg beater until light and fluffy. Add the vanilla.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar and water until it spins a thread. beat egg whites until stiff and then pour slowly to egg whites. add cream of tartar and beat until stiff. add syrup slowly until it thickens. add salt and vanilla.

Ingredients: 1 c. all-purpose flour, sifted, 1 1/2 tsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 tsp. butter, 1 c. sharp cheese, shredded, 1/2 tsp. cayenne pepper, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Sift flour, baking powder and salt into a medium size bowl. Blend in butter until mixture is crumbly. Add cheese, cayenne pepper and water. Mix well until mixture holds together. Roll out and cut into strips.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, baking powder, salt and cayenne pepper. cut in butter with pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal. add water, cheese and cayenne to flour mixture. mix well.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1 (18 oz.) jar creamy peanut butter, 1 (7 oz.) jar marshmallow cream
ReferenceRecipe: In a saucepan, boil milk and sugar for about 3 minutes. Add marshmallow cream and peanut butter and mix well. Quickly pour in a buttered 8-inch pan. Chill in ice box until set. Cut into small squares.
GeneratedRecipe: bring sugar and milk to a boil. boil 5 minutes. remove from heat. add peanut butter and marshmallow cream. mix well. pour into buttered pan. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 3 large peppers (about 3 tea cups), 3 large onions (about 3 tea cups), 1 bunch of celery (6 tea cups), 1 (regular size) bottle catsup (I use a little more), 1 bottle chili sauce, 1 can tomato soup, 1 1/2 lb. ground beef
ReferenceRecipe: Chop pepper, onions and celery fine; steam until tender (don't use much water to steam this). Add tomato soup, catsup and chili sauce to it. Add pepper, salt and a little chili powder to taste. Crumble the ground beef in it. Cook slowly for 30 minutes. Great for picnics and when serving a lot of people.
GeneratedRecipe: cook tea until done. add onions, celery, tomato soup, catsup and chili sauce. simmer until thick. add tea peppers, if desired.

Ingredients: 16 oz. English peas (frozen; optional), 1 head broccoli, 1 head cauliflower, 1 large sweet onion
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw frozen peas. Chop broccoli, cauliflower and onion into bite size pieces. Add peas if desired. Mix ingredients together.
GeneratedRecipe: chop cauliflower, onion and broccoli in a large container. add all other ingredients in refrigerator. marinate.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) pkg. raspberry jello, 1 c. boiling water, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 c. beet juice, 1/4 c. vinegar, 2 tsp. horseradish, 1/4 c. sour cream, 1 (16 oz.) can shoestring beets or sliced and cut, drained well
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve jello in boiling water; add sugar, beet juice, vinegar, horseradish and sour cream. Stir until smooth. Add beets and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jello in boiling water. add beet juice, vinegar, sugar and horseradish. chill until partially set. fold in sour cream and beets. pour into mold and chill until firm.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. elbow macaroni, cooked and drained, 1 (12 oz.) can corned beef, 1/4 lb. grated Cheddar cheese, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1 c. milk, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 3/4 c. buttered crumbs (about 1/8 lb. melted butter)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook macaroni; drain. Heat milk and soup. Take off fire and add onions, cheese and beef. Cream well. Add to noodles and mix well.
GeneratedRecipe: cook macaroni according to package directions. drain and set aside. combine soup, milk, cheese and corned beef. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 1 pkg. Rice-A-Roni (beef flavor), 1/2 c. salsa, 1 tsp. chili powder, 4 c. shredded lettuce, 1 medium tomato, chopped, 1/2 c. shredded cheese, 1 c. crushed tortilla chips
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat and onions; drain. Remove from skillet; set aside. In same skillet, prepare Rice-A-Roni as directed. Stir in meat mixture, salsa and chili powder; cook 3 to 4 more minutes. Arrange lettuce on platter, top with rice mixture, tomato, cheese and tortilla chips.
GeneratedRecipe: cook and stir ground beef with the onions until meat is browned. drain excess fat. stir in salsa and chili powder. heat through. serve over chips. garnish with lettuce and tomatoes.

Ingredients: 1 egg, 2 c. sifted powdered sugar, 2 1/2 Tbsp. cocoa, 1/8 tsp. salt, butter (size of an egg), 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 Tbsp. cream
ReferenceRecipe: Beat eggs until foamy. Add all, except cream and vanilla, and mix. Then add cream and beat until consistency to spread. Add vanilla.
GeneratedRecipe: mix sugar, cocoa and salt. add egg and cream. beat until smooth. add butter and vanilla. spread on cake.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. dry yeast, 1 c. warm water, 1 tsp. sugar, 1 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. salad oil, 2 1/2 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve yeast in warm water. Add remaining ingredients. Mix and knead together and let raise for 10 minutes, then spread out on cookie sheet or pizza pie pans.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve yeast in warm water. add sugar, oil, salt and flour. mix well. let rise until double in bulk.

Ingredients: 3 c. sugar, 3/4 c. light corn syrup, 3/4 c. water, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry gelatin, 2 egg whites, beaten stiff, 1/2 c. flaked coconut, 1 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar, corn syrup and water. Bring to boil, stirring constantly. Reduce heat and cook to hard ball stage, stirring constantly. Combine beaten egg whites and gelatin; beat until mixture forms peaks. Pour hot syrup in thin stream into egg whites, beating until candy loses gloss and holds shape. Fold in coconut and nuts. Pour into greased 9-inch square pan. When cool, cut in squares.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, corn syrup and water in saucepan. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture forms a soft ball when dropped in cold water. remove from heat. add gelatin and stir until dissolved. add egg whites and beat until stiff. fold in coconut and pecans. drop by spoonfuls onto waxed paper.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1/4 c. milk, 1 tsp. butter, 1/2 tsp. onion salt, 1 lb. can (2 c.) whole kernel corn, drained
ReferenceRecipe: In saucepan, combine cream cheese, milk, butter and onion salt. Stir over low heat until cheese melts. Add corn and heat.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in saucepan. add cream cheese, onion and salt. cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until cheese is melted. stir in corn and milk. heat thoroughly.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground ham, 1/2 lb. ground pork, 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 c. cracker crumbs, 2 tsp. chopped onions, 2 tsp. celery or celery salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Blend ham, beef and pork. Add all other ingredients. Form meat balls and place in baking pan.
GeneratedRecipe: mix meat, pork, crumbs, eggs, milk, salt and pepper. shape into small balls. brown in small amount of fat.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. cream of tartar, 5 Tbsp. cold water, 2 egg whites, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix in saucepan, sugar, salt, cream of tartar and water. Stir. Bring to a full boil. Place two egg whites in small mixer bowl. Do not beat until syrup is cooked. Pour syrup slowly over the egg whites, while beating at high speed, until all syrup has been added. Reduce speed to medium. Add vanilla; beat until mixture is of spreading consistency. Ice cake. May sprinkle on coconut, if desired.
GeneratedRecipe: place sugar, salt and water in double boiler. beat egg whites until stiff. add cream of tartar to egg whites and beat until stiff and creamy. add vanilla.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 1/2 c. margarine, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 large container Cool Whip, 2 (3 1/2 oz.) pkg. instant pudding, 3 c. milk, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 (1 1/2 lb.) pkg. Oreos
ReferenceRecipe: Spread 1/2 crushed cookies in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Mix the cream cheese and butter until smooth. Mix in powdered sugar. Fold in Cool Whip.
GeneratedRecipe: crush cookies in blender; set aside. mix cream cheese, powdered sugar and margarine. blend in cool whip. mix pudding and milk. combine cream cheese with pudding mix. layer cream mixture and cookie crumbs. layer in flowerpot, beginning with cookie crumbs. end with oreos and pudding mixture. garnish with gummy worms.

Ingredients: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can creamy onion soup, 1 can cream of celery soup, 3 or 4 lb. chuck roast beef
ReferenceRecipe: Place roast with 1 tablespoon water in the crock-pot. Cook on low for 4 hours. Add soups. Do not add water. Continue cooking on low for 6 more hours. Meat should be tender. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: cook roast and place in crock-pot. add soup and cream of celery soup; mix well. simmer on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.

Ingredients: 2 mangos, 2 cups milk, 5 Tbsp. sugar, 7 (or more) cubes of ice
ReferenceRecipe: First, slice mangos in cubes and place in a blender. Then, add 2 cups of milk and add sugar. Lastly, put in 7 (or more) cubes of ice and blend well. Pour in glass and enjoy!
GeneratedRecipe: combine all in blender and blend to make slushy. serve with ice cubes and top as it 's dessert with fruit.

Ingredients: 4 to 5 lb. skinned fryer chicken parts, 1 tsp. m.s.g., 5 cloves minced garlic, 1 onion, chopped, 1/2 chopped green bell pepper, 2 (15 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 4 bay leaves, 1 tsp. cumin seed, 1 1/2 tsp. dried leaf oregano, 1 c. raisins, 1 c. stuffed green olives, 1 tsp. cider vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken parts in a large deep skillet. Add m.s.g., garlic, onion, green pepper, tomato sauce, bay leaves, cumin, oregano, raisins, olives and vinegar. Cover and bring to a boil. Turn heat down and simmer 1 hour, turning chicken occasionally. Remove chicken to a platter and serve the sauce over rice or noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: place chicken on broiler pan, skin side up. combine tomato sauce, vinegar, cumin, onion, cumin, oregano, oregano, garlic and bay leaf in saucepan. bring to a boil over high heat. stir occasionally until liquid begins to simmer. add bell pepper, olives and chopped onion. continue cooking over medium-low heat 15 minutes or until chicken is almost fork-tender.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, softened, 1/2 c. mayo, 4 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 tsp. vinegar, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 2 or 3 pkg. dried beef
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 5 ingredients well, then add dried beef and mix. Refrigerate. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: chop fine onion and dried beef, reserving 1/2 cup for the beef to sprinkle. combine all ingredients; mix well. shape in ball and garnish with additional whole dried beef. serve with crackers. serves 5 to 6.

Ingredients: 1 medium zucchini, 1 Cup instant potato flakes, 1/3 Cup grated cheese, 1/2 tsp. celery seed, 1/4 tsp. garlic salt or powder, 2 eggs beaten, 1/4 Cup melted butter
ReferenceRecipe: Combine potato flakes, cheese, celery seed, garlic salt and butter. Dip the zucchini in the eggs and then into the potato mixture. Place on ungreased cookie sheet and bake at 400 degree for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: cook zucchini in boiling salted water until tender. drain and mash. add eggs, cheese, celery seed, salt, garlic powder and cheese. mix well. spoon into a greased baking dish. bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 c. real mayonnaise, 2 tsp. grated onion, 1/2 tsp. dried dill weed, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. sour cream, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 2 tsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients and chill. Can be served with chips, crackers or your favorite raw vegetables. Yield: 2 cups.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve with raw vegetables or chips. makes 1 1/2 cups. can be used as a dip for raw vegetables.

Ingredients: 1 lb. package lil' smokies, 1 can (7-oz.) biscuits, 8 oz. mustard, vegetable spray
ReferenceRecipe: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Drain liquid from smokies. Roll out biscuits one at a time. Cut each into 5 strips. Wrap each strip around each smokie. Spray cookie sheet with vegetable spray and place wrapped smokies on it. Bake for 18 minutes or until golden brown. Serve with mustard. Serve immediately or can be rewarmed in microwave for 3 minutes on medium.
GeneratedRecipe: cut smokies into quarters or pieces and place in a large bowl. combine mustard and vegetable oil in a bowl. add biscuits, tossing to coat. place biscuits on a greased cookie sheet. bake according to directions on biscuit package.

Ingredients: 3 pkg. egg roll wrappers, 1 pkg. carrots, 1 large head cabbage, 1 bunch green onions, 1 bunch celery, salt and pepper, 1 large yellow onion, 1 bell pepper, 1 lb. ground pork, diced shrimp and chicken
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground pork; season with salt and chopped garlic. Boil chicken; take off bone and cut in small pieces. Boil shrimp; dice and set aside. Heat oil in wok or frying pan. Stir and fry 3 cups vegetables at a time; season and drain. You will need a very large bowl for mixture. Should be cool enough to handle, or you can make it ahead of time and refrigerate. Place handful in corner of wrapper and roll over. Pull sides together in a triangle; moisten corners and roll again. Deep fry in hot oil to a golden brown.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until done. remove from broth and cool. chop vegetables, celery, onions, bell pepper and cabbage. cook egg roll in boiling water until tender. add salt and pepper to taste.

Ingredients: 2 egg whites, 1/4 tsp. salt, 3/4 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1/2 c. chocolate chips, 2 Tbsp. crushed peppermint stick
ReferenceRecipe: Beat egg whites and salt until stiff. Add gradually sugar at low speed of mixer. Continue to beat 5 more minutes. Fold in vanilla, chips and candy.
GeneratedRecipe: beat egg whites until stiff. add salt and sugar. fold in chocolate chips, vanilla and peppermint chips. beat until smooth. pour into a 9 x 12-inch pan. cover with foil and refrigerate 8 to 15 minutes. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 8 Twinkies, cut lengthwise, cream side up, 1 small box French vanilla instant pudding, 1 medium can crushed pineapple, drained, 3 to 4 bananas, 12 oz. Cool Whip, chopped pecans, maraschino cherries (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Put Twinkies in bottom of 9 x 13-inch baking dish. Mix pudding as directed on package. Layer pudding over Twinkies. Drain pineapple good, layer over pudding. Layer sliced bananas next. Cover all with Cool Whip. May top with chopped nuts and cherries. Serve chilled.
GeneratedRecipe: split twinkies into quarters; place on baking dish. combine pudding according to directions on box. pour over twinkies. slice bananas and place over pineapple. cover with cool whip. sprinkle with chopped pecans and cherries to top. chill several hours before serving.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. fresh green beans, trimmed, 2 1/2 c. water, 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 2 tsp. minced garlic, 1 Tbsp. dried oregano leaves, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. ground black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water to boil. Add beans and cover. Cook until tender. Mix remainder of ingredients in small bowl. Pour over hot beans and toss to coat. Serves 8.
GeneratedRecipe: in saucepan, combine water, olive oil and garlic. add beans, oregano, salt, oregano and pepper. cover and cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are just crisp-tender. makes 10 servings.

Ingredients: 1 gal. cucumbers, sliced, 8 small onions, sliced, 2 green sweet peppers, sliced, 1/2 c. salt, 5 c. sugar, 5 c. vinegar, 1 1/2 tsp. turmeric, 1 tsp. celery seed, 1 1/2 tsp. ground cloves, 2 Tbsp. mustard seed
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cucumbers, onions, peppers and salt. Soak 3 hours in ice water, then drain. Add sugar, vinegar, turmeric, celery seed, cloves and mustard seed. Boil until pickles change color. Can in jars.
GeneratedRecipe: cover cucumbers and salt with cracked ice. let stand 3 hours. drain well on paper towel to drain. add onions, peppers and green peppers. heat vinegar, sugar, mustard seed and celery seed. heat to boiling; pour over pickles. put in jars; seal.

Ingredients: 3 to 4 stalks celery, chopped, 1/2 onion, chopped, 1 can sliced chestnuts, drained, 2 c. chicken, cooked and cubed or crab, 1 small pkg. slivered almonds, 1 c. mayonnaise (not Miracle Whip), 1 can chow mein noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Mix first 5 ingredients. Thin the mayonnaise with milk and mix in. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Then fold in chow mein noodles and serve on lettuce leaf. Also good for pita pocket.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve on lettuce leaves. serves 6 to 8. ( can be made ahead of time. )

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste, 1 (15 oz.) can whole tomatoes or tomato sauce, 1 tsp. parsley, 1 tsp. oregano, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder, 2 eggs, 12 oz. cottage cheese, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. Mozzarella cheese, salt and pepper to taste, lasagna noodles
ReferenceRecipe: In a medium size non-stick skillet, brown beef. Drain grease. Add tomatoes or tomato sauce, tomato paste, garlic powder, parsley, oregano, salt and pepper. Simmer for 20 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and drain. add tomatoes, tomato paste, parsley, oregano, garlic powder, salt and pepper. simmer for 20 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 chuck roast (3 to 4 lb.), 1 clove garlic, 1 Tbsp. brown sugar, 4 tsp. meat tenderizer, 1 Tbsp. water, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger, 1/2 tsp. ground pepper, 1/2 tsp. m.s.g., 1/4 c. soy sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Rub chuck roast with meat tenderizer and place in refrigerator for 4 hours. Make a marinade from remaining ingredients. Remove roast from refrigerator; slice into serving size slices. Place meat in marinade for 4 hours or overnight. Broil or barbecue meat until done.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and pour over roast. marinate overnight. grill or broil until done. serves 6 to 8.

Ingredients: 1 box Dutch chocolate cake mix, 1 small bag chocolate chips, 1 small chocolate pudding mix
ReferenceRecipe: Follow the directions on box of cake mix. Add pudding mix and chocolate chips. Bake in Bundt pan.
GeneratedRecipe: bake cake as directed in 9 x 13-inch pan. let cool. poke holes in the top while warm and pour pudding mix on top. put 1 box crushed dutch oven chocolate chips into the cake. pour dutch oven over the top. cool.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. green peppers, chopped, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. uncooked rice, 1 3/4 c. hot water, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 c. oil, 1/2 lb. ground beef, 2 (8 oz.) cans tomato sauce, 1 tsp. prepared mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oil in skillet. Add onion, green peppers, rice and beef. Stir over high heat until lightly browned. Add tomato sauce and remaining ingredients. Mix well and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
GeneratedRecipe: trim peppers. remove seeds and slice thinly, if not dry. set aside. in a large skillet, cook onion and pepper in oil until tender. stir in ground beef, salt and rice. stir in the tomato sauce, water and mustard. bring to a boil. stir in rice. cover; reduce heat and let simmer 15 minutes or until rice is tender.

Ingredients: 2 c. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 c. butter/margarine, 1/2 c. milk, 1 Tbsp. butter or margarine, melted, 1/2 c. finely chopped pecans, 3 Tbsp. brown sugar or granulated sugar
ReferenceRecipe: In a mixing bowl, stir together flour, 2 tablespoons granulated sugar, baking powder and salt. Cut in 1/2 cup butter/margarine until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Make a well in the center. Combine egg and milk; add all at once to dry mixture. Stir just until dough clings together. Knead gently on a lightly floured surface for 15 strokes. Roll dough into a 15 x 8-inch rectangle. Brush with 1 tablespoon melted butter. Combine pecans and 3 tablespoons brown sugar; sprinkle over dough.
GeneratedRecipe: combine flour, sugar, baking powder and salt. cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse meal. stir in milk and pecans.

Ingredients: 5 lb. potatoes, 1 pt. diced sweet pickle, 2 ribs diced celery, 1 diced onion, 6 eggs, boiled and diced, 1/2 to 3/4 c. sugar (to your taste), salt to your taste, 1 1/2 c. Kraft salad dressing (not mayonnaise), 1 Tbsp. celery seed, 2 Tbsp. mustard
ReferenceRecipe: Wash and cook potatoes, with peeling on. Let cool, then peel and cut into small chunks. Add sweet pickles, celery, onion, eggs, sugar, salt, salad dressing, celery seed and mustard. Mix well. Let set for 1 hour, then refrigerate. Better the next day.
GeneratedRecipe: boil potatoes and peel. cool. dice potatoes, onion, celery and eggs. mix with mayonnaise, mustard, salt, celery seed and sugar. put in refrigerator to chill.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) light Philadelphia cream cheese, 1 c. plain low-fat yogurt, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, 1 tsp. lemon rind, grated, 14 pkg. Equal
ReferenceRecipe: Combine cream cheese and yogurt. Blend until smooth. Stir in remaining ingredients. Chill. Serve with fresh fruit. Yields 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese until smooth. add yogurt, lemon rind, vanilla and lemon rind. blend well. chill. serve with fresh fruit.

Ingredients: 2 lb. baby red potatoes, sliced, 3 1/2 Tbsp. rice wine vinegar, 1 1/2 Tbsp. country-style Dijon mustard, 6 Tbsp. canola oil, 1/2 c. chopped fresh dill, 3/4 lb. pickling cucumbers, sliced, fresh dill sprigs
ReferenceRecipe: Cook the potatoes in pot of boiling water until just tender. Drain. Transfer to a large bowl. Add 2 tablespoons vinegar to hot potatoes and stir gently. Combine remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons vinegar and mustard in a small bowl. Gradually mix in oil. Add chopped dill. Mix into potatoes. Season with salt and pepper. (Can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover, chill and bring to room temperature before serving.) Mix in cucumbers. Garnish with dill sprigs. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes until barely tender. cut into thin slices. in a large bowl, combine potatoes, vinegar, pickling mustard, dill, dill and oil. mix well. pour vinegar mixture over potatoes, dill mixture. cover and chill for several hours or better the flavors are.

Ingredients: 1 lb. hamburger, 1 egg, slightly beaten, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 can (16 oz.) stewed tomatoes, 1 large green pepper, chopped, 3/4 c. uncooked instant rice
ReferenceRecipe: Mix beef, eggs, chili powder, salt and pepper. Shape into 1 1/2-inch balls. Place in 2-quart casserole. Microwave on High until meatballs are set and lose pink color, 4 to 7 minutes. Drain and stir in remaining ingredients. Cover and cook in microwave at High temperature until mixture is bubbly and onions are tender, 4 to 7 minutes. Stir after half of cooking time. Let stand until rice is tender, 2 to 3 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: mix hamburger, egg, salt, pepper and chili powder in large skillet. stir in rice and green pepper. bring to a boil. add stewed tomatoes, rice and simmer 5 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. powdered sugar, 1 large can fruit cocktail, drained, 1 (8 oz.) carton Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Cream together cream cheese and powdered sugar. Blend in fruit cocktail. Fold in Cool Whip. Store in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese and cool whip ( well ). mix in fruit cocktail ( drained ). add sugar and mix well. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 15 oz. can tomato sauce, 1 c. catsup, 1 can undiluted tomato soup, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 grated or finely chopped onion, 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: You can make your own meatballs. I use ones from Sam's.
GeneratedRecipe: in saucepan, add ingredients ( except sugar ). bring to a boil; simmer 20 minutes. add chicken or pork. simmer 20 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. ground chuck, 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 1 (5 oz.) pkg. large noodles, 2 small cans tomato sauce, oregano, celery salt, 1 c. shredded Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground chuck with onions; season to taste with salt, pepper and celery salt and stir well. Add tomato sauce and simmer while noodles cook in separate saucepan. When noodles are cooked, stir them in ground beef mixture and oregano. Pour in casserole dish; top with cheese and place in hot oven, 5 to 7 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground chuck and onion in skillet; drain. cook noodles according to directions on package; drain. in a crock-pot, put a layer of ground chuck over meat; add tomato sauce. season with oregano, salt and oregano. repeat with remaining noodles and tomato sauce. cover and cook on low for 3 to 4 hours. remove from crock-pot. shred and sprinkle on cheese. serve with salad and garlic bread.

Ingredients: 2 lb. ground beef, 2 small onions, chopped, 4 pieces celery, chopped, 2 tsp. chili powder, garlic salt to taste, 2 tsp. salt, green pepper (optional), mushrooms (optional), 2 cans tomato soup, 2 cans mushroom soup, 4 Tbsp. black olives, chopped, 3 cans water, 20 oz. egg noodles, 1 lb. sharp Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown the first 8 ingredients together. Add the remaining ingredients. Simmer slowly for about 30 minutes. Add some tomato juice if mixture gets too thick. Grate and add the cheese. Cook slowly for about 30 minutes more.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onions; drain. add tomato soup, water, mushrooms, chili powder, salt, pepper and garlic powder. simmer for 30 minutes. cook noodles according to package directions. drain.

Ingredients: 3 c. graham cracker crumbs, 2 c. confectioners sugar, 2 eggs, 2 cans crushed pineapple, drained, 2 pkg. Dream Whip, 1 1/2 sticks margarine, melted, 2 sticks margarine, softened, 1 tsp. vanilla, 4 bananas, 1/2 c. walnuts, chopped, maraschino cherries, drained and sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Mix graham crackers and melted margarine in a 9 x 13-inch pan. Press into bottom of pan. Mix confectioners sugar, margarine, eggs and vanilla for 20 minutes until light and fluffy. Put into pan over graham cracker mixture. Put pineapple on top. Slice bananas over pineapple. Mix Dream Whip as directed on package. Spread over top. Sprinkle nuts over top. Refrigerate overnight, uncovered. Top with cherries before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: mix graham cracker crumbs and 1 stick melted margarine. press into a 9 x 13-inch pan. beat confectioners sugar, eggs and vanilla for 15 minutes. spread over crust. slice bananas on top of pineapple. cover with dream whip. sprinkle with nuts and cherries. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1 2/3 c. peach juice, 1 jar spiced peaches, 1 pkg. orange Jell-O, 3 oz. cream cheese, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1/3 c. orange juice
ReferenceRecipe: Drain peaches and measure juice. Heat juice to boiling point. Dissolve Jell-O in hot juice. Chill. Soften cream cheese with milk. Add nuts. Cut up peaches and add to Jell-O mixture. Congeal until firm. Serve on lettuce with mayonnaise.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jell-o in 1 cup boiling water. add orange juice. chill until slightly thickened. add cream cheese and beat until smooth. add peaches and nuts. pour into mold and chill until firm.

Ingredients: 1 c. white sugar, 1/2 c. butter, 1 c. white syrup, 1 c. peanut butter, 6 c. Cheerios, 12 oz. pkg. butterscotch chips, melted, 12 oz. chocolate chips, melted
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first three ingredients in saucepan and bring to boil. Then blend in the peanut butter and Cheerios. Mix together and press into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan. Frost with the melted butterscotch and chocolate chips.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar and syrup. bring to a boil. remove from heat. add peanut butter and cheerios. mix well. press into buttered 9 x 13-inch pan. melt chocolate chips and butterscotch chips together. spread over top of peanut butter mixture. cool and cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. Heritage butter, 1/2 c. unbleached flour, 2 1/4 c. Heritage milk, 1 c. Parmesan cheese, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter slowly in saucepan; add flour, cool a few minutes. Slowly add milk, then cheese and salt. Cook until thickens. Serve with tomato sauce on the side.
GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in saucepan over low heat. stir in flour, salt and milk. cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. remove from heat; stir in cheese until melted.

Ingredients: 1 small head cauliflower, cut in small pieces, 1 red or green pepper, diced, 1 small Vidalia onion, diced, 8 oz. grated Cheddar cheese, 1/2 to 1 c. mayonnaise
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together using only enough mayonnaise to hold veggies together. Chill several hours. Crunchy and delicious. You might not even know it's cauliflower if you make the pieces small enough! Yields 6 to 8 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cauliflower, green pepper, onion and cheese together. mix mayonnaise and mayonnaise together. pour over vegetables.

Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, skinned and deboned, 2 stalks celery, diced well, 1 c. diced onion, 2 qt. tomatoes (fresh or canned), 4 medium potatoes, diced, 1 qt. butter beans, drained if canned, 1 qt. corn, drained if canned, 5 Tbsp. sugar, salt to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Place chicken, celery and onion in a large kettle. Add a quart of water. Simmer until meat is tender. Lift meat from broth and cool. Dice. To the broth, add tomatoes, diced potatoes, meat, beans, corn and sugar. Salt to taste. Simmer slowly, stirring occasionally, for 3 hours. Makes about 6 quarts. Can freeze. Can do ahead.
GeneratedRecipe: boil chicken until tender. remove from bone and cut into bite size pieces. add onion, celery, potatoes, corn, tomatoes and sugar. cook until vegetables are tender. add butter and salt to taste.

Ingredients: 2 lb. beans (California pea beans or New York State beans preferred), 1/2 lb. sauteed bacon or 1/2 lb. salt pork, 8 Tbsp. sugar, 2/3 c. molasses, 2 tsp. dry mustard, 4 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 medium size onion, 1 1/2 qt. water
ReferenceRecipe: Soak beans overnight. In the morning, parboil them for 10 minutes with a teaspoon of baking soda. Then run cold water through the beans in a colander.
GeneratedRecipe: wash beans and soak overnight in water. cook until tender; drain. cook pork until crisp. add onion. cook, covered, about 30 minutes. drain and add water, molasses, salt, sugar, mustard, onion and dry mustard to beans. cook slowly. add bacon and onions. cook slowly for about 1 hour.

Ingredients: 1 large sweet red pepper, 1 large sweet yellow pepper, 1 medium sweet Spanish onion, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3/4 tsp. thyme (dried) leaves, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 6 fresh Polish sausage links, 1/2 c. water, 1/2 c. dry white wine
ReferenceRecipe: Cut each pepper into	12 wedges. Cut onion into 1/2 inch thick slices. Separate into rings. Cook peppers, onion, garlic and thyme in oil in large skillet, over medium heat, 8 to	10 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove to warm platter. Keep warm.
GeneratedRecipe: in large skillet, saute garlic in olive oil and sweet pepper in olive oil. add sausage, onion and red pepper. saute until sausage is browned, about 5 minutes. add wine, water, thyme and pepper; bring to a boil. reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes. remove sausage to platter. place sausage and sauce in skillet. pour sauce over all.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1 box 10x powdered sugar, 2 envelopes Dream Whip, 1 can blueberry or cherry pie filling, 1/2 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Mix cream cheese and sugar together until crumbled with fingers or large fork in a large baking pan. Put in the freezer and let stay until the other ingredients are prepared. Whip Dream Whip according to direction on package. Bake two pie shells with the pecans sprinkled on the bottom. Let cool. Take the cream cheese mixture out of the freezer and add gradually to whipped Dream Whip and beat in mixer until smooth. Pour in cooled pie shells and refrigerate until set. Top with one can of pie filling and serve. This makes 2 pies.
GeneratedRecipe: mix dream whip according to directions on box. add cream cheese and powdered sugar. mix well. add pecans. pour into graham cracker crust. top with cherry pie filling. chill.

Ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, 1 1/2 c. sour cream, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 pkg. Knorr vegetable soup mix, 1 (8 oz.) can water chestnuts, chopped, 3 chopped green onions
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw and drain chopped spinach. Blend with rest of the ingredients. Chill and serve with rye bread.
GeneratedRecipe: thaw spinach and drain well. combine spinach, mayonnaise and soup mix until well blended. stir in chestnuts, water chestnuts, onions and water chestnuts. chill. serve with crackers or crackers or chips.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sharp cheese, 1 large Philadelphia cream cheese, 1 c. crushed pecans, 3 tsp. garlic powder, chili powder
ReferenceRecipe: Grate sharp cheese and mix with cream cheese. Add crushed nuts and garlic powder. Shape into two or three long rolls. Roll in chili powder until well covered. Roll in wax paper, then Reynolds Wrap. Place in refrigerator until ready to serve. Chill well.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all the well. form into ball or wrap in chili powder or chili. refrigerate until firm. roll cheese balls in chili powder to taste.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. honey, 1 (18 oz.) bottle Kraft barbecue sauce, 1 lb. hot dogs, cut up
ReferenceRecipe: Mix honey and barbecue sauce together. Microwave on High for 1 minute. Add cut up hot dogs. Cook 3 minutes on High in 2-quart casserole dish.
GeneratedRecipe: combine barbecue sauce, honey and barbecue sauce. cut hot peppers into bite size pieces. add to crock-pot; cook on medium for 45 minutes. serve with toothpicks.

Ingredients: 1 (14 oz.) sweetened condensed milk, 1 (8 oz.) plain or vanilla yogurt, 1/2 c. chocolate flavored syrup, 2 to 3 candy bars, broken, chopped, 2 c. crushed ice
ReferenceRecipe: In blender, combine all ingredients until smooth. Serve immediately. Garnish as desired.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine milk and chocolate syrup. add ice. beat with mixer until fluffy. pour into 4 or 5-quart ice cream glasses; top with candy bars of candy. garnish with additional syrup, if desired.

Ingredients: 1 whole chicken (4 to 5 lb.) or 8 chicken breast halves, cooked and deboned, 1 (28 oz.) can whole tomatoes, 3 large potatoes, diced, 1 large onion, chopped, 1/2 lb. okra, sliced, 1 (14 oz.) can cream-style corn, 1/2 c. catsup, 1/2 c. barbecue sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Combine chicken, tomatoes, potatoes, onion and okra in 5-quart crock-pot. Set on low; cook 8 hours or until potatoes are tender. Add corn, catsup and barbecue sauce. Cook 10 more minutes and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large pot, combine chicken, potatoes, onion, tomatoes, barbecue sauce, catsup and barbecue sauce. bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour or until chicken is tender.

Ingredients: 1 large head cabbage, grated, 1 c. celery, chopped, 1 green or red pepper, chopped, 1 small onion, chopped, 1 c. carrots, grated fine, 2 c. white sugar, 1/2 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. mustard seed, 1/2 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all together. This keeps for days or can be frozen.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cabbage, green pepper, onion and carrots. mix sugar, vinegar, celery seed, mustard seed and salt. bring to a boil. pour over cabbage mixture and let stand overnight.

Ingredients: 1 can chunk pineapple, 2 cans mandarin oranges, 1 c. miniature marshmallows, 1 c. coconut, 1 c. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Drain fruit real good before mixing with other ingredients. Prepare night before and place in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: drain pineapple and oranges. mix sour cream and coconut with juice. refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 3 c. water, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 c. macaroni, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1/4 c. milk, 1 c. cube cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Bring water to boil. Add salt and macaroni; cook until tender. Drain. Add margarine or butter, milk and cheese. Stir until all is melted together.
GeneratedRecipe: boil and cook macaroni in water until done. add margarine, milk, salt and 1 tablespoon margarine, mixing well. put cheese on top. add a pinch of sugar and heat until cheese melts.

Ingredients: 2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. milk, 1 cube butter or margarine
ReferenceRecipe: Cook to soft ball stage. Remove from heat and add 1 teaspoon vanilla, a little red cake coloring and 1/2 teaspoon soda last thing. Pour over 5 or 6 quarts popcorn. Cover good and pour out on cookie sheet to cool.
GeneratedRecipe: cook sugar and milk until it forms a soft ball in cold water. remove from heat. add butter and beat until creamy.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 c. whole wheat flour, 1/2 c. powdered milk, 6 Tbsp. margarine, 1 tsp. brown sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 egg, 1/2 c. ice water, bouillon cube (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix flour, milk, margarine, sugar and salt together as for pie dough. Mix egg, water and bouillon. Add to first mixture.
GeneratedRecipe: blend flour, salt and brown sugar. set aside. in small saucepan, combine ice water, bouillon cube and margarine. bring to a boil. stir in enough flour to make a soft dough. beat egg into milk. then stir into flour mixture. add to dry ingredients to wet ingredients. cook and stir until mixture thickens and thickens.

Ingredients: 3 lb. ground beef, 1 stick butter, 1 small can pimentos, 1 can tomato soup, salt and pepper, chili powder to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Brown beef. Put in the remainder of ingredients and let simmer 3 to 4 hours on low.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef in butter. add salt and pepper to taste. stir in tomato soup and chili powder. simmer for 10 minutes. stir occasionally.

Ingredients: 1 medium head cabbage, 1 1/2 c. water, 2 medium potatoes, stripples, fried and crumbled on top, 1 medium green pepper, 1 medium onion, salt to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Slice cabbage and wash. Lay cabbage in frying pan. Slice onion, green pepper and potatoes over cabbage. Pour in water and stripple drippings. Cook on high until boiled down. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer 5 minutes. Remove cover and cook until tender.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up and boil potatoes, onion and green pepper together for 10 to 15 minutes. add salt and pepper to taste. add water and stripples potatoes. stir in stripples mixture. add salt and pepper.

Ingredients: 12 oz. bag cranberries, 3/4 of 1 orange with peel, 2 (3 oz.) pkg. lemon jello, 3 c. very hot water, 3/4 c. diced celery, 3/4 c. chopped pecans, 3/4 c. crushed pineapple, drained
ReferenceRecipe: Grind cranberries and cut up orange in food chopper. Add sugar and let stand in refrigerator. Dissolve jello in hot water. Chill until syrupy. Add all other ingredients and stir well. Chill and stir again. Place in refrigerator until firm. Best made the day before serving.
GeneratedRecipe: chop cranberries coarsely. mix jello, water and pineapple. add orange peel, celery, pecans and pineapple to cranberry mixture. chill until firm.

Ingredients: 1/4 lb. bacon, 1 large onion, 2 c. chopped potatoes, 2 c. water, salt and pepper, 2 c. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Saute bacon with chopped onion until bacon is browned and onion is very tender. Add water, potatoes, salt and pepper. Cover; bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender. Add 2 cups milk and heat the chowder until it is very hot, but not boiling.
GeneratedRecipe: fry bacon until crisp. add onion and cook until tender. add potatoes, water, salt and pepper. cook until potatoes are done. add milk.

Ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) can frozen orange juice, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen lemonade, 1 (6 oz.) can frozen limeade, 1 large bottle ginger ale, 4 c. cold water
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ingredients just before serving. Pour over crushed ice or frozen ice ring. Serves 12 to 15.
GeneratedRecipe: dilute lemonade according to package directions. mix well with orange juices. add enough water to make 2 large punch cups. add ginger ale just before serving. yields 25 ( 1/2 cup ) servings.

Ingredients: 2 c. ketchup, 2 c. brown sugar, 1 c. bourbon, 3 pkg. Oscar Mayer smoked sausages, cut into bite size pieces *
ReferenceRecipe: Mix ketchup, brown sugar and bourbon in a saucepan. Bring to a full boil. Lower heat and allow sauce to thicken, about 30 minutes. Add sausages and cook for 10 minutes. Serve hot. Sauce may be saved in refrigerator for several days.
GeneratedRecipe: * i use a crock-pot. this is a great way to cook on the night before. it 's ready to serve.

Ingredients: 2 small pkg. strawberry Jell-O, 1 c. boiling water, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen strawberries, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 large can crushed pineapple with juice, 2 large bananas, mashed, 1/2 pt. sour cream
ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve Jell-O in boiling water and add all other ingredients, except sour cream. Pour 1/2 of mixture in square, glass container and let set up in refrigerator until firm.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, stir jell-o and boiling water until dissolved; drain. add frozen berries, pineapple and bananas. mix all together. pour half of mixture into a 9 x 13-inch oblong dish. put in refrigerator until solid. spread with sour cream and rest of jell-o mixture. pour remaining mixture around edges of the edge. chill until firm.

Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. Hershey's cocoa, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1/2 c. "151" rum, 2 Tbsp. light corn syrup, 2 1/2 c. crushed vanilla wafers, 1 c. coconut
ReferenceRecipe: Mix thoroughly. Shape into 1-inch balls. Roll in sugar (1/2 cup). Place on wax paper. Can be stored in well-sealed container.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together all ingredients, except powdered sugar, and form into small balls. roll in powdered sugar or coconut. store in tightly closed container.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. unflavored gelatin, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, 4 egg yolks, 1/2 c. lime juice (2 to 3 limes), 1/4 c. water, 1 tsp. grated lime peel, 2 to 3 drops green food coloring, 1 graham cracker crust, 4 egg whites, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 c. whipped cream or small bowl Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix the 1/2 cup sugar, salt and gelatin. Beat egg yolks, lime juice and water together. Add to gelatin mixture. Bring to a boil; stir in peel and food coloring. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: soften gelatin in water. combine in top of double boiler with sugar, salt and lime peel. beat egg yolks with a fork or mixer. combine with gelatin mixture. cook until mixture comes to a boil. remove from heat; stir in gelatin. stir in peel and food coloring. chill until partially set. fold in cool whip. pour into a graham cracker crust and chill until set.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. hamburger, 1/2 onion, salt and pepper to taste, 1 can cut green beans, 1 can tomato soup, mashed potatoes
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger and onion; drain. Mix all ingredients except potatoes. Put mashed potatoes on top of mix. Broil enough to brown top of potatoes. Let cool for about 15 minutes. Serve.
GeneratedRecipe: fry hamburger and onion together. drain off grease. add potatoes, green beans, tomato soup, salt and pepper. simmer for 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 1/4 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 c. enriched cornmeal, 1 medium-sized eggplant (about 1 1/2 lb.), pared and cut into 1/2-inch slices, 1/2 c. melted butter or margarine, melted, 1 (8 oz.) can pizza sauce, 1 c. (4 oz.) shredded Mozzarella cheese, 2 Tbsp. chopped parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Combine Parmesan cheese and cornmeal. Dip eggplant into butter; coat with cornmeal mixture. Place in greased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2-inch jelly roll pan. Spread slices with pizza sauce.
GeneratedRecipe: arrange eggplant slices in a single layer in a 9 x 13-inch baking dish. combine cornmeal, parmesan cheese and parsley. spoon over eggplant.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. light brown sugar, 1/2 c. light corn syrup, 1/2 stick sweet butter, 1/2 c. heavy cream, 1/2 tsp. vanilla extract
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients except for vanilla in a heavy saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. From the time the sauce comes to a full rolling boil, boil it 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from the burner. Add the vanilla. Let cool and serve or pour it into a container. Will keep in the pantry for 1 week; warm before serving. Very good over Haagen dazas Vanilla Swiss Almond ice cream.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar, corn syrup and cream in saucepan. bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. boil for 5 minutes. remove from heat. add butter and vanilla. beat until spreading consistency.

Ingredients: 3 medium leeks, chopped, 1/3 c. onion, chopped, 6 Tbsp. butter, 6 Tbsp. flour, salt and pepper to taste, 8 c. chicken stock, 5 c. diced potatoes, 1/2 to 3/4 c. heavy whipping cream
ReferenceRecipe: Saute leeks and onion in butter; add flour and mix well. Add chicken broth to potatoes with onion mixture. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cook until potatoes are done, about 8 minutes. Add whipping cream and heat through.
GeneratedRecipe: saute onion in butter until soft. add leeks and flour; saute until golden. add chicken stock. cook until thickened, stirring constantly. add potatoes and simmer 15 minutes. add whipping cream and heat through. salt and pepper to taste. serves 6.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 c. powdered sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla extract
ReferenceRecipe: Blend all, mixing well.
GeneratedRecipe: combine the cream cheese and sugar until smooth and creamy. add vanilla extract and beat well. use as a dip or dessert.

Ingredients: 15 to 20 medium size mushrooms, 6 Tbsp. butter, softened, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3 Tbsp. shredded Jack cheese, 2 Tbsp. dry red or white wine, 1 tsp. soy sauce, 1/3 c. fine cracker crumbs
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together last 6 ingredients. Fill mushrooms with cheese mixture. Spray pan with Pam. Broil 5 to 6 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: wash and dry mushrooms. remove stems and chop stems. melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. add mushrooms and saute until tender, about 5 minutes. stir in cheese, soy sauce and garlic. cook and stir until cheese is melted. remove from heat and stir in cracker crumbs.

Ingredients: 1 (15 oz.) can Hormel chili (no beans), 4 c. tortilla chips, 1 1/2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese, 1 1/2 c. shredded lettuce, 1 (6 oz.) container avocado dip
ReferenceRecipe: In a small saucepan, heat chili until hot. Scatter chips on a large serving platter. Layer hot chili, cheese, lettuce and avocado dip on top. Serve.
