GeneratedRecipe: spread beans on serving plate. spread chili over beans. top with lettuce, avocado dip and cheese. serve with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 2 1/2 to 3 c. cooked, chopped chicken, 1 c. celery, diced, 1 tsp. salt, 1 (8 1/2 oz.) can pineapple tidbits, drained, 1 (11 oz.) can mandarin oranges, drained, 1/2 c. slivered almonds, toasted, 1/2 c. lemon peel, 2 Tbsp. chopped green onions, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine and mix well.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine chicken, celery, oranges, pineapple, almonds, onions, lemon juice, salt and lemon peel. cover and chill. just before serving, stir in almonds. serve on lettuce leaves. makes 6 servings.

Ingredients: 1 bag medium-hot cinnamon candies, 1 large can crushed pineapple, 1/3 c. large marshmallows, 1 large Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together candies and pineapple; let set for 2 hours. Then mix together with remaining ingredients.
GeneratedRecipe: drain pineapple. add marshmallows and cinnamon candies. let sit for 10 minutes before serving. add cool whip.

Ingredients: 1 c. uncooked noodles, 2 c. uncooked cabbage, 2 Tbsp. margarine or butter, Velveeta cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Cook noodles. Cook cabbage in a separate pan so the cabbage does not dominate the flavor. Toss the two together; heat again after adding the seasonings (salt and pepper). Very good with Velveeta cheese melted into mixture. This is a good dish if children do not like cabbage but like noodles. Makes 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: cook noodles according to package directions. drain and set aside. melt butter in skillet. add cabbage and cheese. cook over low heat until cheese is melted.

Ingredients: 1 chicken (about 2 1/2 lb.), 1 can water chestnuts, sliced, 3 Tbsp. salad oil, 1 1/2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 Tbsp. sherry, 3 Tbsp. water, cooked rice
ReferenceRecipe: Clean chicken and chop into 2-inch pieces. Drain chestnuts. Brown chicken in mixture of oil and soy sauce. After chicken has fried for several minutes, add sherry. Cook over brisk heat until sherry partly evaporates, then add water chestnuts and water. Cover and simmer about 45 minutes. Serve with hot rice. Serves 4.
GeneratedRecipe: in a skillet over medium-high heat, stir-fry chicken, stirring often. add oil to skillet. cook 1 minute. push aside. add water chestnuts and soy sauce; stir to mix. cook, stirring over low heat about 3 minutes. stir in water chestnuts and heat through. serve over cooked rice.

Ingredients: 1 c. (6 oz.) semi-sweet chocolate chips, 4 oz. chocolate coated mint cream patties, broken up, 1/2 c. undiluted evaporated milk, 1/2 c. light corn syrup, 1 Tbsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: In medium sauce pan, combine chocolate chips, mint patties, evaporated milk and corn syrup. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until all ingredients are melted. Remove from heat. Stir in butter until melted. Remove from heat. Stir in butter until melted. Serve warm over ice cream. Store covered in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: heat evaporated milk and corn syrup in saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil. remove from heat; stir in chocolate chips. chill 1 hour. melt chocolate chips with corn syrup in saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. remove from heat. add butter, stirring until smooth. refrigerate until cool. spread mixture evenly on mint patties. freeze until firm. melt remaining chocolate and cream in a small saucepan over low heat. dip each cup of mint in chocolate. place mint in an ice cube trays with remaining chocolate. freeze until firm.

Ingredients: 1 large pkg. mixed frozen vegetables, 1 carton sour cream, garlic powder, salt and black pepper to taste, 1/4 stick butter, 1/2 c. Cheddar cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Cook mixed vegetables until tender; drain liquid. Mix all ingredients and pour into baking dish. Cover mixture with grated cheese. Heat in hot oven until cheese is melted and vegetables heated, 20 to 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: cook vegetables in salted water until tender. drain. mix together cheese, sour cream, butter, garlic powder, salt and black pepper. add vegetables.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, browned and drained, 1 small onion, chopped, 1 small green pepper, diced (optional), 2 cans tomato soup, 1 large can peeled tomatoes, 1/2 c. water (if needed), 1 tsp. sugar, salt and pepper, Tabasco sauce to taste (if desired), 1 small can tomato paste, 1 to 2 cans red kidney beans
ReferenceRecipe: Cook all together for about 45 minutes. Add red kidney beans about 10 minutes before done cooking.
GeneratedRecipe: combine in crock-pot the first four ingredients. stir thoroughly. add remaining ingredients and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.

Ingredients: 1-1/2 lb. hamburg, 1 cup chopped celery, 1 small chopped onion, 1 can sliced mushrooms, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can cream of chicken soup, Chinese noodles
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat in chunks in butter; add celery, onion and mushrooms. Cook for approximately 10 minutes on low. Add soup and mix together. Pour in greased casserole dish. Cover with chinese noodles. Bake at 350 for 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: brown hamburg and onion; drain off fat. add noodles, cream of chicken. mix soups and mushrooms together. place mixture in casserole dish and bake uncovered at 350 for 1 hour. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: pkg. tortillas, 2 pkg. cream cheese (regular or low-fat), 1 (16 oz.) salsa
ReferenceRecipe: Spread cream cheese over tortillas. Roll tortillas and cut into small segments. Serve tortillas with salsa for dipping!
GeneratedRecipe: blend cream cheese and salsa together. spread on tortillas, roll up and chill in refrigerator overnight. cut into pinwheels and serve.

Ingredients: 3 tomatoes, firm or unripened, 2 c. corn meal, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. paprika, 1 Tbsp. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Slice tomatoes in thick crosswise slices. Combine all dry ingredients. Coat with dry mixture. Drop into hot fat until golden brown. This has been passed on down from generation.
GeneratedRecipe: wash and slice tomatoes. mix corn meal, flour, salt, pepper and paprika. dip tomato slices in mixture and fry in hot oil until golden brown.

Ingredients: 1 tall can (1 2/3 c.) evaporated milk, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. (2 c.) semi-sweet chocolate pieces, 3 (4 oz.) bars sweet cooking chocolate, 1 pt. Marshmallow Creme, 2 c. chopped pecans
ReferenceRecipe: Combine milk, butter, sugar and salt. Bring to a vigorous boil, stirring often, then reduce heat and simmer 6 minutes. Meanwhile place remaining ingredients (except pecans) in a large bowl. Gradually pour boiling syrup over the chocolate-marshmallow mixture; beat until chocolate is melted. Stir in nuts. Pour into buttered pans and store in a cool place several hours to harden before cutting in squares.
GeneratedRecipe: combine evaporated milk, butter and chocolate bars in a large saucepan. cook over low heat, stirring constantly until chocolate melts, about 5 minutes, stirring constantly. remove from heat and add marshmallow creme, chocolate pieces and pecans. beat until smooth. pour into a lightly greased 8-inch square pan to cool. cut in squares; cover and chill 2 hours. makes 4 dozen.

Ingredients: 1 clove garlic, 1 c. fresh basil leaves, 1/4 c. melted butter, 1/4 c. olive oil, 1/4 c. finely chopped fresh parsley
ReferenceRecipe: Hand mix until smooth or may be prepared in blender. Use as sauce over 1 pound pasta or noodles.
GeneratedRecipe: brush basil over hot water. allow to stand for 20 minutes; drain well. place in a blender. place in a blender and process until smooth. add butter and process until creamy in consistency. add remaining ingredients. store leftover sauce in refrigerator. makes 1 3/4 cups.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. brown sugar, 1/2 c. oleo, 1 1/2 tsp. imitation vanilla, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 1/2 c. flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 c. chopped nuts, powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Combine brown sugar, oleo and vanilla and mix well. Add beaten eggs, half at a time, and mix well. Combine flour and baking powder and add to mixture. Blend very well. Stir in nuts.
GeneratedRecipe: beat together brown sugar, oleo, eggs and vanilla. combine flour and baking powder in bowl. add to sugar mixture. stir in nuts. drop cookies by teaspoon into cookie. bake 10 minutes in lightly ungreased pan. let cool. makes 2 dozen.

Ingredients: 2 envelopes Knox unflavored gelatine, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 1/2 c. boiling water, 1 c. mayonnaise, 1/4 bottle Italian dressing, 3 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 c. chopped cooked asparagus, 1/2 c. chopped tomato, 1 1/2 Tbsp. chopped onion
ReferenceRecipe: In a medium bowl, mix gelatine with sugar. Add boiling water; stir until gelatine is completely dissolved. With wire whip or beater, blend mayonnaise, Italian dressing and lemon juice. Chill, stirring occasionally, until mixture is consistency of unbeaten egg white. Fold in remaining ingredients. Turn into a 9-inch mold; chill until firm. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve gelatine in boiling water. add italian dressing, sugar, lemon juice and lemon juice. chill until slightly thickened. fold in asparagus, onion and asparagus. pour into mold and chill until firm.

Ingredients: 2 c. shredded sweetened coconut, 6 Tbsp. butter, 1 yellow cake mix, 2 tsp. milk, 3 to 3 1/2 c. powdered sugar, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Melt 3 tablespoons of butter in a saute pan or skillet over medium heat; allow the remaining portion to soften at room temperature. Add the coconut and pecans to skillet and stir constantly until the mixture is golden brown (watch carefully not to scorch it). Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towel. Mix the cake mix according to package directions, adding 1 cup of the toasted coconut and pecans. Divide the batter among three 8-inch round pans and bake and cool according to package directions. The extra layer seems to make the cake moist and "special."
GeneratedRecipe: prepare cake mix as directed on package. bake in a 9 x 13-inch pan. cool. combine cream cheese, sweetened condensed milk and vanilla; beat until smooth. spread over coconut.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. shortening, 1/8 c. cider vinegar, 1 lb. lean ground beef, 1 tsp. salt, 1 large onion, finely chopped, 1 tsp. chili powder, 1/2 green bell pepper, chopped, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 c. celery, finely chopped, 1/2 tsp. mustard, 1/2 c. water, 1 tsp. Worcestershire Sauce, 1/2 c. ketchup
ReferenceRecipe: Brown meat in shortening. Add onion, green pepper, and celery. Cook until vegetables are tender and can be easily pierced with a fork. Add remaining ingredients. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes. Serve on toasted buns.
GeneratedRecipe: melt shortening in heavy skillet; brown ground beef. add onion, pepper, celery, chili powder, worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, water and mustard. cover and simmer 10 minutes. add ketchup, worcestershire sauce and chili sauce.

Ingredients: 12 crushed graham crackers, 3 Tbsp. powdered sugar, 1/2 c. commercial chocolate powder mix, 1/4 c. liquid butter mixture, 1 qt. vanilla fat-free frozen yogurt, 1/2 jar lite chocolate fudge topping, 1 pkg. powdered whipped topping, 1/2 c. cold skim milk, 1/2 tsp. vanilla, 1 Tbsp. commercial wheat and barley cereal
ReferenceRecipe: Blend graham cracker crumbs, sugar, chocolate mix and liquid butter. Press into a deep dish pie pan that has been sprayed with a nonfat cooking spray. Pour softened yogurt into pie crust. Place in freezer at least for 1 hour. Spread fudge topping on top. Freeze at least 30 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: prepare graham crackers; set aside. combine chocolate mixture and butter and press into bottom and up sides of 9-inch spring-form pan. combine powdered sugar and vanilla; beat with electric mixer until blended. combine yogurt and milk; add to cooled crackers. blend and fold in whipped topping. spoon into crust. freeze 4 hours. garnish with chocolate mixture. yields 8 to 10 servings.

Ingredients: 1 pt. mayonnaise, 1/2 c. catsup, 2 chopped, hard-boiled eggs, 1/2 c. pickle relish, 1/4 c. chopped green onion, 1/4 tsp. garlic, black pepper, 3 Tbsp. fresh parsley, 1 can shrimp, 1 can crabmeat
ReferenceRecipe: Mix in order listed. Pour over favorite salad to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: dice eggs ( do not peel ). combine all ingredients and mix well. serve on crackers, melba toast or toast points.

Ingredients: 2 pkg. yeast, 1 c. lukewarm water (110~ to 115~), 1 tsp. sugar, 2 c. scalded milk, 2/3 c. shortening, 3/4 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. salt, 2 beaten eggs, 10 to 11 c. flour
ReferenceRecipe: Add shortening and sugar to scalded milk; stir until dissolved. Pour cooled milk mixture into large mixing bowl to cool. Dissolve yeast and salt in water. When yeast mixture starts to froth, mix with milk mixture. Add beaten eggs to mixture and beat vigorously, using portable mixer or wooden spoon. Begin adding flour, one cup at a time, mixing until you have a stiff batter. Add a total of 6 cups of flour, one cup at a time until you have a stick batter. Place sticky dough on floured surface and knead in remaining flour or enough flour to make dough elastic and smooth. This process takes about 5 to 10 minutes. Dough will be tacky to touch.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve yeast in lukewarm water. add sugar, salt and shortening. cool to lukewarm. add eggs, milk and flour. mix well. cover and let rise in warm place until double in bulk.

Ingredients: Minute Rice, 2 to 4 pork chops, oil, green onions, chopped, 1 small jar sliced mushrooms, drained
ReferenceRecipe: Use recipe for Minute Rice (number of servings you prefer). Dice pork chops and fry in small amount of oil (number of pork chops depend on servings of rice). Add green onions to pork chops and mushrooms; simmer for a few minutes. Mix rice with pork chop mixture and simmer on low heat, about 3 to 5 minutes; stir occasionally to prevent sticking. (This can also be prepared in a wok.) Serve over chow-mein noodles; sprinkle with soy sauce.
GeneratedRecipe: in skillet, heat 1 tablespoon oil. brown chopped onions, green onions and mushrooms. place on uncooked pork chops; cook on medium heat for 5 minutes. add uncooked green onion and mushrooms. let simmer 5 minutes more. add rice mixture and cook another 5 minutes.

Ingredients: 3/4 c. flour, 2 eggs, 1/8 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. milk
ReferenceRecipe: Make batter, beating well until smooth. Pour into a squeeze mustard or catsup bottle. Squeeze into hot grease in a circular motion. Fry until lightly brown and crisp. Drain well on paper towels. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar or confectioners sugar. May also be served for breakfast with syrup and butter.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs. add milk, salt and flour. beat until smooth. drop by spoonfuls into boiling broth. cover and cook 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 9 c. peeled and diced cucumbers, 1 c. diced onions, 1 c. diced green pepper, pimento (for color; optional), 2 Tbsp. noniodized salt, 2 c. sugar, 1 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. celery seed
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first 4 ingredients. Mix together the remaining ingredients and pour over the cucumber mixture (do not cook this). Keep in gallon jar in refrigerator. Will keep a long time.
GeneratedRecipe: mix cucumbers, salt, onions, pepper and pimento together. cover with ice cubes and let stand for 2 hours. drain. mix vinegar, sugar and celery seed. pour over cucumbers, onion and green pepper. store covered in refrigerator. keeps indefinitely.

Ingredients: 2 c. chicken broth, 4 Tbsp. olive oil, 2 (15 oz.) cans cannellini beans, 2 large heads escarole, 4 minced garlic cloves, 8 fresh basil leaves, cut up, 2 loaves hot Italian bread
ReferenceRecipe: In a large saucepan, place chicken broth and escarole. Be sure it is washed and coarsely cut. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 hour. Gently brown the garlic in the oil. Add the cannellini beans and their liquid and heat thoroughly. Combine with the escarole and let simmer for 10 to 20 minutes. Stir carefully with a wooden spoon. This should have a soupy consistency; add more broth or water if necessary. Serve with red pepper flakes and fresh grated cheese. Hot Italian bread is necessary to soak up all flavor.
GeneratedRecipe: cut escarole and remove tough outer leaves. cut up stalks of garlic. heat a large skillet of oil and add garlic. saute a few minutes. add chicken broth. when beans are hot, stir in escarole and cook 10 minutes more. add 2 tablespoons of water and simmer for a few minutes. put soup in blender and puree. add 1 cup at a time and blend. if too thick, add a little water ( 1 cup ). serves 8 to 10.

Ingredients: 1/3 dry vermouth, 2/3 gin, olive
ReferenceRecipe: Into 16 ounce mixing glass, pour wine, then add gin and ice. Stir 15 to 20 times. Strain into glass.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients in a shaker. shake well before using. store in airtight container. makes 1 cup.

Ingredients: 3 c. diced chicken, 3 sweet pickles, diced, 4 hard-boiled eggs, chopped, 1 1/2 c. celery, mayonnaise (enough to mix)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together well. Chill overnight. You can substitute tuna or turkey for chicken in recipe.
GeneratedRecipe: cook chicken and debone. add eggs, pickles, celery and pickles to chicken. mix well. add mayonnaise. salt and pepper when ready to serve.

Ingredients: 1 orange, 1 apple, 1 pear, 1 plum, 1 nectarine, 1 banana, 1 c. fresh cut pineapple, 1/2 c. raisins, 1 (6 oz.) pkg. chopped almonds, 1/2 c. coconut, 1 c. grapes, 1/2 c. grapefruit (optional), 1 c. Marzetti's honey Dijon dressing, seasonal fruit, 1/2 c. each: blueberries, strawberries cherries, etc.
ReferenceRecipe: Peel and/or cut fruit as appropriate. Mix all ingredients. Preparation time: 15 to 20 minutes. Serves 6 to 10, depending on how much fruit, seasonal varieties, size, etc.
GeneratedRecipe: in bowl, toss together the fruit and almonds; mix with honey; stir in honey. chill overnight. just before serving, add the dressing and mix again.

Ingredients: 2 c. fine dirt (leave out rock), 1/2 c. water, 1 set clean clothes
ReferenceRecipe: Combine dirt and water. Stir 75 times, until mixed. Take mixture and divide in half. Place on hot rock in sun and bake for 1 hour. Wipe hands on clothes and show mom.
GeneratedRecipe: add water and leave for 1 hour to set. add rock salt. put in a quart jar, then add a generous amount of ice.

Ingredients: 3 lb. cabbage, shredded (1 medium head), 1/2 green pepper, finely shredded, 1/2 red pepper, finely shredded, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1 c. cider vinegar, 1/2 c. vegetable oil, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 1/2 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. celery seed, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. freshly ground pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Shred cabbage and peppers and combine with onion; set aside.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine cabbage, green pepper and onion. in a small saucepan, combine oil, vinegar, sugar, celery seed, mustard, salt and pepper. bring to a boil. pour over cabbage mixture. cover and refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight.

Ingredients: 1 c. mayonnaise, 1/3 c. crushed pineapple, 1 Tbsp. milk, 1 tsp. poppy seed (optional), 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 8 to 10 c. coleslaw mix
ReferenceRecipe: Mix dressing ingredients well and pour over coleslaw mix.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and chill. serve with fresh vegetables. makes 1 1/2 cups. can be frozen.

Ingredients: 1 lb. box oyster crackers, 1 pkg. Original Ranch dressing mix, 1/2 tsp. lemon pepper, 1/2 tsp. dill weed (heavy measure), 1/2 tsp. parsley garlic salt, 1 c. Wesson oil
ReferenceRecipe: In a large container, mix together all ingredients except crackers. Blend well. Stir in crackers and let sit, stirring occasionally, until all liquid is absorbed. Serve. Store at room temperature in covered container.
GeneratedRecipe: mix oil, dressing mix, dill weed, garlic salt, pepper and lemon pepper. pour over crackers and mix well.

Ingredients: 2 3/4 c. all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. butter (2 sticks), 3/4 c. packed brown sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 2 eggs, 3/4 c. granulated sugar, 2 c. chocolate chips morsels, 1 c. chopped nuts
ReferenceRecipe: Combine flour, baking soda and salt in a small bowl. In large bowl, beat butter, sugars and vanilla. Add eggs, one at a time, beat well. Gradually beat in flour mixture. Stir in morsels and nuts. Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
GeneratedRecipe: combine sugar and butter. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. ( add vanilla and brown sugar and beat well. ) combine flour, baking soda and salt; add to creamed mixture. add melted butter, nuts and chocolate. beat until well blended. pour into greased and floured 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.

Ingredients: 1 large head cabbage, cleaned and cut into pieces, 1 can corned beef, 1 medium onion, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients into pan and cook until cabbage is tender. Potatoes may be added.
GeneratedRecipe: boil cabbage until tender. add chopped onion, diced corned beef soup and cook slowly for a few minutes, or until onion is done. add shredded cheese and cook until melted over low heat.

Ingredients: 2 lb. fresh asparagus, 1 c. boiling water, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/4 c. water, 1/4 c. butter, 3 Tbsp. sesame seed, toasted
ReferenceRecipe: Place asparagus spears in large skillet. Add boiling water and salt. Cook 5 to 7 minutes. Remove asparagus and keep warm. Drain cooking liquid, reserving 1/2 cup in small saucepan.
GeneratedRecipe: cook asparagus in boiling water until tender. drain and set aside. combine cornstarch, salt and sesame seed in a small saucepan. add boiling water and butter. cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. stir in sesame seed.

Ingredients: 1 c. rice, 1 lb. kielbasa, cut in 2-inches, 1 medium onion, chopped, 1/2 c. chopped green pepper, 1/2 c. sliced celery, 1 (8 oz.) can tomatoes, 4 drops hot pepper sauce
ReferenceRecipe: Cook rice according to directions. While rice is cooking, spray a large skillet. On medium heat, add kielbasa, onion, pepper and celery; saute. Add tomatoes and hot pepper sauce; drain rice and add ingredients together. Cook thoroughly.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, cook kielbasa, onion, green pepper and celery until tender. add tomatoes and hot sauce. bring to a boil. stir in rice. cover and remove from heat. let stand 5 minutes.

Ingredients: 1 (14 oz.) bag caramels, 1/3 c. evaporated milk, 1 Pillsbury German chocolate cake mix, 1 stick melted margarine, 1/2 c. evaporated milk, 1 c. chocolate chips, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: First, unwrap caramels and place in medium bowl. Add evaporated milk and microwave for 2 minutes. Take out and stir until smooth.
GeneratedRecipe: melt caramels and milk. mix cake mix and melted margarine. put half the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan. mix chocolate chips, 1/2 cup evaporated milk and margarine until melted; pour over caramels. add walnuts.

Ingredients: 2 quarts sweet apple cider, 2 cups orange juice, 1 cup lemon juice, juice from 2 cans pineapple, 1 stick cinnamon, 1 tsp whole cloves, Sugar or honey to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Combine ingredients. Simmer 5 minutes. Strain and serve hot. Sweeten with sugar or honey to taste.
GeneratedRecipe: put all ingredients in a large pan and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes ( or until sugar dissolves ). serve hot.

Ingredients: 2 c. plain flour, 2 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 stick margarine, 1/2 c. cooking oil, 1 c. water, 3 Tbsp. cocoa, 2 eggs, beaten, 1/2 c. buttermilk, 1 tsp. soda, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Note: To make buttermilk, add 1/2 teaspoon vinegar in 1/2 cup milk.
GeneratedRecipe: mix flour, sugar, cocoa, soda and salt. add buttermilk, oil, eggs and vanilla. mix well. pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan.

Ingredients: hot peppers, to your taste, 18 large tomatoes, sliced, 3 bell peppers, chopped, 6 onions, chopped, 1 c. vinegar, 1 c. sugar, 3 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. cloves, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1 tsp. allspice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Boil for 1 hour, then can.
GeneratedRecipe: place first 4 ingredients in large pan; add salt and stir in other ingredients. simmer slowly until tender, stirring constantly. ladle into pint jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 envelope soup mix (Lipton recipe), 16 oz. carton sour cream, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, 1 tsp. lemon juice, 1 can sliced water chestnuts, drained and chopped, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, squeezed dry
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Stir well. Refrigerate overnight. Serve with crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: thaw spinach in colander and rinse. squeeze out water. mix all ingredients together. refrigerate for at least 2 hours. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 2 egg whites, slightly beaten, 2 Tbsp. reduced-calorie mayonnaise, 2 tsp. chopped fresh parsley, 1 1/4 tsp. Old Bay seasoning, 1 tsp. reduced-sodium Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/2 c. soft breadcrumbs, 1 lb. fresh lump crabmeat, drained, olive oil-flavored vegetable cooking spray
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first 7 ingredients. Stir in breadcrumbs and crabmeat and shape into 8 (2 1/2-inch) patties. Place on a baking sheet lined with wax paper. Chill 30 minutes. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray. Place over medium high heat until hot. Add crab cakes. Cook 3 minutes on each side or until browned. Yield: 4 servings.
GeneratedRecipe: combine oil-flavored breadcrumbs, oil-flavored seasoning, mustard, parsley, egg whites, mayonnaise, bay seasoning and pepper in a large bowl; mix well. stir in crabmeat; chill until firm, about 1 hour. shape into 12 patties; grill over medium hot coals, turning once, until lightly browned, 5 to 6 minutes. serve with cocktail sauce. makes 3 servings.

Ingredients: Bell pepper, onion, celery, butter, chicken, salt and pepper to taste, spaghetti noodles, 1 lb velveeta cheese, 1 can Rotel, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1 can English Peas
ReferenceRecipe: Saute Bell peppers, onion and celery in butter. Boil chicken with salt and pepper. Retrieve the chicken, save the water to boil the noodles in. Chop the chicken, set aside. Ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) can seedless tart Bing cherries, drained, 1 (16 oz.) can crushed pineapple, drained, 1 1/2 bananas, sliced (cover with juice of 1 lemon), 2 c. sour cream, 1 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Stir all together. May add nuts if desired. Spread into a 9 x 13-inch pan and freeze. Remove 15 to 20 minutes before serving to soften slightly. Slice and serve on lettuce. May freeze in individual muffin cups.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together and put in 9 x 13-inch pyrex dish. freeze. let thaw about 15 to 20 minutes before serving.

Ingredients: 1 c. mustard, 1 c. water, 2 sticks butter, 1 c. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2/3 bottle Karo white syrup
ReferenceRecipe: Mix mustard and water. Heat, add butter and melt, then add rest of ingredients. Heat on low boil for 1/2 hour. Add salt and pepper to taste.
GeneratedRecipe: bring to boil and simmer 30 minutes. baste chicken and baste frequently with sauce. this is good as a basting sauce with the meat while cooking.

Ingredients: 1 (No. 2 1/2) can peach halves, drained, 1/2 c. vanilla wafer crumbs, 1 c. heavy cream, whipped, walnut halves (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Roll peach halves in vanilla wafer crumbs until well coated. Place halves, cut side down, in sherbet glasses. Top peach halves with spoonful of whipped cream and walnuts.
GeneratedRecipe: line bottom and sides of 9-inch spring-form pan with vanilla wafer crumbs. arrange peach halves on top of peach halves. cover with whipped cream. sprinkle with walnut halves. freeze until firm.

Ingredients: 8 oz. cream cheese, 3 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1/4 c. sugar, 2 c. chopped raw apples, 1 small can drained crushed pineapple (in heavy syrup), 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 bottle maraschino cherries, chopped, 8 oz. Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together cream cheese, mayonnaise and sugar. Add chopped raw apples, crushed pineapple, pecans and cherries. Fold in Cool Whip and chill.
GeneratedRecipe: cream together cream cheese, sugar, mayonnaise and pineapple. fold in cool whip, apples, apples, cherries and pecans. pour into 9 x 13-inch pan or individual molds. sprinkle with syrup. freeze until firm.

Ingredients: 2 (8 oz.) cream cheese, softened, 2 c. shredded mild Cheddar cheese, 1 Tbsp. parsley flakes, 1 (5 oz.) jar Kraft Old English cheese spread, 1 Tbsp. crushed chives, 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients, except walnuts. Form into a ball and roll in chopped walnuts.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cream cheese, cheddar cheese and cheddar cheese. mix until well blended. stir in onion, chives and chives. shape into a ball. roll in chopped walnuts. chill. serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 3 c. sweet potatoes, diced, 1/2 c. pineapple, diced and drained, 1/2 c. raisins, 1/4 c. pecans, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Cook potatoes until tender, but not mushy and drain. Butter baking dish generously. Bake in oven 30 minutes. Good with cold lunches or hot dinners.
GeneratedRecipe: place the sweet potatoes in a saucepan. add the pineapple, salt, sugar and butter; cover and simmer for 25 minutes. add the pecans. cook 5 more minutes. turn into a buttered pan and sprinkle with raisins.

Ingredients: 1 c. butter, melted, 1 c. sugar, 1 egg, 1/2 c. milk, 1 c. chopped pecans, 1 c. coconut, 1 c. graham cracker crumbs, 2 c. powdered sugar, 1/4 c. Crisco, 1/2 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Add milk until good spreading consistency. Spread on top of graham crackers and return to refrigerator. Cut into squares to serve.
GeneratedRecipe: mix butter, sugar, egg, milk and vanilla. add graham cracker crumbs, pecans and coconut. press into a 9 x 13-inch pan.

Ingredients: 1 (3 oz.) can sliced mushrooms, 1 3/4 oz. pkg. mushroom gravy mix, 1 1/2 c. Minute rice, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen Japanese style vegetables, thawed, 2 Tbsp. green onion, sliced, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1/4 c. toasted, slivered almonds
ReferenceRecipe: Drain mushrooms, reserving liquid. Add water to reserved mushroom liquid to make 1 3/4 cups. In a saucepan, blend water mixture into gravy mix. GeneratedRecipe: in small saucepan, bring 1 tablespoon margarine and gravy mix to a boil. add mushrooms and green onion; cook 1 minute. add rice and mushrooms; stir. cover and cook 5 minutes. remove from heat; let stand 5 minutes. stir in almonds and soy sauce; heat through. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 lb. Velveeta cheese spread, cubed (for spicier dip, use cheese spread with jalapeno pepper), 8 oz. jar picante sauce or salsa
ReferenceRecipe: Cube cheese and mix with sauce or salsa. Heat in microwave for 5 minutes or in saucepan on stove for 10 minutes until cheese has melted. Serve hot with tortilla chips or vegetable dippers.
GeneratedRecipe: melt velveeta cheese and salsa in microwave. stir until mixed well. add picante sauce; stir to blend together. serve warm with corn chips.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. dried lentils, 4 c. water, 2 onions, sliced, 8 whole cloves, 2 bay leaves, 2 whole garlic cloves, 2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. liquid red pepper sauce, 3/4 c. oil, 1/3 to 1/2 c. red wine vinegar, 1/2 c. chopped parsley, 2 c. chopped celery, 1/2 c. chopped onion, salad greens, tomato wedges
ReferenceRecipe: In large saucepan, combine lentils, water, onions, cloves, bay leaves, garlic cloves, 1 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon red pepper sauce. Mix well and cool. Stir in celery and onion. Cover and chill several hours. Turn into bowl lined with salad greens; garnish with tomato wedges.
GeneratedRecipe: combine lentils, water, celery, bay leaves and red wine in a dutch oven. cover and bring to a boil. reduce heat to medium-low. simmer 2 hours until lentils are tender; cover and let stand for 3 minutes. drain and place in large bowl. in a covered, combine remaining ingredients except greens; toss to combine. pour dressing over lentils and onions. cover and chill several hours or overnight at a day or overnight.

ReferenceRecipe: Prepare noodles, rice or toast points conventionally while microwaving beef. In 2-quart casserole, toss together meat, flour and soup mix. Stir in remaining ingredients. GeneratedRecipe: cut round steak into serving sized pieces. sprinkle with flour and onion flakes. brown in oil in 3-quart saucepan or saucepan. stir in soup mix and tomato sauce. combine with stewed tomatoes. bring to a boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. serve over toast.

Ingredients: 1 lb. can cut green beans, 1 lb. can cut wax beans, 1 lb. can red kidney beans, 1 medium red onion, sliced and separated into rings, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. freshly ground pepper, 1 c. granulated or brown sugar, packed, 1/2 c. wine vinegar, 1/2 c. olive oil
ReferenceRecipe: Drain beans well. Rinse kidney beans and drain again on paper towels. Combine beans, onion rings, salt, pepper and sugar in a deep bowl. Warm vinegar but do not boil. GeneratedRecipe: combine beans, onion rings ( sliced ), onion and green pepper. combine vinegar, brown sugar, olive oil, salt and pepper. pour over bean mixture. cover and chill 8 hours ( overnight ). toss gently. drain before serving.

Ingredients: 1 box Twinkies, 1 can sweetened condensed milk, 1 large instant vanilla pudding mix, 1 (8 oz.) carton Cool Whip, 2 pkg. frozen strawberries, thawed

GeneratedRecipe: tear twinkies into bite-sized pieces and place in a 9 x 13-inch pan. pour sweetened condensed milk over twinkies and let set. mix pudding mix according to package directions; add condensed milk. fold in cool whip. place a small amount of filling on top of twinkies.

Ingredients: 1 c. macaroni, 2 eggs, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 stick margarine, 1 1/2 c. sharp Cheddar cheese, cut in bite size pieces
ReferenceRecipe: Cook the macaroni; drain. Add eggs and stir to mix. Add cheese; stir to mix. Add milk and margarine; stir to mix.
GeneratedRecipe: boil macaroni according to package directions. melt margarine and add milk, eggs and grated cheese. put in buttered casserole dish and bake in slow oven until bubbly.

Ingredients: 4 c. cranberry juice, 2 c. apple juice, 6 oz. frozen lemonade, 1 c. water, 3 c. ginger ale, lemon and lime slices
ReferenceRecipe: In large container, combine cranberry, apple juice and lemonade concentrate. Add water. Chill until serving. Before serving, stir in ginger ale. Garnish with fruit.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. olive oil, 6 cloves garlic, chopped, 1/2 c. onions, chopped, 1/2 c. green pepper, chopped, 1/2 lb. fresh mushrooms, chopped, 2 (6 1/2 oz.) cans minced clams (reserve 1/2 c. juice), 1/2 c. white wine, 1 tsp. basil, 1 tsp. thyme, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 8 oz. cooked linguine, fresh parsley
ReferenceRecipe: In olive oil saute until translucent the garlic, onions and pepper. Add mushrooms; cook 3 minutes. Drain and reserve juice from clams; add clam juice and wine to mixture in pan. GeneratedRecipe: scald milk. add yeast, sugar, salt and shortening. cool to lukewarm. add flour and mix well. let rise until double in bulk.

Ingredients: 3 lb. ground pears, 5 lb. sugar, 1 large can and 1 small can crushed pineapple
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together. Bring to boil slowly on medium or medium-low heat. Boil for about 1 hour, stirring occasionally to make sure it doesn't scorch. GeneratedRecipe: peel and core pears. chop pears, sugar and pineapple. cook until thick ( not hard ). add ground pears and cook until thick. seal in jars.

Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 c. long grain rice, 1/8 c. onion slices, 1 garlic clove, minced, 1/2 tsp. ground cumin, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/4 c. tomato sauce, 2 1/2 c. water, 1/4 c. diced carrots, peas or green peppers (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook rice, oil, onion and garlic over medium heat in large skillet until rice is browned. Add remaining spices, tomato sauce, water and vegetables. GeneratedRecipe: heat oil in large skillet. add rice, onion, garlic and green peppers. cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes. add water, tomato sauce, cumin, salt and pepper. bring to a boil. reduce heat. cover and simmer 20 minutes or until rice is tender.

Ingredients: 3 to 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, vegetable oil, 1 c. uncooked rice, 1 pkg. onion soup mix, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can cream of chicken soup, 1 small can mushrooms plus enough water to make 1 3/4 c.*

GeneratedRecipe: * can use 1 can of chicken broth instead of water. i use 2 cans of chicken soup.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 large chopped onion, 1 (16 oz.) can tomato sauce, 1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste, 6 oz. water, 1 tsp. oregano
ReferenceRecipe: Brown hamburger with onion; drain. Add remaining ingredients to hamburger mixture. Stir well and simmer until spaghetti is done. Serve sauce over cooked spaghetti. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top. Serves 4 to 5.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef. drain well. add onion and cook until tender. add tomato sauce, water and tomato paste; simmer until hot. add oregano to taste.

Ingredients: 2 lbs. ground beef, 1 pkg. taco mix (mild or hot), 1 can kernel corn, 2 boxes cornbread mix, 1/3 cup water
ReferenceRecipe: Use a saucepan and brown ground beef; drain well. In same saucepan mix brown ground beef, taco mix, corn and 1/3 cup water. Mix together and simmer on medium heat. ReferenceRecipe: Drain fruit well. Cut fruit into small pieces. Mix lemon juice and milk. Add all other ingredients. Pour into pie shells. Decorate top of pie with additional pecan halves and refrigerate overnight. Makes 2 pies.
GeneratedRecipe: drain peaches and peaches. mix with eagle brand milk and lemon juice. fold in cool whip and nuts. add lemon juice. pour into graham cracker crusts. refrigerate.

Ingredients: 18 eggs, 1 c. plus 2 Tbsp. half and half, 3 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1 (10 1/2 oz.) can cream of mushroom soup, 2 cans or jars (3 oz. each) sliced mushrooms, drained, 5 oz. (about 1 1/4 c.) shredded sharp Cheddar cheese, 3 to 4 slices bacon, fried crisp and crumbled
ReferenceRecipe: Beat eggs and half and half together. Scramble over medium heat in butter in large skillet. Put scrambled eggs in 3-quart shallow casserole, which has been sprayed with nonstick coating (Pam).

Ingredients: 4 (3 oz.) bars bittersweet chocolate (Lindt-Excellence recommended), 1 2/3 c. sour cream, at room temperature
ReferenceRecipe: In a double boiler set over hot water or in a microwave on High power, stirring every 10 seconds, melt the chocolate. Remove from the heat and add the sour cream. Stir with a rubber spatula until uniform in color. If the pan feels warm, transfer to a bowl.
GeneratedRecipe: melt chocolate bars and sour cream in double boiler. cool. line a 9 x 13-inch pan with foil and pour chocolate mixture over lindt-excellence pieces until completely covered. refrigerate for 2 hours. cut into squares.

Ingredients: 1/3 c. red wine vinegar, 1/3 c. salad oil, 2 tsp. dried parsley flakes, 1 tsp. prepared mustard, 1 small onion in rings, 1 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. brown sugar, about 1 lb. mushrooms
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients except mushrooms and bring to a boil. Add about 1 pound mushrooms and simmer 5 to 6 minutes. Flavor improves if let set for a few hours. Is best when prepared with fresh mushrooms.
GeneratedRecipe: in small saucepan, combine oil, vinegar, brown sugar, mustard, parsley, salt and onion; bring to a simmer. pour over mushrooms. cover and refrigerate 2 to 3 weeks.

Ingredients: 7 Tbsp. oleo, 3 Tbsp. chopped parsley, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. dry mustard, 2 tsp. garlic, crushed, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1/2 c. dry white wine, 2 lb. large shrimp, shelled and deveined

GeneratedRecipe: melt oleo in large skillet over medium heat. add shrimp and cook, stirring constantly, until shrimp are pink, about 5 minutes. stir in wine, lemon juice, mustard, garlic salt and parsley. bring to a boil. reduce heat to low. cover and simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. serve over rice. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 6 medium sweet potatoes, 1/4 c. butter, 1/2 c. honey, 1/2 c. orange juice

GeneratedRecipe: peel and slice sweet potatoes. cook in boiling salted water until tender. drain and mash. add butter, honey and orange juice. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 large pkg. Oreo cookies, crushed, 1 stick margarine, melted, 3 1/2 c. milk, 2 large pkg. vanilla instant pudding mix, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened, 1 large carton Cool Whip
ReferenceRecipe: Mix cookies and melted margarine well (by hand) and press into a 13 x 9-inch pan to make a crust (save 3/4 cup crumbs to sprinkle on top). Blend remaining ingredients; spread on top of crust and sprinkle remaining 3/4 cup cookie crumbs on top. Keep refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: crush oreo cookies. blend with melted margarine. set aside. mix pudding mix and milk; let cool whip and cream cheese mixture sit. layer pudding mix, cookies, pudding mixture and cream in glass bowl. layer the pudding, ending with cookies on top. keep refrigerated. serves 12 to 12.

Ingredients: 10 oz. chopped spinach (frozen), 1 c. mayonnaise, 1 c. sour cream, 1 small onion, chopped, 8 oz. water chestnuts, drained and minced, 1 envelope Knorr vegetable soup mix, 1 loaf Hawaiian bread or sourdough
ReferenceRecipe: Thaw spinach. Press out all of the water. Add remaining ingredients to spinach and mix well. Refrigerate 2 hours before serving. Cut the top center portion out of the Hawaiian bread. GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients well, except 1 cup of bread. cut out bread from center. fill with dip mixture and arrange bread pieces around the middle. place dip in loaf and serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 1 can Eagle Brand milk, 1/2 c. lemon juice, 2 eggs, separated

GeneratedRecipe: beat egg whites until stiff. add eagle brand milk and lemon juice. fold in stiffly beaten egg whites. pour into graham cracker crust.

Ingredients: 6 c oatmeal, 1/2 c brown sugar, 3/4 c wheat germ, 1/2 c white shredded coconut, 1/2 c sesame seeds, 1 c nutmeats, 1/2 c vegetable oil, 1/2 c honey
ReferenceRecipe: Place oatmeal in mixing bowl. Add brown sugar. Add remaining ingredients and mix. Bake at 350 for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring often, crumble. Cover and keep in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: mix all ingredients together ( except wheat germ and nutmeats ) and pour into bundt pan and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. cool and then break into pieces.

Ingredients: 2 2/3 c. sifted flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1 c. Crisco shortening, 6 Tbsp. water (ice cold)
ReferenceRecipe: Sift flour before measuring. Put ice cubes in cup of water before measuring. Spoon flour into measuring cup lightly. Level without shaking or packing down.
GeneratedRecipe: sift flour and salt together. cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse meal. add ice water and mix well. roll out on floured board. makes 2 crusts.

Ingredients: 1 head cabbage, outer leaves removed, 2 carrots, 1 c. mayonnaise, scant 1/2 c. sugar, 1/4 c. vinegar
ReferenceRecipe: Grate cabbage and carrots. Mix vinegar and sugar and then combine with mayonnaise. Toss dressing with cabbage and carrots. Chill.
GeneratedRecipe: cut up cabbage and carrots to a bowl. mix sugar, vinegar and mayonnaise together and pour over vegetables. stir and serve.

Ingredients: 1 box Rice Chex, 1 stick margarine, 1 c. peanut butter, 1 pkg. Reese's peanut butter chips
ReferenceRecipe: Melt margarine, peanut butter and peanut butter chips over low heat. Pour over Rice Chex. Stir, then empty into a bag containing powdered sugar and shake until coated.
GeneratedRecipe: melt margarine, peanut butter and chips together. pour over rice chex. stir until coated. put in a large bowl. pour reese 's cups of rice chex mixture over the rice chex and mix well.

Ingredients: 1 c. converted rice, cooked as per directions, 1 bay leaf, 1 slice lemon, 1/4 c. Italian dressing, salt and pepper, 1/2 c. chopped purple onion, 1/2 c. chopped green pepper, 1/4 c. chopped parsley, 1 small jar chopped pimento, 2 c. washed and torn spinach, 1/4 c. Italian salad dressing, bacon bits (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Cook rice with bay leaf and lemon. When done, fluff rice and add Italian dressing, salt and pepper. Refrigerate.
GeneratedRecipe: combine spinach, rice, green pepper, onion, salt and bay leaf in bowl. toss with dressing. cover and refrigerate overnight to marinate. toss dressing with bacon bits before serving. serves 12 to 15.

Ingredients: 1 cup boiling broth, 1/2 cup Crisco (melted), 1 tsp salt, 2 eggs beaten well
ReferenceRecipe: In large bowl mix boiling broth and Crisco and salt.
GeneratedRecipe: pour boiling broth over crisco and salt. stir until dissolved. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.

Ingredients: 1 lb. caramels, 2 Tbsp. frozen orange juice, 10 marshmallows, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 (5 oz.) pkg. popcorn, popped
ReferenceRecipe: In a saucepan over hot water, melt caramels mixed with marshmallows and orange juice; cool, then add vanilla. Pour over popcorn and mix. Spoon onto aluminum foil and shape into 3-inch circles 1/2-inch thick. Nuts on top may be added.
GeneratedRecipe: melt caramels and orange juice in double boiler or microwave for 5 to 10 minutes. stir in vanilla. pour over popcorn and press mixture into a buttered tube pan.

Ingredients: 1 bag Spy's apples, washed and cored, cinnamon, 1/2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Steam apples in a steamer pan until soft and mushy. Then run apples through a sieve and add sugar and cinnamon to taste. Reserve liquid and run through a cheesecloth and there you have apple juice.
GeneratedRecipe: peel, core and slice apples. add sugar and cinnamon to taste. cook until thick. put in jars and seal.

Ingredients: 1 pkg. white cake mix, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. strawberry Jell-O, 3/4 c. oil, 1 c. chopped pecans, 4 eggs, 2 Tbsp. flour, 10 oz. frozen strawberries, 1/2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Grease Bundt pan. Combine ingredients. Beat with mixer 3 minutes. Bake 55 to 60 minutes. Ice when cool or serve with Cool Whip. It is moist and good.

Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) box graham crackers, 2 (3 oz.) boxes instant French vanilla pudding, 3 1/2 c. milk, 9 oz. container Cool Whip, 1 (15 oz.) ready to spread milk chocolate icing
ReferenceRecipe: Line bottom of 9 x 13 pan with graham crackers. Mix pudding with milk. Beat 2 to 3 minutes on medium speed. Fold in Cool Whip. Pour 1/2 the mixture over the graham crackers. Layer the crackers and pudding, ending with graham crackers. Remove seal from icing and heat in microwave until soft. Pour over crackers and refrigerate overnight. The longer it sits, the better.
GeneratedRecipe: butter a 9 x 13-inch pan. line bottom with graham crackers. mix pudding, milk and cool whip. pour 1/2 of mixture over graham crackers. add another layer of graham crackers. melt icing in double boiler. spread over crackers. add remaining mix and spread over crackers. refrigerate 24 hours before serving.

Ingredients: 1 lb. crab meat, 1/2 c. chopped stuffed olives, 1 tsp. chopped onions, 1 tsp. mustard, 1/4 c. chopped celery, 1/2 c. mayonnaise, salt and pepper to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Mix and serve on crisp lettuce. Serves 6 to 8.
GeneratedRecipe: mix together, except crab meat. stir in salt and pepper. serve on crackers or melba toast points.

Ingredients: 2 c. rounded old bread, cut up into bite size pieces, 1/2 tsp. salt, 4 eggs, beaten, 2 c. evaporated milk, 1/2 c. sugar, 4 Tbsp. melted butter, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1/4 tsp. cinnamon, sprinkle of nutmeg, raisins or coconut (if desired)
ReferenceRecipe: Put cut up bread in 8-inch square greased pan. Mix eggs, salt, milk, sugar, butter and vanilla. Pour over bread pieces. Sprinkle with spices. Add raisins or coconut before liquids. Serve warm.
GeneratedRecipe: place bread into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan. sprinkle with cinnamon and salt. mix eggs, milk, sugar and vanilla. pour over bread. sprinkle coconut on top.

Ingredients: 1 1/4 c. strained honey, 3/4 c. shortening, 2 c. sugar, 1/4 c. fruit juice, grated rind of 1 orange, granted rind of 1 lemon, 2 c. unblanched almonds, chopped, 10 c. cake flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 2 tsp. nutmeg, 1 tsp. cloves, 4 tsp. baking powder
ReferenceRecipe: Melt honey and shortening together over hot water. Add sugar and fruit juice and stir until dissolved. Add grated rinds of orange and lemon, chopped almonds and the dry ingredients (which have been sifted together). Chill in refrigerator.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg and cloves. cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. add honey, orange rind and lemon juice. mix well.

Ingredients: 1 (8 qt.) pkg. powdered milk, 1 (6 oz.) Coffee-mate (3/4 c.), 1 (1 lb.) box Nestle Quik, 1 c. powdered sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients together. Store in a tightly closed container. Mix 4 tablespoons of mix in one cup hot water.
GeneratedRecipe: mix well. place 2 teaspoons of mix and 1/4 cup mix in mug. finish filling with hot water and stir well.

Ingredients: 8 c. romaine lettuce, torn up, 3/4 lb. chicken, cooked and shredded, 1/2 c. green onions in 1/8-inch slices, 1/2 c. celery, 2 tsp. toasted sesame seed, 2 Tbsp. toasted slivered almonds, 1/2 c. Sesame-Oil Dressing
ReferenceRecipe: Combine lettuce, chicken, green onions, celery, sesame seed and almonds in a salad bowl. Toss with dressing until coated. Place on chilled salad plates and top with additional slivered almonds.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large salad bowl, combine chicken, lettuce, sesame-oil onions, celery and almonds. toss lightly. add dressing and sesame seed; toss to coat. serve on lettuce leaves. makes 6 servings.

Ingredients: 12 saltine or graham crackers, 1 jar peanut butter, 1 pack mini marshmallows

GeneratedRecipe: spread peanut butter on graham crackers. put marshmallows on top of crackers. melt marshmallows in microwave for 1 minute. pour over crackers. let cool and eat.

Ingredients: 16 oz. cheese filled tortellini, 3 c. broccoli flowerets, 1 lb. smoked sausage, 1/4 c. margarine, 3 Tbsp. cornstarch, 3 c. milk, 2 c. shredded processed Swiss cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Boil tortellini 15 minutes. Cut sausage into bite-size pieces. Add broccoli and sausage to tortellini. Bring to boil again, reduce heat and simmer 10 minutes; drain. Melt margarine in microwave; add cornstarch, then milk. Cook until thickened. Fold in cheese, stirring until smooth. In a large casserole, combine tortellini and sauce; toss until well coated. GeneratedRecipe: cook tortellini according to package directions. drain and set aside. cut broccoli into bite size pieces. melt margarine in medium saucepan. add sausage, broccoli and broccoli; cook until tender. stir in milk and cornstarch. cook and stir until thickened. pour over tortellini. sprinkle with cheese.

Ingredients: 8 small bananas, 8 oz. dark chocolate, 3 Tbsp. vegetable shortening, 1 c. each coarsely chopped walnuts and Macadamia nuts, roasted

GeneratedRecipe: cut bananas in half lengthwise and remove core. slice remaining banana into 1/4-inch slices. in large microwave-safe bowl, combine melted chocolate and shortening. microwave on high for 45 seconds. stir until chocolate is softened. spread evenly on bananas. arrange bananas and walnuts in single layer on top. cover and refrigerate until firm, at least 3 hours.

ReferenceRecipe: Combine sugar, flour and salt in pan. (Use wooden spoon.) Blend in milk gradually, then egg yolks. Add butter. Cook until thick. Remove from heat. Ingredients: 1 c. quick-cooking oats, 1 c. flour, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. salt, 2 eggs, lightly beaten, 1 1/2 c. milk, 1/4 c. oil, 1 tsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Combine first five ingredients. Make a well in the center. Combine last four ingredients; pour into the well and stir until moistened.
GeneratedRecipe: sift together flour, sugar, baking powder and salt. combine eggs, milk, oil and lemon juice. add to dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.

Ingredients: 1 head of Cauliflower, 1 head of Lettuce, 1/2 pkg. Real Bacon Bits, 1 1/2 c. Mayonnaise, 1 Red Onion, 1 pkg. Shredded Cheese, Sweet & Low to taste
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Salad is low carb and addicting!
GeneratedRecipe: layer lettuce, cauliflower, onion and bacon bits. mix mayonnaise and low. spread on top of salad. sprinkle cheese on top. cover and refrigerate overnight.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. margarine, 2 c. all-purpose flour, 1 c. white sugar, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 (29 oz.) can sliced peaches, juice reserved

GeneratedRecipe: mix together flour, baking powder, sugar and white juice; set aside. in a small mixing bowl, mix the margarine with a fork until blended. stir in peaches.

Ingredients: 1 (7 1/2 oz.) tube refrigerated buttermilk biscuits (10 biscuits), 1 egg, beaten, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1/4 tsp. ground cinnamon, 9 miniature semisweet chocolate chips

Ingredients: 1 lb. cheese, grated, 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can chili (no beans), 1 can Ro-Tel tomatoes, 1 lb. ground beef, 1 large onion, chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Cook ground beef. Mix cream of mushroom soup, chili, Ro-Tel tomatoes, onion and cheese together in crock-pot. Add ground beef. Let cook until hot. Serve with Tostitos chips.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. quick oats, 1/2 c. packed brown sugar, 1/4 c. all-purpose flour, 1/2 tsp. cinnamon, dash of salt, 1/4 c. butter or margarine, 2 lb. apples (6 medium), 2 Tbsp. granulated sugar, vanilla ice cream
ReferenceRecipe: Combine oats, brown sugar, flour, cinnamon and salt. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs; set aside. Peel, core and slice apples to make 5 to 6 cups.
GeneratedRecipe: place apples in bottom of greased 9-inch spring-form pan; sprinkle with sugar, 1/2 cup flour, cinnamon, oats and salt. mix until crumbly. cut in butter using pastry blender or knife. sprinkle over apples. cover pie plate. microwave on high 2 minutes or until apples are tender, turning once. blend 1/2 cup sugar, margarine and flour. add vanilla. sprinkle remaining oats over apples. microwave on medium 4 to 6 minutes. rotate dish 1/4 turn; microwave on high 3 to 4 minutes or until apples are tender.

Ingredients: cucumbers, vinegar, salt, thinly sliced whole wheat bread, butter (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Note: It's necessary to "sweat" the cucumbers first to avoid soggy sandwiches.
GeneratedRecipe: wash cucumbers and pack in jars. add butter, vinegar and salt to taste. fill jars with vinegar. seal and process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 4 c. ripe tomatoes, peeled and chopped, 4 c. sugar, 1 large or 2 small pkg. raspberry jello, 1 Tbsp. black raspberry jello
ReferenceRecipe: Combine tomatoes and sugar and boil gently, approximately 15 minutes, stirring often. Add jello and cook 10 minutes longer. Continue to stir. Pour into hot, sterilized jars. Process in boiling water or use paraffin wax on top.
GeneratedRecipe: peel tomatoes and put in large kettle. add sugar, jello, black tomatoes and black tomatoes. bring to a boil. boil for 10 minutes. pour into hot jello containers and freeze. serve with hot or cold.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. vanilla wafer crumbs, 1/2 c. margarine, melted, 1 3/4 c. milk, 1 pkg. (8 oz.) cream cheese, 1 pkg. (3 3/4 oz.) instant vanilla pudding, 1 tsp. grated lemon rind, 1 qt. fresh strawberries, sliced, 1 (8 oz.) Cool Whip topping
ReferenceRecipe: Combine wafer crumbs and margarine; reserve 1/2 cup of this mixture for topping. Press remaining crumb mixture onto the bottom of a greased 9 x 13-inch pan. GeneratedRecipe: mix crumbs and melted margarine, press firmly into bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan. chill. beat cream cheese and cool whip until smooth and creamy. gradually add milk, beating until thickened. fold in cool whip. spread over crust over cream cheese layer. mix milk and pudding until thickens. pour lemon rind mixture over top of strawberries and chill.

GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine cabbage, carrot, celery and carrot. in a small saucepan, combine oil, vinegar, sugar and salt. bring to a boil. pour over cabbage mixture. toss to coat well. cover and chill.

Ingredients: 1 lb. sausage or hamburger or 2 to 3 slices bacon, 2 c. onion, chopped, 1 medium head cabbage, sliced, 1 c. chicken broth, 1 clove garlic, chopped, salt and pepper to taste, 2 medium potatoes, sliced
ReferenceRecipe: Fry meat in a large pan. Add onion, garlic, potatoes and cabbage. Simmer until mixture turns light brown, stirring frequently. Pour in chicken broth. Add salt and pepper. Cover. Simmer until brown.

Ingredients: 2 c. heavy cream, whipped, 1 (10 1/2 oz.) pkg. miniature marshmallows, 1 1/2 c. crushed drained pineapple, 1 c. (3 1/2 oz.) coconut, 1 banana, diced, 1 can mandarin oranges, drained, 1 red apple, diced, 2 Tbsp. crystallized ginger
ReferenceRecipe: Whip the heavy cream.	Fold in all ingredients. Chill overnight.	Serves 8.

Ingredients: 2 whole oranges, 1 whole apple, 1 c. pecans, chopped, 1 pkg. cranberries, 1 1/2 c. sugar
ReferenceRecipe: Trim ends only off oranges and cut into quarters. Core apple and cut apple into quarters. Wash cranberries. Put all ingredients except pecans and sugar into blender or processor until mixed well and chopped fine. Stir in sugar and pecans. Let set overnight before serving.

ReferenceRecipe: Combine salmon, oats, onion, egg, lemon juice and Worcestershire sauce in bowl; mix well. Shape into 4 patties. Brown on both sides in oil in skillet; drain. Serve on sandwich buns with lettuce and tomato.

Ingredients: Cool Whip (8 oz.), Eagle Brand milk, 1/4 c. lemon juice, 1/2 c. coconut, 15 oz. can pineapple (crushed), drained, 1/2 c. nuts, chopped

Ingredients: 1 chopped onion, 1 c. chopped celery, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 c. catsup, 1/2 can tomato soup, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 3 Tbsp. brown sugar, 2 Tbsp. vinegar, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/4 to 1/2 c. water

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/8 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. nutmeg (optional), 1 c. boiling water, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1 1/2 Tbsp. lemon juice, grated rind of 1 lemon

Ingredients: 1 pkg. Hash Browns, 1 can Cream of Chicken Soup, 1 16 oz. Sour Cream, 1/4 c. Onion-chopped, 1/2 stick Butter, Salt and Pepper, 1 pkg. (2 cups) shredded Mild Cheddar Cheese, 3/4 c. Milk
ReferenceRecipe: Combine potatoes, onion, 1 cup cheddar cheese, sour cream, soup and salt and pepper in a large pot on the stove. In a casserole dish melt butter and place mixture in dish. Add remaining cheese and milk. Bake @ 350 degrees for 1 hr.

Ingredients: 9-inch tube angel cake, 1/2 c. sugar, 1/3 c. lime juice, 1 c. whipping cream, whipped, 5 oz. pkg. lime flavored jello, 1 1/3 c. boiling water, few drops green food coloring, 3 1/2 oz. can flaked coconut (1 1/3 c.)

Ingredients: 4 qt. or more sliced cucumbers, 1/3 c. salt, 5 c. sugar, 1 1/2 tsp. turmeric, 1 1/2 tsp. celery seed, 2 Tbsp. mustard seed, 3 c. vinegar

GeneratedRecipe: melt butter in a heavy saucepan; stir in flour, salt and milk. cook until mixture thickens. add beaten egg yolks and stir until hot. remove from heat. add sherry and cook 1 minute. combine egg yolks, cream and sherry. heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. add salt, shrimp and heat thoroughly, until shrimp are heated and sauce is ready. serve over toast in a chafing dish or in patty shells. pour egg mixture over toast.

Ingredients: 1 head lettuce, broken into bite-size pieces, 3 tart apples (unpeeled), cored and sliced into wedges, 1 small red onion, sliced into rings, 2 oz. Blue cheese (more if desired), 1/2 c. Good Seasons Italian dressing, prepared

GeneratedRecipe: mix flour and garlic powder in lawry 's oil. dip wings in flour mixture and then in seasoned salt mixture. fry until lightly brown. drain well. sprinkle in skillet. remove from skillet. pour off fat. add butter to skillet and lawry 's oil in skillet. stir and fry until golden brown. serve.

Ingredients: 1/2 stick butter, 4 Tbsp. flour, 1 heaping tsp. paprika, 1/2 tsp. ground mustard, 1 tsp. chili powder, 1 Tbsp. catsup, 1 tsp. pepper sauce, 1 tsp. ground cumin, 2 c. milk, 1 tsp. chopped peppers, 8 oz. grated processed cheese, 1 clove garlic, chopped

Ingredients: Ritz crackers, 4 Tbsp. sugar, 1/2 c. walnuts (optional), 1 stick melted margarine, 8 oz. cream cheese, softened, 1 c. 10x sugar, Cool Whip, 2 pkg. instant butterscotch pudding, 3 c. milk, Bits 'O Brickle (Weis)
ReferenceRecipe: Crust: Mix and grind 50 Ritz crackers, 4 tablespoons sugar, walnuts and melted margarine. Pat into a 9 x 13-inch pan and refrigerate.

Ingredients: 1/3 c. oil and vinegar dressing (I use Italian), 1 to 2 stalks fresh broccoli, cut in pieces, 1 medium tomato, diced or cherry tomatoes, 1/4 c. diced Cheddar cheese, 2 Tbsp. minced onion, 2 to 3 Tbsp. chopped nuts, toasted
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients except nuts. Cover and refrigerate 2 hours. Before serving, toss in nuts.
GeneratedRecipe: mix oil, vinegar and italian dressing. pour over broccoli, onion, tomatoes and cheese. toss.

GeneratedRecipe: dissolve jell-o in boiling water. add cold water. pour into 9 x 13-inch pan. chill until firm. cut into squares.

GeneratedRecipe: cook potatoes in boiling water until tender. drain and set aside. fry bacon until crisp. remove bacon from pan. add onion to bacon drippings. cook until onion is tender. add vinegar and water. heat to boiling, stirring constantly. pour over potatoes. sprinkle with egg. serve warm.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. cinnamon, 3 cans biscuits, cut up in quarters, 1 stick margarine, 3/4 c. sugar, 2 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Mix 1/2 cup sugar and cinnamon together in bowl. Cut biscuits up in quarters with scissors and lay on wax paper. Drop 3 to 4 biscuits at a time in bowl and shake well.
GeneratedRecipe: cut biscuits into quarters. mix cinnamon and sugar. melt 1/2 stick of margarine and add to biscuits. drop in sugar and vanilla. put biscuits on top and cook about 15 minutes.

Ingredients: 1/2 c. butter or margarine, 2 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 c. pecans, finely ground, 1 c. cake flour, sifted
ReferenceRecipe: Blend butter and sugar until creamy. Mix in vanilla, pecans, and flour. Roll into size of walnuts.
GeneratedRecipe: cream the margarine and sugar. beat until creamy. add the vanilla and beat well the flour and blend thoroughly. add chopped pecans and mix well to coat.

Ingredients: 4 schnitzels*, 1 or 2 eggs, beaten, 2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper, 6 tsp. oil or butter, 1 c. regular bread crumbs, 1 c. flour, lemon juice (if desired)

GeneratedRecipe: * if using self-rising flour, omit salt, pepper and lemon juice. if too thick, add more bread crumbs.

GeneratedRecipe: bring vinegar, sugar and garlic to a boil. add dill and dill. pour over pickles. let stand in refrigerator for 24 hours.

Ingredients: 1 can Eagle condensed milk, 1 Tbsp. chocolate syrup, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1 tsp. coconut extract, 4 eggs, 1 tsp. instant coffee, 1/2 pt. light cream, 9 oz. whiskey (more or less)
ReferenceRecipe: Mix well in blender. Must be refrigerated.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs in bowl. add condensed milk and instant coffee and mix. add coconut, coconut, whiskey, instant coffee, vanilla, coconut, instant coffee and chocolate syrup and egg yolks alternately; blend well. chill in refrigerator 4 hours. serve as a dressing and refrigerate leftover mixture for ice cream. makes 1 1/2 cups.

Ingredients: 4 cube steaks (about 1/2 in. thick), 2 Tbsp. cooking oil, flour, salt and pepper to taste, 1/2 to 1 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: Heat oil in pan. Flour steaks and brown. Add about 1/2 c. or more of water. Cover and simmer 40-45 minutes until tender, turning once in a while. Make gravy from leftover drippings, (removing excess fat). Add water as needed while cooking.
GeneratedRecipe: coat steaks with flour, salt and pepper. brown in oil in skillet. add water and cube. cover; simmer 1 hour. remove steaks to plate.

Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. butter, 2 Tbsp. flour, 1 c. beef stock, salt, peppercorns, 1/2 tsp. chopped chives, 1/2 tsp. mustard, 1 Tbsp. horseradish, 1/4 c. cream, 1 tsp. lemon juice
ReferenceRecipe: Melt butter, add flour, blend and gradually add the beef stock. Stir in seasoning, chives, mustard and horseradish. Cook for 2 minutes. Strain. Add cream and lemon juice and bring to a boil.

Ingredients: 1 1/4 lb. round steak, 1 green pepper, 1 onion, 1/2 c. flour, 1 c. tomatoes, 1/2 c. tomato juice, 1 pkg. brown gravy mix, 1/4 c. oil
ReferenceRecipe: Cut steak into bite size pieces and flour. Brown in oil with onion. Pour off oil and add tomatoes, juice and gravy mix. Cover and simmer until tender. Serve with mashed potatoes or rice.
GeneratedRecipe: cut steak into serving size pieces. dredge in flour and brown in oil. add onion and green pepper. cook until tender. add tomato juice, tomatoes and gravy mix. simmer for 1 hour. serve over rice.

ReferenceRecipe: Dissolve yeast and honey in water for 5 minutes. Add flour and salt. Knead until smooth, adding flour, if needed. Cut into 24 balls. Knead each ball smooth and round. Cover and rise 1 hour.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve yeast and salt in warm water; add honey. stir in 2 minutes. stir in 3 cups flour. add wheat flour to make soft and elastic dough. cover and let rise until double ( 1 hour ).

Ingredients: 1 1/8 c. water, 1 1/2 c. whole wheat flour, 1 1/2 c. bread flour, 3/4 c. rye flour, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 Tbsp. molasses, 1/3 c. minced onion, 1 tsp. caraway seed, 2 tsp. active dry yeast
ReferenceRecipe: Select light crust setting.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large bowl, combine yeast, water, onion, caraway seed, salt and caraway seed. let stand 5 minutes. stir in flour, oil, molasses and onion. beat at medium speed for 2 minutes or until smooth. gradually stir in enough flour to make a soft dough. turn out onto a lightly floured surface. knead until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. place in a greased bowl. cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 1 1/2 hours.

Ingredients: 2 c. evaporated milk, 3/4 c. sugar, 2 Tbsp. cocoa, 1 c. water, 2 heaping Tbsp. flour, 1/2 Tbsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1 tsp. vanilla
ReferenceRecipe: Heat milk in saucepan. In small bowl, mix sugar, cocoa, flour and salt. Stir in enough milk to make a smooth paste. Pour into warm milk. GeneratedRecipe: mix together cocoa, sugar, flour and salt. add milk and water. cook over low heat until thick. add butter or margarine and vanilla.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. fresh basil leaves, 2 to 5 cloves garlic to taste, 1/4 c. pine nuts, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese, freshly grated, 1/4 c. lemon juice (fresh)

GeneratedRecipe: put all ingredients in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth. pour mixture over fresh parsley in glass. serve with a fresh or cold salad. serves one serving contains approximately 2 % calories.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. fresh basil leaves, 2 to 5 cloves garlic, peeled, 1/4 c. pine nuts, 1/4 c. freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 1/4 c. freshly squeezed lemon juice (if you want to cut calories) or 1/4 c. olive oil
ReferenceRecipe: Put basil, garlic, pine nuts and Parmesan cheese in food processor or blender. Turn machine on and drizzle in lemon juice or olive oil. Continue to puree until a smooth paste is formed. This sauce is delicious to spoon on top of broiled salmon steaks.
GeneratedRecipe: blend ingredients in blender and mix thoroughly. refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving. serve as a dip with raw vegetables.

Ingredients: 2 lb. lean pork roast, cut in 1-inch cubes, 1 (14 oz.) can pineapple chunks with juice, 1/4 c. vinegar, 1 tsp. ginger
ReferenceRecipe: Combine meat, pineapple with juice, vinegar and ginger. Simmer one hour, covered. Serve over rice. Serves 6.
GeneratedRecipe: place roast in slow cooker. add juices, vinegar and ginger to ginger. cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) cream cheese, 3 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1 small onion, grated, garlic salt, 2 large jars Kosher dill pickles, 2 loaves Roman Meal bread, crust cut off
ReferenceRecipe: Cream mayonnaise, cheese, onion and garlic salt. Spread on bread. Wrap around pickle (cut off ends of pickles). Refrigerate overnight. Slice. Electric knife works great!
GeneratedRecipe: mix cream cheese, mayonnaise, onion, garlic salt and dill pickle meal. spread on bread and roll up. slice and serve.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 can Ro-Tel (diced tomatoes and green chilies), 2 lb. Velveeta cheese
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground beef; drain. Add can of Ro-Tel and cubed Velveeta cheese. Heat and stir until cheese melts. Spread plain tortilla corn chips out on cookie sheet and drizzle with hot mixture when serving several people.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and drain. add ro-tel tomatoes and chilies. heat until cheese is melted. serve with tortilla chips.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 egg, beaten, 1/2 c. cracker crumbs, 2 Tbsp. catsup, 2 Tbsp. water, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 onion, salt and pepper to flavor, 1 can cream of mushroom soup
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together ingredients. Form into large patties and roll lightly in flour. Brown both sides in hot oil. Pour soup and one can of water over meat patties. Simmer covered for 45 minutes. Makes 5 to 6 steaks.
GeneratedRecipe: mix ground beef, cracker crumbs, egg, onion, salt and pepper. shape into small balls. brown in skillet. pour off fat. add soup, water and worcestershire sauce. cover and simmer for 30 minutes. serve over rice or noodles.

Ingredients: 1 c. water, 1/2 cup butter or margarine, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1 cup all - purpose flour, 4 eggs
ReferenceRecipe: In a large saucepan, bring water, butter and salt to a boil. Add flour all at once and stir until a smooth ball forms. Remove from the heat; let stand 5 minutes. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat until mixture is smooth and shiny. Drop by 1/4 cupfuls 2 in. apart onto a greased baking sheet. Bake at 400 degrees for 35 minutes or until golden brown. Transfer to a wire rack. Immediately split puffs open; remove and discard tops and soft dough from inside. Set aside. Prepare filling.
GeneratedRecipe: combine butter, water and salt in a saucepan. bring to a boil. remove from heat. stir in flour and salt. beat in eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.

Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) Philadelphia Brand cream cheese, 2 Tbsp. Carnation evaporated milk, 2 Tbsp. Catalina dressing, 1/3 c. catsup, 1 Tbsp. grated onion or onion juice, 1/4 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Blend the cream cheese and carnation until smooth. Add all other ingredients and mix well. Serve with chips or Bugles.
GeneratedRecipe: beat cream cheese, catsup, milk, onion and salt together until smooth. stir in catalina dressing and chill.

Ingredients: 1 c. sugar, 1 c. Karo light, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 1/2 c. peanut butter, 6 c. Special K cereal, 1 (6 oz.) pkg. chocolate chips
ReferenceRecipe: In a large saucepan, melt sugar, Karo and butter. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Add peanut butter and mix well. Add Special K and mix well. Melt chocolate chips and put on top.
GeneratedRecipe: bring sugar and karo to a boil. remove from heat. add peanut butter and special k cereal. mix well. press into a 9 x 13-inch pan. melt chocolate chips and peanut butter. spread over top.

Ingredients: 5 c. chopped rhubarb, 3 c. sugar, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. gelatin, 1 pkg. strawberry Kool-Aid
ReferenceRecipe: Mix rhubarb and sugar; let set overnight. Next day, bring to boil and cook until soft. Add gelatin and Kool-Aid, stirring until dissolved. May be canned or sealed with lid or paraffin.
GeneratedRecipe: boil rhubarb and sugar for 10 minutes. add gelatin; stir. add 1 cup boiling water. pour into jars and seal immediately.

Ingredients: 2 c. cooked saffron, chilled (yellow rice), 2 c. plain rice, cooked and chilled, 1 1/2 c. celery, sliced diagonally, 1 green pepper, sliced diagonally, 3 c. firm cooked chicken, cut into 1-inch chunks
ReferenceRecipe: Combine the first 5 ingredients with the dressing. Chill for several hours.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, combine rice, celery, green pepper and saffron. cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes. stir in chicken and saffron; heat through. makes 4 servings.

Ingredients: 1 can tomato soup, diluted, 2 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 1 envelope Knox gelatine, dissolved in 1/4 c. cold water, 1 c. mayonnaise, 3/4 c. finely chopped celery, 1/2 c. finely chopped green onions, 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 (4 1/2 oz.) cans shrimp, drained and chopped
ReferenceRecipe: Heat soup to boiling. Dissolve cream cheese in soup (mix well with mixer). Add gelatine. Cool. Add all other ingredients. Put in oiled ring mold. Serve with white club crackers.
GeneratedRecipe: dissolve gelatine in cold water; cool. cream the cream cheese and mayonnaise; add soup, gelatine and salt. fold in shrimp and celery. pour into mold and chill overnight. unmold and serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 1 lb. smoked sausage, cut into bite-size pieces, 5 or 6 medium potatoes, cubed, 1 medium onion, chopped, parsley flakes, black pepper
ReferenceRecipe: Mix together all ingredients in baking dish. Cover bottom with 1-inch of water. Cover and bake until potatoes are done.
GeneratedRecipe: in a large skillet, brown sausage and drain. add potatoes, onion, parsley flakes and pepper. cover and simmer until potatoes are tender.

Ingredients: 1 angel food cake mix, 1 pkg. strawberry pie glaze, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. Cool Whip, 1 (16 oz.) pkg. frozen/fresh strawberries, thawed
ReferenceRecipe: Bake angel food cake as directed; cool. Slice in half to make 2 layers. Drain frozen strawberries. Mix strawberries with glaze. Spread half of mixture between layers. Put top layer of cake back on. Spread other half of mixture on top. Ice whole cake with Cool Whip. Refrigerate and serve.
GeneratedRecipe: cut cake in half. cut in half; place in bottom of 13 x 9-inch pan. mix glaze and strawberries in bowl. spread 1/2 cool whip on top of strawberry pie filling. spread remaining pudding mixture on top of cake slices. top with sliced strawberries.

Ingredients: 3 c. cooked mashed sweet potatoes, 1 c. sugar, 2 eggs, 1/2 c. milk, 1 tsp. vanilla, 1/4 tsp. cinnamon, 1/2 c. butter
ReferenceRecipe: Whip all the ingredients until very fluffy. Pour into 9 x 13-inch dish.
GeneratedRecipe: combine all ingredients. pour into baking dish and sprinkle with 1/2 cup topping. bake at 350 degrees for 45 to 60 minutes.

Ingredients: 3 stalks celery, diced, 12 peppers, diced, 1 qt. lima beans (Great Northern), 6 carrots, sliced, 2 heads cauliflower, 1 qt. string beans, small onions, tiny sweet pickles, 4 to 5 c. sugar, 3/4 c. vinegar, 1 pt. water, 1/3 c. salt, 2 tsp. turmeric
ReferenceRecipe: Make a juice of sugar, vinegar, water. salt and turmeric. Pour over vegetables. Add sweet pickles and mix well. Pour into jars. Heat in canner for 10 to 15 minutes to seal. You can double the juice recipe if you would like.
GeneratedRecipe: soak overnight the string beans and cauliflower. drain well. add other ingredients. cook until it comes to a boil. seal immediately.

Ingredients: 1 1/2 c. sugar, 1/2 c. shortening, 2 eggs, 2 c. sifted flour, 4 Tbsp. buttermilk, 1 tsp. baking soda, 1 tsp. soda, 3 mashed bananas, 1/2 c. nuts, chopped (1 c. better), 1 tsp. vanilla, 1/4 tsp. salt
ReferenceRecipe: Before you start, sample the rum and check quality. Good, isn't it? Now, go ahead. Select a large mixing bowl, measuring cups, etc., and check that rum for quality again. It must be just right. Try it again.
GeneratedRecipe: cream shortening and sugar until light and fluffy. add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. sift together flour, baking soda and salt. add alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with flour mixture. add vanilla and nuts.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, 3 Tbsp. butter, 1 1/4 c. flour, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. baking powder
ReferenceRecipe: Mix all ingredients. Roll thin. Cut into 1/2-inch strips. Let dry for 10 to 15 minutes.
GeneratedRecipe: beat eggs and butter together. add flour, baking powder and salt. mix well. roll out thin and cut into strips. drop into boiling broth. cover and cook 10 minutes.

Ingredients: 7 c. cucumbers, thinly sliced, 1 c. onion, diced, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 c. vinegar, 2 c. sugar, 1 tsp. celery seed or celery salt, 1 tsp. whole allspice
ReferenceRecipe: Do not peel. Do not cook. Combine cucumbers and onion. Sprinkle with salt and let stand 2 hours. Drain off. Mix together vinegar, sugar and celery seed. Stir until sugar is dissolved. Add whole allspice. Do not heat. Pour over cucumbers and let stand 1 day. Ready to eat or can. Keep in refrigerator up to 1 year.
GeneratedRecipe: combine cucumbers, onion and salt. let stand 1 hour. drain well. combine sugar, vinegar, celery seed, allspice and allspice. bring to a boil. pour over cucumbers and onions. put in freezer containers and freeze.

Ingredients: 2 eggs, slightly beaten, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. cracker crumbs, 1 can cream-style corn, 1 tsp. sugar, salt and pepper to taste, dabs of butter or oleo, paprika, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. chopped broccoli, cooked and drained
ReferenceRecipe: Beat eggs until fluffy. Add the remaining ingredients except butter and paprika. Pour into greased or buttered casserole dish.
GeneratedRecipe: combine eggs, milk, sugar, salt, pepper and cracker crumbs. mix well. add broccoli and dabs of butter. pour into buttered casserole dish. sprinkle with paprika. bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

Ingredients: 3 c. unsweetened pineapple juice, 2 c. diet lemon-lime soda, 1/2 c. unsweetened lime juice, 2 tsp. lemon extract, sugar substitute (to equal 1/4 c. sugar), orange slices (optional)
ReferenceRecipe: Combine all ingredients. Serve over ice. Garnish with orange slices.
GeneratedRecipe: combine pineapple juice and equal amount of water. combine pineapple juice, sugar and extract; add to orange slice and lemon slices. freeze.

Ingredients: 1 can pinto beans, 1 can whole kernel corn, 1 can stewed tomatoes, 1 can Ro-Tel tomatoes, 1 pkg. taco seasoning, 1 chopped onion, 1 1/2 lb. ground beef, 1 pkg. tortilla chips
ReferenceRecipe: Brown ground beef with the chopped onion and drain fat; add taco seasoning to ground beef. Pour mixture in a large saucepan and add the remaining ingredients (undrained). Simmer for 30 minutes. Pour taco soup over individual servings of tortilla chips.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and onion; drain. add remaining ingredients except tortilla chips. simmer for 30 minutes. serve with chips.

Ingredients: 1 can tomato soup, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, 3/4 c. mayonnaise, 1 small-medium onion, grated, 3/4 lb. cooked shrimp, 1/2 lb. crabmeat (sea legs are okay), 1/4 c. water, 1/2 to 1 oz. dry sherry (optional), dash of salt, 1 envelope Knox gelatine
ReferenceRecipe: Peel, clean and cook shrimp as for shrimp cocktail. Mix soup and cheese over medium heat until well blended. Chop seafood and add to mixture with mayonnaise. Grate onion over pot so juice goes in. In another pot dissolve gelatine with water until clear. Add gelatine and sherry with pinch of salt to mixture. Stir until blended. Pour into greased mold. Refrigerate at least 6 hours or overnight. (Town House crackers go well with this.)
GeneratedRecipe: heat soup and cream cheese. remove from heat and add gelatine. stir in mayonnaise until smooth. add onion, tomato soup, sherry, sherry and salt. stir until blended. add shrimp. pour into mold or dish and chill until firm. unmold and serve with crackers.

Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 (32 oz.) can V-8 juice, 1 lb. chopped or stewed tomatoes, 4 large potatoes, cut up, 4 carrots, grated, 1 lb. mixed vegetables, 3 beef bouillon cubes, 2 onions, cut up, 2 c. water
ReferenceRecipe: In a large 8-quart pot cook ground beef and onions. Add potatoes, carrots and water. Then add beef bouillon, canned tomatoes and add V-8 juice. Cook until tender. Then add mixed vegetables. Put any season you want.
GeneratedRecipe: brown ground beef and drain. mix v-8 juice, tomatoes, carrots, onions, bouillon cubes, and water. simmer for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
